_Friend, Every parent deserves to know what’s being taught to their child in the classroom.

This is Tate Reeves, Governor of Mississippi. In recent years our country’s classrooms have been bombarded with a radical-left agenda that’s poisoning the soul of our nation:

→ **Critical Race Theory,** designed to make children only see skin color and not character
→ **Trans-Ideology,** which no child should be learning about at a young age
→ **Anti-America Rhetoric,** saying the pledge of allegiance before class is now controversial

Back in my day, my parents never had to worry about any of this, but the radical left has other plans for our children, and if we don’t stop them now we may have to kiss our country goodbye.

**I need your help if I’m going to keep protecting our kids and keep the power in YOUR HANDS. [Could you pitch in a few bucks today to keep me in the fight?](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=1c222f9484444d7395a03d3c85b5984a&_e=hbA5l1MDqSTPGtvw3_EJUOdT8mpABxyAueFM9AbVCrpEcYJA5WT28W6a1rPBP1l2ZjMgdLKaDzUc4UXZwKCxLVwdQTtc0mmUD40iB0bOhgGom-ZPfSmDLpR6pWD-YfxNNkAbYimSNo1-2dCw0XqdiAvuyX6BQUrN3xY_UcQxjlRwbsxRfhOF3GNWkp13CzDM9ConjDUuaNzWscAZNChk9TznXEME7vcER_rzHEFcuuAwxhNISjBlZeOXQvF1Yx7zduT07PQjxrbtZXNl9jeVGqz6YQeDb6cjdxNgpFc29o23pMmfd9VCv5rpVYvrcTZFusPKKugvlEW8WJc1yc13U9vnKvOi52xFuCF_IDBaC8s%3D)**

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: An update on Iowa’s abortion ban
body:
Whatever comes next, Iowa Starting Line will be there to keep readers informed.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)
Peter, we wanted to share a critical update on the email we sent you yesterday.
**Late last night, Iowa Republicans moved to ban most abortions in the state.**
Their controversial special session was closely covered by our news team at _Iowa Starting Line_ , but their work won’t stop there.
[**We can’t be sure of what will come next, but you can be sure that**** _Iowa Starting Line_****will be there to keep Iowans informed, tell the personal stories of those impacted by the ban, and hold state elected officials accountable for their actions. To power their work for the fights ahead, please chip in $5 now:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)**
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom team
**P.S. In case you missed our email yesterday, we’ve included it below so you can see exactly the kind of in-depth journalism our _Iowa Starting Line_ team is creating.**
* * *
The Iowa legislature begins a special session today, Peter, for one reason and one reason only:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)
After Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds signed a **six-week abortion ban** into law in 2018, the state Supreme Court blocked it. Now she’s called on the legislature to convene for a special session and pass new measures to ban the procedure. **Many experts believe that the special session could ban most abortions in Iowa by Wednesday, an outcome a majority of Iowans don’t support.**
[**Our local newsroom,_Iowa Starting Line_ , has reporters on the ground, ready to cover all the latest developments. But we count on your support to sustain their work. Will you pitch in $5 today to help us keep up this kind of coverage?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)**
We founded Courier because local newsrooms are dying, and **the mainstream media is more concerned with profits and ratings** than filling the coverage void that’s left behind.
We close the gap by directly sharing vital local news stories in the online communities that need them the most.
Nowhere has that been more on display than in Iowa, where the _Iowa Starting Line_ team has produced months of **in-depth coverage of the right-wing attacks on abortion rights and what it could mean for millions of Iowa women and their families:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)
We don’t hide our content behind paywalls, allowing newsrooms like _Iowa Starting Line_ to provide a critical community resource to anyone who needs it.**To keep _Iowa Starting Line_ freely available, we rely on the generosity and support of donors like you.**
[**If you value local journalism and want to do your part to help newsrooms like _Iowa Starting Line_ to carry out their mission, will you pitch in $5 right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)
**[Donate $5 now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230712?refcode=em20230712&amount=5&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1232_120351_SaBV8k&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1232%2E120351%2ESaBV8k)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

[**July 12, 1861:** At the age of 24, Bill Hickok began his legendary gunslinging career with a gunfight against three men in Nebraska. Reports spread rapidly, exaggerating the story. [**July 12, 1862:** The highest medal for valor in combat available for members of the U.S. armed forces, the Medal of Honor, was authorized for Navy Sailors and Marines first in 1861. The following year in 1862, it was also authorized for Army Soldiers. # ABOUT ERIC EARLY

| | Last week, we experienced the Earth’s hottest global temperature ever recorded as cities across the nation hit record highs.

**The climate crisis is not some far-off hypothetical. It’s real, and we’re already seeing its devastating impacts.**

Here in California, we have a front-row seat to the climate crisis. In my lifetime, we’ve experienced severe droughts, unbelievable heat waves, intensifying wildfire seasons, and flooding from historic rain.

**I’m fighting for bold climate action to meet the scale of this crisis, but I need to know if you’re with me.** [Do you agree that our leaders in Congress must make climate action a top priority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66409072/416245536/252526810?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230712_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM0NDdhODItMTIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-PmzER4nenAMAfeyKwKm_xN552geLyOO1HAxw5nn0GU=&emci=ab3b5e7c-1221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4c447a82-1221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66409073/416245537/252526810?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230712_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM0NDdhODItMTIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-PmzER4nenAMAfeyKwKm_xN552geLyOO1HAxw5nn0GU=&emci=ab3b5e7c-1221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4c447a82-1221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)****

clean_body: The President would like to honor YOU on our Donor Wall. | | Friend – as one of President Trump’s most loyal supporters, we couldn’t possibly imagine our Donor Wall Plaque without YOUR NAME etched within. | | The President knows that the TRUE significance of our America First Movement rests with YOU – the millions and millions of freedom-loving patriots who, like President Trump, will never bend the knee to the Left’s tyranny. YOU are the reason we hold such commanding LEADS in every early primary state, Friend. And there’s no one President Trump would rather honor in our First-In-The-Nation Primary Headquarters thanYOU! Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, Jul 11, 2023 Subject: THANK YOU To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend – THANK YOU! Thank you for believing in the power of our movement, in American greatness, and that our country’s best days – despite the Democrats’ every effort – are still to come. It’s because of my incredible supporters like YOU that even with the entire weight of Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ coming down on me, my resolve to SAVE our country is stronger than ever. With you at my side, Friend, we are truly UNBREAKABLE. | And it’s because of your support that our campaign holds leads of more than 30 POINTS in nearly EVERY early primary state. Which is why I’d like to honor YOU on our Donor Wall in our First-In-The-Nation Primary Headquarters in New Hampshire! And I don’t mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within. | | I’d love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I’m asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall. But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I’ll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed right beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

**_Did you hear this amazing news, Peter?!_**

We’re officially endorsing Angela Alsobrooks in the Senate race for Maryland’s open seat!

Believe it or not, Peter: Maryland is NOT a secure blue state. Holding onto this seat could be the difference between losing and expanding our majority in the Senate. This is going to be a tough race, and we need to show up on Day 1.

Angela Alsobrooks is the first Black woman to serve as Prince George's County Executive in Maryland's history, and if she wins in 2024, **_she would be the first Black woman to represent Maryland in the Senate._ You know we love to power a history maker to victory!
**
[We’re on a mission to get more Black women elected to the Senate in 2024, and Angela Alsobrooks is a phenomenal candidate! We can’t WAIT to support her every step of the way. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | THIS JUST IN: 🚨WE’RE OFFICIALLY ENDORSING ANGELA ALSOBROOKS FOR SENATE IN MARYLAND! 🚨 | Did you hear this amazing news, Peter?! We’re officially endorsing Angela Alsobrooks in the Senate race for Maryland’s open seat! Believe it or not, Peter: Maryland is NOT a secure blue state. Holding onto this seat could be the difference between losing and expanding our majority in the Senate. This is going to be a tough race, and we need to show up on Day 1. Angela Alsobrooks is the first Black woman to serve as Prince George's County Executive in Maryland's history, and if she wins in 2024, she would be the first Black woman to represent Maryland in the Senate. You know we love to power a history maker to victory! If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Losing Ground in Ohio (VPP)
subject: we tried to warn you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Don’t abandon our most vulnerable Democrats!
| 🔴 **CNN TOLD YOU** that Democratic Senator Sherrod Brown’s seat is the THIRD MOST LIKELY to flip in 2024.

🔴 **THE HILL TOLD YOU** Democrats are defending TWICE as many seats as Republicans, meaning the fate of our fragile one-seat majority will come down to every single race.

🔴 **AND WE TOLD YOU** Crooked Republican J.D. Vance already flipped Ohio’s other Senate seat in 2022...** _so grassroots supporters like YOU are our only hope to stop the MAGA takeover!_**

But we’re still running $5,106 short of our MUST-HIT midnight goal to save the Senate. _Don’t abandon Democrats like Sherrod Brown when they need us most!_

[It’s clear: Battleground states like Ohio are under GOP attack more than EVER before. Please, this is our LAST chance to fight back! Rush $7 towards our $15,000 Save the Senate Fund before it expires at 11:59pm TONIGHT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49414?t=6&akid=9116%2E878179%2EOjGlGO) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49415?t=7&akid=9116%2E878179%2EOjGlGO)

Every dollar makes a difference!

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9116%2E878179%2EOjGlGO). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9116%2E878179%2EOjGlGO).**

I’m not a career politician — I’m a public servant to my community and have spent my career working in public health. I believe high quality, affordable and accessible health is one of the fundamental rights of every human being.

In the private sector and as a legislative director in Congress, I worked to make prescription drugs more affordable, increased funding to fight HIV/AIDS and ensured the Affordable Care Act expanded language access and preventive care benefits. As a senior health advisor to President Biden, I helped clean up Trump’s pandemic mess and co-authored Biden’s COVID-19 plan. And earlier this year, I received a doctoral degree in public health from Johns Hopkins University.

_**At a time of crisis for trust in public health, we need healthcare professionals in Congress.**_

Through COVID and the decades-long fight for equitable, accessible healthcare, our communities need representatives to fight for their right to care in Congress.

[**In Congress, I will fight for health equity and accessible healthcare for our communities — but first, I have to win. Will you give just $7 or $15 to my campaign tonight? clean_body: | Hello Peter! Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you no longer want to receive emails from us, please . = Hey team, I wanted to share with you a new endorsement for our campaign — I am truly honored to receive the endorsement of the first woman physician elected to the U.S. Congress! = | = I’m not a career politician — I’m a public servant to my community and have spent my career working in public health. I believe high quality, affordable and accessible health is one of the fundamental rights of every human being. In the private sector and as a legislative director in Congress, I worked to make prescription drugs more affordable, increased funding to fight HIV/AIDS and ensured the Affordable Care Act expanded language access and preventive care benefits. As a senior health advisor to President Biden, I helped clean up Trump’s pandemic mess and co-authored Biden’s COVID-19 plan. And earlier this year, I received a doctoral degree in public health from Johns Hopkins University. At a time of crisis for trust in public health, we need healthcare professionals in Congress. Through COVID and the decades-long fight for equitable, accessible healthcare, our communities need representatives to fight for their right to care in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much, Jirair | | Paid for by Jirair Ratevosian For Congress 321 N. name: Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director
subject: opportunity to leverage progressive power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

We have a concrete plan of action to leverage progressive power heading into 2024 - when progressives will be a key voting bloc that can’t be ignored.

As a long-time organizer, I’ve been at the forefront of critical fights and felt the thrill of winning big as well as the heartbreak of missed opportunities. That’s why I wanted to personally reach out today about our mission in this moment.

Many people are understandably feeling frustrated and betrayed by politicians, but we cannot lose strength and solidarity — especially when we have a clear path to victory on critical issues that raise the standard of living for working-class Americans.

Will you invest in our deep organizing now by becoming a MOVEMENT BUILDER and help us sustain our fight during the next 6 months?
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1008&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z

Organizing for transformative change isn’t easy - and it requires financial resources to recruit and train good organizers to mobilize the grassroots to keep fighting the corporate class.

As we get ready for 2024, your recurring donation - whether it’s just $5 or $10 a month - is a meaningful investment that will sustain our work in all of these areas:

Cancel Student Debt - Joe Biden made a promise, and we’re not going to allow the right-wing Supreme Court to get the last word on the issue. That’s why we’re ramping up pressure on the President to deliver for 45 million student debtors and their families in 2024. This week, our members shared their powerful stories with Rep. Ro Khanna at the Our Revolution Town Hall, and we’re organizing our members to testify at an important student debt hearing at the Department of Education on Tuesday.
Your monthly donation helps our organizers do the work of making sure these brave advocates are heard at this turning point when student debt relief hangs in the balance.

Raise the Wage - Our Revolution is partnering with One Fair Wage to put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE on the ballot in critical swing states like OH and AZ in 2024. Not only will this motivate our voters to the polls, but it will mean millions of people getting a long overdue pay raise so they no longer have to choose between rent and groceries.
End Fossil Fuels - The climate fight is heating up right now as Manchin, Sinema, and the GOP prepare to double down on fossil fuel drilling in upcoming must-pass bills this fall. Right now, we’re teaming up with our allies at Greenpeace and Friends of the Earth to make sure progressives in Congress have enough votes to block Big Oil.
End Medical Debt & Big Pharma Price Gouging - Bernie is leveraging his power as HELP Chair in the Senate to block nominees in exchange for lower drug prices, and our members are organizing on the outside to stop medical debt by taking on price-gouging hospitals and predatory debt collectors. We can win this.
We are tackling each of these issues strategically and aggressively because these are the issues that matter most to our membership base - and Democrats cannot afford to fail in this moment. Help us win these fights with a recurring donation of $5 or $10 a month — any amount helps!

We have a concrete plan to win on these issues, and we have the people on our side. We just need the resources to mobilize our grassroots movement into action and execute on our strategy.
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1009&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z

We are more powerful than we realize, and the ruling class would love nothing more than for us to back down now. Let’s show them the power of our movement.
https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8848?t=1010&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230712_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_JG_na_na_MMFR&t=1001&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230712_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_JG_na_na_MMFR&t=1005&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230712_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_JG_na_na_MMFR&t=1007&akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4450%2E5885482%2EEGil6z

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Tough Message
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/tough-message?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| When we don't have safe communities our businesses, home values and schools suffer. This is the reality we live in with Memphis as a neighbor.

That is why I’m ready to start day one with a hard-hitting plan to ensure that doesn’t happen here, like it has in other suburbs of the Mid-South.

I promise you, I won’t compromise with evil. We will send a tough message that there will be real consequences to anyone coming here to commit crime.

Read my plan here: [https://bartonfordesoto.com/priorities/](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=2b268cd369&e=3c5d31b5ad)

Stop Memphis. Save Desoto.
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=e28228108a&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=b8dffbfc8a&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=7fafed0d40&e=3c5d31b5ad)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We can’t keep voting for corporate-backed incumbents unwilling to fight for our rights.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, when the
Democratic Party tells folks to vote, it's missing a big part of the
story.

We can’t just vote our way out of a broken status quo in General
Elections. Because solving the crises of our day will require organizing,
fighting, and electing BETTER Democrats — not just the same old Democrats.

Nancy Pelosi supported anti-choice Democrat Henry Cuellar in a primary
against pro-choice progressive Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros. In the
face of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, the Democratic
establishment did nothing but tell us to vote.

We can’t keep voting for corporate-backed incumbents unwilling to fight
for our rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135627?refcode=em20230712-29860&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29860%2E1203867%2Eja-aVd ]We need your support to elect a new class of leaders, re-elect the
Squad, and transform the Democratic Party. Are you with us? Make a
$3 contribution right now to support our work to upend the
political status quo in this country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135627?refcode=em20230712-29860&t=1020&akid=29860%2E1203867%2Eja-aVd ]Donate $3

Corporate Democrats have thrown millions against us, they've thrown
high-powered endorsements against us...they’ll do whatever they can to stop
us — even if that means using resources to stop progressive change instead
of focusing those critical resources to stop Republicans from taking the
majority in Congress.

If we want to win more primary challenges and protect the Squad while
we’re up against millions in corporate Super PAC spending and endorsements
from corporate Democrats like Nancy Pelosi, we need our grassroots
supporters to step up.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135627?refcode=em20230712-29860&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29860%2E1203867%2Eja-aVd ]Can you donate $3 today to help us take on the
political establishment and elect progressive fighters to Congress?

We need to make sure we’re prepared to protect the Squad in their
primaries and build up our fundraising for the future so we can continue
building our bloc in Congress.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29860%2E1203867%2Eja-aVd ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

We can’t just vote our way out of a broken status quo in General Elections. Because solving the crises of our day will require organizing, fighting, and electing BETTER Democrats — not just the same old Democrats. Nancy Pelosi supported anti-choice Democrat Henry Cuellar in a primary against pro-choice progressive Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros. In the face of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Thousands have gotten their copy -- will you claim yours?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next level? If so, I have a special offer for you. **I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book,_How We Win!_** Thousands of patriots have already gotten their copy, and now it's your turn. The book is yours when you make a generous gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | **That's right -_ANY AMOUNT!_ Even a gift of $10 will cover the cost of shipping.** [**Click here to get yours before we run out of copies!**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://trk.readactnews.__Snb1qQsonxGvAg)
---
Until now, we have only sent this book to TPUSA supporters who make gifts of $100 or more. But frankly, I think the mission is too important to be that selective. As far as I'm concerned, if you care about this movement even a little -- even enough to give just $10 -- then I need you on board, and I need to get this valuable book into your hands. [**If that's you, then grab your copy today by clicking right here.**](http://trk.readactnews.) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. You see, after _ELEVEN YEARS_ at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ criss-crossing the country... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... **... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen.** We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** But to do it, we need to rally an army of informed, motivated, and equipped patriots who are ready to take action -- which is why I want to arm you with this book today.
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://trk.readactnews._emw)
---
And remember -- when you make a generous gift to TPUSA today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to love America again so we can defeat the radical Left and WIN the American Culture War. With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America...we're DOING IT! But we can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission. That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a donation of any amount to Turning Point USA. [**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone! Even a gift of just $10 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America.**](http://trk.readactnews._FQnkBIhJW7rutU86AcA)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://trk.readactnews.-vHZhXOQ)
---
Please, don't miss out on this opportunity to join our team and become a part of the movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right. Claim your copy of _How We Win_ today and help us secure victories for American Greatness! For America,
---
Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxOTQtYzIwOTZhYjVlMjI1NDYwM2JkNWFhMThhMGU0NjkzZDQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/v1DdHyxxxx7pGk6Az0ZGag) to unsubscribe.
---

With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America...we're DOING IT! But we can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission. That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a donation of any amount to Turning Point USA. Please, don't miss out on this opportunity to join our team and become a part of the movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right. Claim your copy of How We Win_ today and help us secure victories for American Greatness! name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Help me teach our children the bravery of WWII veterans
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/7BCXML53NQxEErA682jTDQ)
---
Fellow American, Our schools used to teach every child about D-Day. Among the thousands of heroes of the longest day were the 12 soldiers who received the Medal of Honor for their courage and valor... but that's no longer the case. WAs our Greatest Generation has passed, we have failed to teach our children the legacy of service, honor, and sacrifice of the men who fought their way into Hitler's Fortress Europe. In a recent poll of High School Seniors:
* 72% Didn't know we fought Hitler during World War II.
* 87% Didn't know we entered WWII because of the attacks on Pearl Harbor.
* 60% Didn't know which countries we fought in WWII
* 13% Thought General Dwight Eisenhower was a general from the Civil War

Fellow American, American kids are not being taught our nation's history. According to 'The Nation's Report Card,' America's high schoolers' proficiency in U.S. History and Civics is at its lowest level in nearly 30 years. They know little of the immense courage our troops displayed fighting for their freedoms in the Second World War, and they know little of the heroes who gave their life in service to our country. In fact, most Americans these days know next to nothing about World War II and the millions of young soldiers who put their lives on the line to serve their country in the war, let alone in Korea or Vietnam. To help educate young Americans about the selfless, patriotic, and courageous heroes in WWII, the American Veterans Center created a limited-edition booklet - **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day's Greatest Heroes._** [**For the next 24 hours, I'm holding a copy of this brand new, one-of-a-kind booklet for you, Fellow American. With your gift of any amount today, a copy of _A Mighty Endeavor_ will be yours to share with family and friends.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/whGj-l3rP6cMNl3mc6HIWA)
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/5mdpfPhBxspGLOb2aEQaog)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/UJsMBQQzvAd5uha-NZoMMA)
---
Every one of the 156,000 men who stormed the beaches of Normandy on that bloodyday is a hero in my book. It took real guts to run head-first into a hailstorm of bullets and mortar rounds. We all hope nobody ever needs to experience something like it again. But it is essential we remember, and learn. The AVC is devoted to preserving their history, so that today's young Americans - and those in generations to come - can learn from the heroes you and I grew up idolizing. The 12 heroes who received the Medal of Honor showed so much courage and valor in the invasion of Normandy, that they were individually chosen to receive our nation's highest honor. All Americans should read the stories and know of these heroes who have been all but forgotten. The [**American Veterans Center is committed to bringing the legacy of the greatest generation to the latest generation, and with your gift today, we can preserve the legacy of America's World War II veterans.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/QTCm6B9u_8ODdRdvaiJ7BA) As a token of my thanks for your support, I'll send you a limited-edition copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**. When you receive it, I have just one request; please share it with a loved one. Show them these stories and talk about how important their legacy is to our history. But, please let me know in the next 24 hours if you're claiming your copy! It is my hope that you'll share this booklet with your children, grandchildren, and neighbors and tell them all about D-Day.
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/-iOR2yQylysJZYvGJtcXpQ)
---
Fellow American, we must share the TRUTH about American WWII veterans with America's youth - we cannot fail them any longer. We must educate our nation's children with messages of the D-Day heroes who were up against a battle-hardened enemy, whose very actions preserved the freedoms we enjoy today. [**Please support American Veterans Center's mission to fight the historical ignorance plaguing today's culture and teach America's young people what real service meant during WWII.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/Gt5rl0gOlxdBl_ytq90jEA) Whether you can afford to donate $15, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any other amount - I'll send along your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day's Greatest Heroes_** as a "thank you" for your support of our bravest Americans. Thank you and God bless,
---
Tim HolbertAmerican Veterans Center
---
[**Support American Veterans Center**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDA0NTMifQ/cKPpo0rfXomhCy1he0Sb-w)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTk0LWZiYTkxZGJjZGQ2NzRkN2I4ZWYyMzY1NjlhNjAxZmE0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/3hi7ecJSPH2ephOrmfKz_g) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Protect Our Children: End Disney’s Gay Pride Threat
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
Ban Child Mutilation Nationwide|
Concerned American:

We need to talk about Disney.

In a stunning development, Disneyland held its first official LGBT "Pride Nite" on June 13 and 15, as part of their "Disneyland After Dark" series, with children's most beloved characters, Mickey and Minnie Mouse, turned into gay icons!

This came even as Disney continues to face backlash in Florida for opposing the state's "Parental Rights in Education" legislation.

_Meanwhile, Disney revenue and stock value continue to slide as families world-wide are fed up with the LGBT propaganda being slipped into the movies and TV shows of their children_.

Now is the time to pour on the pressure with Robert Iger (Disney CEO) and the Disney Board that Disney's core patrons (families!) do NOT want homosexual and transexual promotion in their parks and stories.

That's why I'm writing to you today with a personal request: CitizenGO is launching a massive new campaign to demand Disney stop promoting LGBT content in their parks, movies, and TV shows, and I need your signed petition behind us.

My name is Ignacio Arsuaga, and when I founded CitizenGO, I was determined to stop the worldwide tide of radical LGBT propaganda I saw targeting my children.

_Now, CitizenGO represents millions of members and supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT ideology that has swept through our media and entertainment, mercilessly attacking the relationships between children and their parents and destroying family morality and faith_.

Will you join with millions of pro-family Citizens to defend our children from Disney's LGBT propaganda?

**[Please sign now to support CitizenGO's campaign urging Disney's CEO, Robert Iger, and the Disney board to stop promoting LGBT content to children](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-vOz3Xocc8vA)** *** _When Disney ran its first "gay pride" parade_ in Disneyland Paris in 2019, CitizenGO was leading the fight against the LGBT indoctrination, and we delivered over 400,000 signatures to Disney urging them to cancel the sexually explicit event.*** _Even as Disney executives claimed not to care_ , sources within Disney confirmed there was growing fear of a pro-family backlash. So when they carried out an X-rated peep show of public sex acts, lewd dancers, and bondage leather-clad or even nude participants through the Paris park, CitizenGO delivered over 1,000,000 petitions demanding they cancel future events for the sake of families who visit the parks.*** _And then CitizenGO doubled-down on Disney by calling out_ the radical LGBT propaganda in their children's TV shows, such as Muppet Cinderella where a male "Cinderella" character put on a dress and pretended to be a girl, CitizenGO members sent even more petitions to Disney.*** _And when the recent box-office flop Lightyear_ was changed at the 11th hour to add a homosexual relationship, CitizenGO made sure pro-family and Christian citizens were well aware of the corruption in what should have been a good family movie and warned Disney that they would pay a price.And pay a price they have.

Since this explosion of radical LGBT propaganda from Disney, their park attendance has vastly underperformed their estimates, their movies have been widely critiqued and made tens of millions less dollars than expected, their streaming platform is losing money, and their stocks have plummeted.

_All of our efforts to call Disney back to its roots are making an impact, and we have been noticed_.

When we attended the Disney Shareholders meeting in 2019 and demanded they explain the LGBT propaganda they were pushing on children, we were brushed off and laughed at.

_When we made the same demand in April this year, Robert Iger himself dodged around the question with a nervous look at angry shareholders_.

No wonder Iger had egg on his face: due to the shift towards promoting LGBT content, Disney's shares have reached their lowest point in two years following the company's reported losses in its streaming business. Disney+ experienced a staggering loss of $1.5 billion in the fourth quarter of 2022 alone. Moreover, Disney recently announced layoffs, over 7,000 job cuts, with more cuts expected later this year.

We need to strike now, while the iron is hot.

**CitizenGO will hand-deliver your petition where possible to Iger and the Board and use digital platforms where necessary to make sure your voice is heard loud and clear "We have had Enough."**

**[Will you sign your petition today to demand Disney return to its family-friendly roots](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._VDp9gsmttHhLCAShGw)**?

And once you sign, can you chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO expose Disney's dangerous ideological machinery to even more Americans? Even a gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost.

The success of our campaign relies on the power of Citizens standing together to make our voices heard, and every extra dollar counts when we're fighting to take Disney back from the LGBT lobby's clutches.

**[So please, sign your petition and chip in with a quick $50, $25, or $10 contribution to help CitizenGO recruit more signers and win the fight](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**.

In addition to recruiting more petition signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your contribution will help fund:
* _Hard-hitting advertisements_ to highlight and draw attention to the train wreck that is Disney's current support for LGBT propaganda, including the Pride "Nite" that took place on June 13 and 15 in DisneyLand.

* _Targeted petition deliveries_ to Disney's Headquarters, executives, and board meetings.

* _Phone calls to likely supporters_ to raise awareness and recruit new members.

* _Radio and TV ads_ exposing Disney's ideological machinery, should funds permit.

But to use all of these plans in our fight to take back Disney will require a huge war chest to make sure that when we fight this battle, we will ultimately win the war. We do not need Disney's billions of dollars... just enough to let pro-family Americans know what is happening, and get them involved in our campaign.

**[So please sign your petition and chip in with a modest contribution of $10 or $25 today](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-avtgASgBQBnhPlrg)**.

Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight for our children's future.

Sincerely,

Ignacio Arsuaga
President, CitizenGO

P.S. Disney has relentlessly filled their children's movies and TV shows with radical LGBT propaganda, and now is planning multiple Pride "Nites" as part of their "Disneyland after Dark" event, but they are paying a huge price at the box office, on-line streaming and park attendance. Now is the time to let Disney executives and Board members know "We have had Enough!"

CitizenGO is launching a massive new campaign to demand Disney stop promoting LGBT content in their parks, movies, and TV shows, and I need your signed petition behind us.

**[I'm counting on you to sign your petition, and then go on to give a modest $10 or $25 contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help CitizenGO fight to take back Disney from the LGBT radicals](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**.

Thank you for all you do.

body:
Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zshb1e99cgchop3l7p6tkpo6vorttkdkm622pui8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5lc4o64phnc4r3ed71ekqbec9nm9q72sb662rb5cr26ponct366phr4dhgs3gefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3cp5l65g74cr66jhb6oj7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm1p72clj64pj1c8iv0)

Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I 'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I 'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zln0nhtlg95cu30sc725kcuips3rha323o1neomo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.

Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
Defending Parental Rights
While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z08hto80o14brcsvfbfu08j2ueqbdsv7fvu3il78_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zivfnc1b22gbkt4hlgkk27chhghulvc0fjab65v8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
[Donate $250 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zntsrg3jq2vlphgh2qrrcn0kefkrlv4gsbqle5l0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
[Donate $500 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg18kk5kmkgf3mdu5mtb93ns72dc8nhnqu3fj9fo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbhuv46e05i2chtofs9nasb3k7k1phvp0s6e7hq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbb9ggdebgf3dro7bu68p83eq3cirr7ern7788qo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
School Choice
Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

[Please send an urgent donation today to continue school choice success across the nation >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5u920s8m7a9nu3i00tlqmgkj99gr8k2mh4grr58_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8qhsvkljjh7fl3e93l48soa6gh9t5f2r66h4seo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvapbk57l8vv9gco17nio90anfr8iofe7eg033io_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
Defeating DEI
Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities.

It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process.

Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple:
Public universities will be **explicitly prohibited** from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs.
In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools.

Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists.

The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Friend.

**_I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support_.**

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2pp168skip0a498c2kpm8r6bjdd1dhe1sp3garg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)
[Donate $250 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zru52gcfrd8bdeaq49ekpm34mvpnj4b19r24d450_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3hbhrltdfajigna5r7t0avk01ecu8afqfurkqt0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9imcoj6c5h2bs)

Ted Cruz

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. name: Shift WA
subject: Democrats’ “carbon tax” hits home
body:
The staggering increase in our state's gas prices didn't just happen. It's a direct consequence of decades of Democrat control of state government. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62022892:sSOD59DNh:m:1:2610672541:64562F6011283C172D888AA71144D149:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, We are back, refreshed, and ready to work after our short summer break. We're resuming our work on highlighting the issues that impact your everyday life, including skyrocketing gas prices. Seattle had the honor of hosting the MLB All Star Game Tuesday. During the game, the announcers reminded us that the last time Seattle hosted this event was in 2001, when gas prices were just over $1 per gallon. Fast forward to today, and we are now paying over $5 per gallon. Of course, the staggering increase in gas prices didn't just happen. It's a direct consequence of decades of Democrat control of our state government. **Governor Jay Inslee and Democrat lawmakers consistently assured the public that their Cap and Trade (i.e., "carbon tax") scheme would only have a minimal impact on consumers, costing them just "pennies."** Despite unanimous opposition from Republicans, Democrats passed the legislation during the "remote" 2021 legislative session. Democrats went on to repeat these claims during the 2022 campaign, even though evidence suggested that the policy would **add nearly fifty cents to the price of a gallon of gas.** All of the Democrats' promises turned out to be false, and consumers are bearing the cost. And unfortunately, as you know, most media outlets refuse to hold Democrats accountable for their actions and promises. At Shift WA, we are dedicated to this mission, but we cannot do it alone. We rely on the support of individuals like you who believe in the importance of an informed electorate and holding our elected officials responsible. [**Will you consider contributing to our efforts today?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62022893:sSOD59DNh:m:1:2610672541:64562F6011283C172D888AA71144D149:r) [**Your support will enable us to continue our investigative writing, highlight the truth, and keep our community informed about the issues that directly affect our lives.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62022893:sSOD59DNh:m:1:2610672541:64562F6011283C172D888AA71144D149:r) Thank you for your continued trust and support. Together, we can make a difference and ensure that accountability remains a cornerstone of our political landscape. Thank you, Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62022894:sSOD59DNh:m:1:2610672541:64562F6011283C172D888AA71144D149:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14246648&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osSOD59DNh).

# Thursday, JULY 13, 2023
---|---
**Good morning! **On this day in 1861, General George B. McClellan and his Union troops defeated Confederate forces in northwestern Virginia, an area that later became West Virginia.

In today's edition, we're discussing the historic heat wave in the south, Hollywood actors on the picket line, and an ornery sea otter in California.

Have any suggestions? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7turDAUAL_G7hadhx9QuLjSFd2mTYkMPiyOzHpFnEX5-yipt57RSPN-na4xl3y_vcVdQlvrFJeWnzKBvyBfiCfSKawiJKwloOsHMr43Tm_BsAWcV2uGGHuhFBnYLTDH2QmhZ50DATF4ZATs0XZJvE1IbmCD1s-sDEjKrR7dR833tslavutTjm6puy5ha-2h-J-iUdF4nucL65fx-NV2xf8N6COkx5lLyZ_OKwO3PebyF2uv334CAAD__4lGTqI) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? ## Extreme Heatwave Grips South
One hundred million Americans are living beneath a [heat dome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O7CAUg58m6YjgkN-CYoqbbm67ZcTAIbBKYAQniebtV9l6S3-WLctfz-Wpwxbi-l_vqMilRRsKJy58YEIykAvUVjlEQFmjEv04QTuMbV97JU0nwYyDa4Fz09mei4m_ZGsmO4IWrzoo4CD5IKTgYhRdY3HorIB-kq3ohpesWo42UMrNdwqRPLrtk07MjUl7vSlP9C6VfFQwVzBf19XsJd5eBTNGdpSboiaPuYKZ0rtQygFvfESX8hrOEFfmURO79InMpYxGF2IhsnJp8oUlx45ya_LITNrvgNWfu0Nn9ngI-4R_R52VfV9h20Lph6rl667D9ruS_j7tJwAA__8ToW7U) that's shooting thermometers into the triple digits and breaking records.

El Paso and Miami have hit 100 degrees for a month straight, and Phoenix hasn't dropped below 110 for twelve days. In Death Valley, CA, temps may hit 130 this week--nearing the [highest recorded temperature](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FyrCAUh_GnwW4dOKhIQXGL66TZtCkZVv7qSVAcluxO3j6T1Cm_6pvf29VfAyc-1teww9Ul-zBXfsBLc1H6QtpTE90CEHQDp4bRUmfGbmg212HR-iYlemsDFugxkES8RWnnfgi2YUeStDRKK6lG1bcRpo-KBqs71ZubFp1E5JpL-575qBuW9JUfKO2c9ya5rdbzLvQ_QZOgCUf75A8-ETm0uayCpp8WNL3wuuFefcV-ooT6WeAL5lwios-H_x9K3Zri4vnklPg-GNHJdQ-cfkf1b_d3AAAA___sHFtg) in world history.

The massive high-pressure weather system is [repelling the jet stream](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu9CAQhJ8Gd5zMgo1dUPyNu_vblNbaLAcRZ06wOStvH12idKlHo5nve7uuV0w5Hbf_eCfHoay4c3rS2luptAS9QuddIALSHTk1TjMYO5mxi27DEWcbvNZqs5PSPsy7HQwOaGbaLHXJQQ-6t0qrXk1quHiyg1cwztqowW5amJ584lIv7yUdHCnkz_KketnLvcsuMj-a0P8ELAKWk5DjTyZgCaXSjo0FLJVuqRyYBSwHnU3A8pqVLwKQrXxwPKmxjIQsT3yS_O3KSnupvnXV-ceZck5ttML0tzum_P2B_1byFQAA__8wBWKm) and preventing moisture from the Pacific Ocean from cooling down temperatures. Conditions are expected to worsen in the next week, and the high temps will likely spread further north.
## Biden Touts Alternative Loan Forgiveness
The Supreme Court struck down the Biden administration's student loan forgiveness program, but a new "student loan safety net" may allow borrowers to [escape their education debts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb_G7oiYAQMuKF6TLq_d0hrD2GFFIDJsov37lbfe8uoW5-h83JYbpZzK_p8e7PtWFwo9vXiRVoASqBYco9-YkdXIHoybUVunzXj3W3BqAmaShmie19UZBREhmjDNmmlMHiUqaUGBBAfTJbKdIqCZlYbJrmrQkmPq9bh81lT6nbf8XV98XEJ9jNnfe3-2Qf0b8DrglZ6F3-28znH0FDIPeG39K3LpIlcqTUReuwg1Z95ZBCqBc6aeahFbPfb04sKtiROP6zpJKQEdaVC8RURnnbOkLI2Hj893yjk1Ywct9wel_CvV_270EwAA__8XnWdS) after all.

Students will be able to apply for the SAVE Plan this summer, and those accepted won't have to make payments toward their balance if they earn less than $32,800.

Starting next July, borrowers with an initial balance lower than $12,000 will get the remainder of their[ debt canceled](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGnwRsWHGDsgaGLt3TtaBHuSIgIRDY17dtX7dz9l359H5ft4lNO5fbun-RarJsPLZ20Ccul4qA2GNBFIiA1kJPTvIC2s56Gu8NoFg0LRhQANqCPSslZGwxG0qyXITkQoISVSgo5SzMiWYMSpkVpaexVMS0IU6v7-KiptDvF_F1P2sdQn0N299ZeB1NvDFYGa-99zOmkUnusX78Jg7VQPxishz-Jv7IvPPgSKPOjfSKVxpGujT8q8WtCKsPu8NVTzumYLNPi9vQp_83a__afAAAA___dhFus) after making ten years of payments.

The SAVE plan was announced last year. It's been overshadowed by the [failed attempt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzGPtCAUAH8NdBoeD0ULiq-x26-90rDwWLkgGGV1999f9urrpphkMl-3-WZjivnx365kaiizdTWeNAvdADYSZ8m9CUSSkJOBfhil0oPq-WI6ABvQOSdGdNYFVDrchXe6hwE8Oh6NFBKFBgQBA3StJ915kP2ICjp9R6YE-VjL3n6XmOtCIb3LSXvrysqTWWrdDob_mJyYnK7rakN5gdiWQjm-PhKT01oyvZmcjvr0lGuTis3NYU9qtvQhV-rz4Lvx2xVTikevmRKP1cb0W6l_T_8EAAD__6MmWY8) at mass debt cancellation, but it's now the Biden administration's primary vehicle for keeping its loan forgiveness promises. It's also likely to be challenged in court.
## Hollywood Millionaires Close to Striking
American actors are ready to [walk off the set](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFv8yAQQH8N3rC4A_ucgeGTPnlLl6rqaGFzdmixiYAkyr-v0rnz05Oe3ud5OrsQw7G9uZ1tXdPklhruPCmSoCXqCRtvV2Zk3bCFfjihocH0zcWiIkN-ISJzAvLecc-oZsSVHLluboJFhVoRaFAwQNd6ps4D9idtoKNZC6PYh5py-5XCUS-8xme6c26XtDfRXmq9FqH_CRwFjm5eDn6UdksvLHD8eBc4FrdJt9bsZKk5fLOMKe1F3o6QDlnqzYdU5M5c5cqes4svp6b8FHoMXuj_oAAGUAqabP31EWIMpSdh1La7EH9L6t9jfgIAAP__LEpjcA).

A-Listers like Jennifer Lawrence and Meryl Streep, members of the Hollywood union SAG-AFTRA, are upset about compensation from streaming deals, along with the threat of Artificial Intelligence using their likenesses without permission.

The Writers Guild of America went on strike in May, and now the [actors are threatening to join](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu7CAQQNGvsTtbMIDBBcVrttvXprQwjJdJsFnh0a7891FSp7_S1fm4L_dAhY7H_7Cj560uITK9cBF2kGoAtUCf_IYIqHr0cnIzaOv01GcPYELcYhKrRW1SlKubpdHrjKsVztqePAhQwkolhXTSjAmtSRKmWWlp7Ko6LTAR1zZ-Vjo441au-sI2xrr3xWfm59mpfx3cOrjFMO71RXiOV8i1_jQd3N75GkLk2s6Bc8PAeNDxGE5u9IUDCHBaCwNj5r30zafnm0qhc7KdFo89UPl98d_07wAAAP__UHJaJg) them and create the first double strike since the '60s.

Contracts between the actors union and major movie studios expired at midnight last night.

clean_body: 100 million Americans are living beneath a heat dome that's shooting thermometers into the triple digits and breaking records. | | | | | | Thursday, JULY 13, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1861, General George B. McClellan and his Union troops defeated Confederate forces in northwestern Virginia, an area that later became West Virginia. In today's edition, we're discussing the historic heat wave in the south, Hollywood actors on the picket line, and an ornery sea otter in California. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Extreme Heatwave Grips South One hundred million Americans are living beneath a that's shooting thermometers into the triple digits and breaking records. El Paso and Miami have hit 100 degrees for a month straight, and Phoenix hasn't dropped below 110 for twelve days. In Death Valley, CA, temps may hit 130 this week--nearing the in world history. The massive high-pressure weather system is and preventing moisture from the Pacific Ocean from cooling down temperatures. Conditions are expected to worsen in the next week, and the high temps will likely spread further north. Biden Touts Alternative Loan Forgiveness The Supreme Court struck down the Biden administration's student loan forgiveness program, but a new "student loan safety net" may allow borrowers to after all. Students will be able to apply for the SAVE Plan this summer, and those accepted won't have to make payments toward their balance if they earn less than $32,800. Starting next July, borrowers with an initial balance lower than $12,000 will get the remainder of their after making ten years of payments. The SAVE plan was announced last year. It's been overshadowed by the at mass debt cancellation, but it's now the Biden administration's primary vehicle for keeping its loan forgiveness promises. It's also likely to be challenged in court. Hollywood Millionaires Close to Striking American actors are ready to . A-Listers like Jennifer Lawrence and Meryl Streep, members of the Hollywood union SAG-AFTRA, are upset about compensation from streaming deals, along with the threat of Artificial Intelligence using their likenesses without permission. The Writers Guild of America went on strike in May, and now the them and create the first double strike since the '60s. Contracts between the actors union and major movie studios expired at midnight last night. Tim Burchett (R-TN). He claims to have seen unreleased UFO footage, and he said extraterrestrials could "turn us into a charcoal briquette," if they really exist. ()➤ Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor has seen her net worth skyrocket since her confirmation in 2009. Much of the newfound wealth has come from book sales, and an Associated Press reporter claims that Sotomayor's staff has "prodded" public institutions into buying her books. ()➤ Gavin Newsom is officially proposing a 28th amendment to the Constitution, and it's all about increased gun control. The Chinese embassy in London has denied the reports and says that the US is "the world's biggest hacking empire and global cyber thief." Friend, **Did you see the news?** **Yesterday, we announced that Congressman and Republican U.S. Senate candidate Jim Banks will keynote our state dinner on August 10, 2023, at the JW Marriott Indianapolis!** The evening will also include the graduation ceremony of the **2023 cohort** of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, our seminar and leadership training program that's helping minority Republicans across the state step into party and civic leadership roles. Joining us for remarks and to present the cohort with their graduation certificates will be **Bowie Mayor Pro Tem and City Councilwoman Roxy Ndebumadu** , the youngest woman elected to serve on the Bowie, Maryland, City Council and the first African American woman to represent her district. **Our annual state dinners are our biggest events, Friend.** ******So be sure to grab your seat before we sell out.** All of the details can be found below. — Indiana Republican Party
