name: Lt. Governor Robinson
subject: Stepping down as Lt. Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z11icq1i7na0sqlr32dl27t9h95s65gk2tdn34l0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor6c3h2bs)

**MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**
---

In 2020 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I 'm a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I'm the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztlt9j5apjj12fgm1d16i8tohk5s7jpgn0jfb4s0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor6c3h2bs)**
---

I won't beat around the bush a minute more- this is the most important battleground race in the nation & together we can deliver Joe Biden & the liberal narrative a humiliating & historic upset.

**So I 'm humbly asking if you'll support me with your kindness & generosity just one more time before Biden & the Democrat machine hit us with their million dollar advertising blitz to end my candidacy.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4h1ofde576jn1u51u486aukc12ss6ps8soqn6tg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor6c3h2bs)**
---

This is the most important race in the nation & this is the most impactful thing you can do to help us make history & defeat Joe Biden.

THANK YOU.

-Mark Robinson

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9118%2E878179%2EKEQNjk). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9118%2E878179%2EKEQNjk).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9118%2E878179%2EKEQNjk) to request fewer emails. name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I’d rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zoeb4kog67812aak1evj090qhjvd9prk1q2en280_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor2cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugrm2c746lpj4cr5mipj8plks4or3c5ke2r32t1jcdq3cshk6hirdd32m5obeo77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphmciqj2ptietj32c5jcjjr1db5e8iv0)
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zclmep7d979djiodtvvrupi92adcg9fockg4ijno_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor2cjh2bs "Can you handle the truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjr4ke7d2dcmkjh5fsocgr98v82lp098ifdcqg18_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor2cjh2bs "Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za7hp15skaikor9ah0pm9q14l6qrngurs1rf9jsg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor2cjh2bs "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr38mqjdg1hhhjlucf8ulnqnuggg19c63kvjd6l8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hmeor2cjh2bs "John Kennedy")

Friend - THANK YOU!
Thank you for believing in the power of our movement, in American greatness, and that our country's best days - despite the Democrats' every effort - are still to come.
It's because of my incredible supporters like **YOU** that even with the entire weight of Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ coming down on me, my resolve to SAVE our country is stronger than ever.
With you at my side, Friend, we are truly UNBREAKABLE.
| [ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=05a76a64de9f4d3889f54ec9fdbbe808&_e=PBfdkvcDu7SyYUUpGq0M1zyLOWL1Jg86-sRouSk5n2-r5ZWnTke1CC890qd29ViH7W6QaR5yPsTceAEpoi_JJthFOtwWbabT0aRvvhHTMriVkkPwcosw-L2DVxCIv89sXZ__OTmYzSMWUuz5yC-RNs6ObcLC4XlR7GWIvhcZhmdKePUs6IwlhQ-r1IoHQTRMk1A4QsyMxujvVRQXwffjKlHX0DhfJ86QnSRPqp6Kz1Mshtf7grqMxwNWEbbO4c6LBEFejsviXy5tRno9j4s811GN_UNtrE4Fm8iUwv9DfwdxfWXpPaoBgbahJsdtdG7w-4wH3eu0I4E_z_5CX41HWVC0rAU2ROKf1U1cfkrGet8_GkKk2jDZT4zx6E_eguE-bUwoGOQWMs4MEVI4gNWP_Q%3D%3D)

And it's because of your support that our campaign holds leads of more than **30 POINTS** in nearly EVERY early primary state.
Which is why I'd like to honor YOU on our Donor Wall in our First-In-The-Nation Primary Headquarters in New Hampshire!
_And I don 't mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within._

name: Casey Given
subject: Help a North Korean defector share her story
body:
When the whims of a dictator control your country, nobody is safe.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcih5bo6astaj9fgk8ben8k2aig26nfdt6tspucg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)
Hello Friend,

When the whims of a dictator control your country, nobody is safe. And no one knows that better than the Dissident Project's newest speaker, **North Korean defector Seohyun Lee**.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5dch7pmp6ve1ajad5v0q9omahgvlv2vgvvs9s90_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

I'm Casey Given with the Dissident Project. We provide high schools with access to speakers like Seohyunm, who have lived under current and former socialist and authoritarian governments worldwide.

**Seohyun Lee is a North Korean defector** , human rights advocate, commentator, and YouTube creator. Her ultimate goal is to free the North Korean people and work with different stakeholders in navigating North Korean policy issues.

Before that, Seohyun had a much different life...

[But before I tell you more about Seohyun's story, I have to ask if you to consider supporting the Dissident Project with a quick donation of $10, $35, or even $50 today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4s7nbpilghk953hj850ff0hu48g25vdmrlgoa6g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv4hon6qv5ie0gpclscut87rs1qdd07ufrd34meo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

Seohyun was born and raised in central Pyongyang. _Unlike many people living under Kim Jung Un, she received the most prestigious education in North Korea_. Seohyun excelled academically and received numerous awards for her leadership skills. She enrolled at Kim Il Sung University in 2008 and was allowed to study abroad at China Dongbei University of Economics and Finance between 2010 and 2014.

**But not even academic excellence can protect someone in a country run by an authoritarian._Soon, Seohyun and her family would fear for their lives_.**

After the Kim Jong Un regime executed a series of brutal purges, Seohyun's family defected to South Korea and then resettled in the United States in 2016.

Since then, she has been committed to raising awareness of human rights abuses in North Korea and disseminating information to people inside the country.

Seohyun has leveraged her unique position and experiences as a North Korean defector to become an effective policy advocate and human rights activist. She has given a TEDx talk titled _**" Our bubbles of certainty: A perspective from my life in North Korea"**_ and testified at the UN Security Council as a briefer in March 2023.

And now, she is lending her experience to the Dissident Project, so she can tell her story to high school students across America.

Your support helps us provide this once-in-a-lifetime experience to schools at no charge. Click below to send a child a gift that will stay with them forever.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbp8c84bjvg19f87ccoa6ekv8pd5nb4h6likkc78_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk5fo8oeu8nsa7fkts0b4q9k3chktiuuigblcido_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgvf6760494l98ju5gjdsjc8ks3gf0r8qr2d5048_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk5pvn56d3qd02728tdek5d9n2oo4gj1of685rdg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl4c4amol9chb7l45k0jabv7dbregivkjcoanch0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlpoqtk6opgum5bcf75ik0kedg3k1nvcroehq9ug_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Sponsor a School $1,000 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5lj32f7dpfl9iuhieuuhpsl85qt1o4bkjvkakho_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z59hg5kdvpdd1gb2kbh4iu7bocrmqijej9nrvgko_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)
The Dissident Project just completed its first year, and the reaction has been incredible!

Our speakers spoke at 43 schools and events this year and reached thousands of high school students with their stories. And every time, students could not get enough. Sometimes our speakers would have to hold additional talks in classrooms just to answer all their questions!

**And we expect demand for the Dissident Project to skyrocket this upcoming school year.**

That's why I need your help to get a jumpstart on the upcoming school year. We have more speakers with even more stories to share with high school students and inspire them to have the courage to speak out against tyranny and love America.

But it's your generous gift that helps our speakers share their experiences with the generation about what it is like growing up in an authoritarian country. Click any button below to donate today.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0im1eq14mpv6t75g1c4c7iei3vqmsljlir8sltg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr6ng56v7fd47ocdebib34lsdivngn4ln23mgmk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbreme5mjhnc4ich6nkk2b6lain1fes4h0kk73h0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlmphpg2v2s92j4f86c6uddrl8s49hq0tdpupchg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2amro3np6g7gir984f7vlugoit3pl896mfpeo60_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm3r8dhdapuq0jkt08a1cubu43u081h9h2d4ti98_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Sponsor a School $1,000 >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrl62o57fl4efi3hbdbh80bn59aambqtn5p7at1g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znprmsotgvd6pdvjhld2ovtv9thholdk84j25q60_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm1pb2cjh2bs)
Thank you,

Casey Given

name: Charles Harper, Evergreen
subject: DEADLINE: Make polluters clean up toxic coal ash
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
A strong rule could protect millions of lives
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13507%2E53494%2EHR2-hO)
---
|
---
| | **TELL EPA: MAKE POLLUTERS CLEAN UP TOXIC COAL ASH** Toxic coal ash is poisoning our drinking water. EPA must do the right thing and require all coal plants to clean up their messes.
---
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-coal-ash-comments/?source=ema_2023_07_13_coal-ash&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_07_13&t=4&akid=13507%2E53494%2EHR2-hO)
---
| | Friend, Dangerous loopholes have allowed polluters to dump toxic waste called coal ash without oversight—overwhelmingly in Black, Brown, and low-income communities. **These communities currently endure contaminated drinking water and waterways laced with unsafe chemicals like lead and mercury, leaking from these unregulated and unlined dumps. **
Fortunately, EPA is taking comments on a proposed rule to monitor and clean up these toxic coal ash facilities—but the proposal still leaves some coal ash dumps unregulated. [**We cannot let EPA take half-measures on a rule that could protect millions of lives.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-coal-ash-comments/?source=ema_2023_07_13_coal-ash&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_07_13&t=5&akid=13507%2E53494%2EHR2-hO)
---
[TELL EPA: STRENGTHEN THE COAL ASH RULE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-coal-ash-comments/?source=ema_2023_07_13_coal-ash&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_07_13&t=7&akid=13507%2E53494%2EHR2-hO)
---
Ninety-one percent of coal plants pollute groundwater at unsafe levels for drinking. This situation will only get worse until EPA enforces the federal rule and ensures all toxic coal ash dumps are regulated. [**Tell EPA to do the right thing and require all coal plants to clean up their messes.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-coal-ash-comments/?source=ema_2023_07_13_coal-ash&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_07_13&t=8&akid=13507%2E53494%2EHR2-hO)
---
[**SIGN ON**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-coal-ash-comments/?source=ema_2023_07_13_coal-ash&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_07_13&t=10&akid=13507%2E53494%2EHR2-hO)
---
Onward, Charles Harper Senior Policy Lead, Power SectorEvergreen Collaborative
---

body:
When we all do our part, it makes a world of difference in our fight to save lives from gun violence
#

Friends -
[**Today, we’re asking you to make a $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230713-1-subs&t=1&akid=6129%2E3935704%2E2pQMV-)
Yes, $5.
Here’s why:
The gun lobby has stoked divisions in our country for far too long. They have used their influence to sway politicians to protect guns over people. They have used their fear-mongering tactics to promote a false narrative that a "good guy with a gun" can stop the "bad guy with a gun."
Their lies and corruption are killing people.
We know that $5 may not seem like the type of money that can take on the gun lobby. But when we all do our part, it makes a world of difference in our fight to save lives from gun violence.
In two days, we’ll be halfway through the month of July, and we need to pick up the pace if we’re going to reach our July fundraising goals.
[**So can we count on you to contribute $5 to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your contribution goes directly towards our lifesaving work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230713-1-subs&t=2&akid=6129%2E3935704%2E2pQMV-)

body:

| | |
---
_[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zho2h4ed8uiehlipsd3se7gc7bu1sb15gco0ui0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm9ob6c3h2bs)_Did you hear the news, Friend? “[**Top Recruit**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6eci5557rbbgq9kkl4efl0lmn9gdh4ia6ca4kt0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm9ob6c3h2bs)” - Politico “[**One of Republicans’ best pickup opportunities**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2n20cqcq8t4i9ssrvfm2rrbvg02lcvkjlirmhd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm9ob6c3h2bs)” - The Hill “[**Front runner for the Republican nomination**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkgteebi46p5s0rn9jr2dbhjfa07racuacubduv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm9ob6c3h2bs)” - Fox News Retired Army Captain Sam Brown has **OFFICIALLY** declared his run as the Republican candidate for United States Senate in Nevada. Nevada has narrowly gone for Democrats for the last decade. Last year, a Democrat Senator won the state by **LESS THAN ONE POINT.**
---
[**Send an Army Captain to the Senate!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z01u2mqncv8uudimosq313t3ea8lp45lbnu31mio_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm9ob6c3h2bs)
---
**Let me tell you why I chose to work on Captain Brown’s campaign.** Candidates like Sam don’t come around often. In a world of selfish, spineless politicians, Sam has been putting service before self for his entire life. From serving in the Army, to helping veterans get access to critical medications, Sam knows that serving and sacrificing for our country is one of the greatest honors on earth. [**That’s why it’s my honor to manage his campaign from DAY ONE.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zftajbtggjpc9kk1qfrlo46gm5fdrdqppcdp6a70_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm9ob6c3h2bs) But, this isn’t going to be a cakewalk, Friend. We need support from every patriot we can get. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Friend. [**Can you chip in any amount to send Captain Sam Brown to the Senate?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuoj6gt9aapcdei5kogtouqeoqi7co0vdbej8hr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9hm9ob6c3h2bs) Your support means everything to us. | | | **🚨 DEADLINE SATURDAY 🚨**
[**_Stand with Ted! >>>_**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NMl8yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0yJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/j9jnw-_UpNFg2xWFe-gKCQ) Hey Fellow Conservative,

It’s all hands on deck in this fight...

_The unhinged radical left HATES Ted and will say and do anything to defeat him next year!_

[**Rush a secure online contribution to help us reach our mid-month goal >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NMl8yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0yJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/p3zexqWRc1V7SUU-qh-8Ng)

Colin Allred is already raising money hand over fist. Political pundits have declared Texas the Democrats’ top 2024 pick-up opportunity, and all indications are leftists across America are going to pour in record-shattering campaign cash to relentlessly attack Ted.

Take a stand for liberty. Take a stand for America’s future.

**Time is running out fast and we still have $11,515 to go to reach our goal.****[DONATE NOW](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NMl8yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0yJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/c5WPtaucxS-1Hpegb2loww)** \- Team Cruz** **

Fellow Conservative,
I emailed you on this last week – this is a quick follow-up in case you missed it.

Our Senate race here in Texas is heating up. I’m clearly the left’s #1 target.

**Colin Allred raised nearly $6.2 MILLION in just over eight weeks after launching his campaign on May 3rd** , and the Washington, D.C.-based Lose Cruz PAC was launched last month to serve as a “good old fashioned attack machine” to tear me down.

I’m counting on your support now more than ever to **KEEP TEXAS RED** next November.

_And we have a critical grassroots fundraising deadline coming up fast this Saturday!_

[**Will you step up to help us reach our July mid-month goal?**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NMl8yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0yJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/2dssukwh7JISbSUyjglZtA)

[**PITCH IN HERE**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdWx5LU1NMl8yMDIzMDcxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUp1bHktTU0yJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/bkYpM9LKDqCVbedaHp0JPg)
---
We cannot take anything for granted. The left is ALL-IN to flip the Lone Star State.

**Control of the U.S. Senate – and our nation’s future course – could all come down to the outcome in this race!**

It’s vital that we reach our $25,000 mid-month goal to keep our summertime efforts here at Team Cruz on track. Any donation you can send today will be a huge help.

THANK YOU for having my back in this fight!

For Liberty,

body:

Peter, We are so close to cleaning up the ‘election integrity’ group ERIC...
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3044774da37547a9b572b5750dab2230&_e=XnA_cNtRpo0SUs6d9_-MhlGKspGHJmKOmpo8BN3f5aGRo4Rlupdo8R6X1zGjY4sqf1CXzCbwWwmgz5Up5sbfNBEOe8T7kCVtMKFfPg2S43lxoFNqQJJP-dLf4Iui4ftla091MD-ovB2B8J3kwNMBYTcXB9p2XN8z-54dXIKL85gOGjt5FlE4J0Vx9fKVHQ6j6KuLo9ex4t-01W-OAP5c5CM8McEi4kFigZ1xzKrbuyEmcffUHFDU2ogY57SPKB9WOdh1433dforEYZQ6r1OuXuSAukTIhrTG2NnJFU46lgyW6C7641-qcIgvI33ZyaBRDTAHp2mpXEr2k4nYNASzJZdK24jKyNDkQRi6y4NJwR0%3D)
---
The Electronic Registration Information Center, or ERIC, claims that its goal is to help states have more accurate voter lists. But liberals have used it for their own advantage, to achieve one true goal: **Inflating voter rolls by forcing states to register eligible-but-unregistered individuals and funneling sensitive voter data into partisan registration groups.** **_In fact, non-ERIC states have cleaner voter lists than states participating in ERIC! _** There's one thing ERIC gets right. They acknowledge a problem with America's voting data and voter lists. However, Voter Reference Foundation has a better solution...one that doesn’t give room for the woke left to take control OR drive more dollars into their voter registration schemes. **Chip in here to help VRF secure our elections:****_[https://voter-reference-foundation.revv.co/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3044774da37547a9b572b5750dab2230&_e=XnA_cNtRpo0SUs6d9_-MhlGKspGHJmKOmpo8BN3f5aGRo4Rlupdo8R6X1zGjY4sqf1CXzCbwWwmgz5Up5sbfNBEOe8T7kCVtMKFfPg2S43lxoFNqQJJP-dLf4Iui4ftla091MD-ovB2B8J3kwNMBYTcXB9p2XN8z-54dXIKL85gOGjt5FlE4J0Vx9fKVHQ6j6KuLo9ex4t-01W-OAP5c5Lhp8rrY3CFbnmZoKvwg-A4-b5gJBYTyFEU4aweh1AzheiVOFpgcErhOGtOcTq7jGLapmpERhtJrSVhGWch4RTsoQ1Sgwb1TYEfj05roJ_H-n9zzZ8jgVkNdaCsZF7pZav8yw4f24xGfZidYi1WnMrg%3D)_** Voter Reference Foundation is putting the power back in the hands of The People and taking it away from liberals using vehicles like ERIC to fund projects in the shadows. **Our national laws make it clear: oversight of voter lists belongs to the public. But barriers like process complications and data access costs make it**** _not truly_****available to the public. ** We're breaking these barriers by purchasing, sorting, and publishing voter data nationwide. And the data for many of these states is available to the public on our website already!
**⬇️**** _Could you chip in $18 to help us buy and publish more voter data?_****⬇️**
---

body:

The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Friend.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This isn't fair
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62023765:sshjjtDkN:m:1:877327319:EDDF8754ED60CFF1E89F032C2147EB54:r)
---
Fellow American,

You will never convince me that it's fair for a biological male, who swam three years on the men's team, to transition to the women's team for their senior year.

Young girls are working hard in their sport, and now they have to compete against biological males who've decided to transition.

No amount of training or diet can help women overcome biology. Men are built physically different than women, even their lung capacity is greater. The evidence, I think, is pretty common sense that there is an advantage for biological men competing against women.

**[Fellow American, If you agree, will you sign my "I Stand with Women's Sports" pledge today and show your support for the millions of female athletes who shouldn't have to compete against biological males?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62023765:sshjjtDkN:m:1:877327319:EDDF8754ED60CFF1E89F032C2147EB54:r)**

| [** Stand with Women's Sports -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62023765:sshjjtDkN:m:1:877327319:EDDF8754ED60CFF1E89F032C2147EB54:r)
---

Title IX was instituted in 1972 to protect women's sports in colleges and universities. It was meant to level the playing field for women; but now, 51 years later, we live in a time where the whole objective of title IX and women's sports are at risk.

You don't need a medical degree to see that this is not okay. This should not be a political issue, it's a common-sense, real-life issue. Everyone should compete where it's fair and safe.

Female athletes train hard to become champions. We should not allow the WOKE to take that right away from them.

**[So please, Fellow American, show your support and sign my "I Stand with Women's Sports" pledge.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62023765:sshjjtDkN:m:1:877327319:EDDF8754ED60CFF1E89F032C2147EB54:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62023765:sshjjtDkN:m:1:877327319:EDDF8754ED60CFF1E89F032C2147EB54:r)
Lindsey Graham

[** Stand with Women's Sports -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62023765:sshjjtDkN:m:1:877327319:EDDF8754ED60CFF1E89F032C2147EB54:r)
---

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.
clean_body: Building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors. I won't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. | | That was our average donation in June, Peter. Since launching this campaign just over 4 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Tom Fitton
subject: We are fighting back against serious threats to honest elections!
body:
The Left is trying to advance laws and programs that create discrimination in America

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Since 2012, we've been filing federal lawsuits against states including **California, Colorado, Florida, Indiana, Kentucky, North Carolina, New York, Pennsylvania** and **Ohio** to preserve election integrity.
Most importantly, thanks to our members’ support, _we have been consistently successful in these legal battles to make sure that states follow the law and clean their voter rolls!_
But Leftist groups and the Biden administration are now pushing harder than ever to radically alter U.S. election procedures in advance of the 2024 elections.
**[That's why I ask you with a special donation today so we can continue to lead in the battle to uphold the rule of law, and make sure that only qualified American citizens are allowed to vote in our elections.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

The Left's intention is clear: Demolish any safeguard designed to protect honest elections and do everything possible to make it easier for non-citizens to vote.

Our legal team is closely monitoring the Left's efforts to expand dangerous measures like:

* Promoting mail-in ballots using (often highly) inaccurate voter rolls
* Ballot harvesting
* Abolition of voter ID requirements

We are always looking for legal avenues in which radical schemes like these can be challenged...and at the same time, we for enforcement of the voter list cleaning requirements of the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA), which remain the best guarantee of honest elections.

But from start to finish, election law litigation can take years.

[That takes money!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

We squeeze the most out of our funds to make sure that we can research and bring our expertise to bear on multiple fronts in the war over honest elections.

That's how we find ways to take on the Left, and state election officials and bureaucrats who have contempt for the rule of law...especially our election laws.

Patriotic Americans like you make this essential work possible, which is so critically important since your Judicial Watch is the "**only game in town** " when it comes to fighting through the legal system and in the courts for ballot integrity.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Our opponents, including the Biden Justice Department and its well-funded radical network of "legal bomb throwers," are rolling in money. There is no question their attacks on honest elections will increase as the clock runs down to November 2024.

**That’s why your decision to contribute and help us is so important!**

[You have my personal pledge that with your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580), we will continue to lead in the fight for honest elections... _which I believe are critical for the survival of our Republic_ ...and for the rule of law!

[So please donate today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

And thank you for standing with us!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64144&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

# **THANK YOU 🇺🇸**
The outpouring support for our campaign has been incredible!

This last quarter was another historic fundraising effort: **raising over $815,000**. This fundraising haul marks one of the strongest fundraising quarters in district history – this is on top of the more than $1 million we raised in the first quarter of this year.

This tremendous show of support — with a significant proportion of the funds originating from Arizona — underlines the continuing momentum! I am committed to continue fighting and delivering for our district.

**Laura and I are humbled, inspired and encouraged by so many who have contributed to secure Arizona's 6th Congressional District in 2024 and help us keep fighting to protect the American Dream **🇺🇸

THANK YOU!

name: Keep Ohio Blue 2024
subject: A small ask

name: Dick Durbin
subject: The MAGA GOP is coming for our Senate majority…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
...but we have the power to stop them.
#
Peter, we are about halfway through July, and as much as I wish we weren’t in this position, I have to ask for your help once again this month. After a slow start to fundraising in 2023, this team rallied for our big FEC deadline at the end of June. _We can’t slow down now_.
Republicans are sure to see low fundraising numbers as weakness — and if they are able to outraise Democrats, they’ll be much closer to painting the Senate majority MAGA-red in 2024.
**[It is mission critical that we keep up our momentum. So, I’m asking: Will you please make a $5 contribution right now to defeat the GOP and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66418198/416307332/826308275?refcode=dd_em_230713_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzllNjliMC04YTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNFA0V8lshNfwAvnruW1PzQlndSjTNopMCWebpWQVtc=)**
The MAGA GOP is coming for our Senate majority, and with the start of 2024 right around the corner, **we cannot let them pull ahead.** There is too much at stake to allow a GOP takeover.
_Your_ support is essential — because without your grassroots donations fueling our campaigns, Democrats can’t defend our Senate majority from Mitch McConnell and the MAGA GOP crew.
As Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I have a front-row seat every day to the progress that Democrats are striving for — from our record-breaking number of judicial confirmations under President Biden to our current push for much-needed Supreme Court ethics reform.
I also see what the other side has to offer: constant obstruction, distraction, and chaos. Governing this country is serious business and the current Republicans aren’t up to the job.
**[I know we can stop the Republicans in their tracks and defend our Senate majority in 2024. Can I count on you to pitch in any amount now toward our July fundraising goals?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66418215/416307410/826308275?refcode=dd_em_230713_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzllNjliMC04YTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNFA0V8lshNfwAvnruW1PzQlndSjTNopMCWebpWQVtc=)**
Thank you to each of you for your continued support. I know this team will never let me down.
My best,
Dick Durbin

********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66418236/416307541/826308275?refcode=dd_em_230713_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzllNjliMC04YTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNFA0V8lshNfwAvnruW1PzQlndSjTNopMCWebpWQVtc=)********

name: Delegate Jazz Lewis
subject: We mourn the passing of Senator Broadwater, Friend
body:
Delegate Lewis shares his condolences
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Statement From Delegate Lewis (LD-24) On The Passing of Senator Tommy Broadwater (LD-24)
---
| Dear Friends,
I want to express my deepest gratitude and appreciation for the life and legacy of Maryland State Senator Tommie Broadwater, who passed away.
Senator Broadwater's unwavering dedication to serving Prince George's County and tireless advocacy for our community have left an indelible mark on all of us. As a local business owner, entrepreneur, and community advocate, he exemplified the true spirit of a trailblazer. I am humbled to stand on the shoulders of his remarkable achievements. Throughout his life, Senator Broadwater remained steadfast in his leadership of Prince George's County, pouring his heart into our beloved home, where he raised his family and devoted his time.
Senator Broadwater was a fierce fighter for those in need, which led him to run for office and become Prince George's County's first Black State Senator. He fought tirelessly for marginalized communities, working diligently to secure the funding our county deserved and ensuring that no one was left behind. His unwavering commitment and advocacy have impacted the lives of countless individuals who often felt unheard or overlooked.
Even after he left public office, Senator Broadwater continued to embody leadership. He generously shared his time and wisdom by advising countless elected, non-profit, and business leaders, as well as offering support whenever needed. I consider it an honor to have known Senator Broadwater personally, and I join the Prince George's County community in mourning his passing. To the Broadwater family, on behalf of the community as a whole, thank you for your patience and for sharing such an extraordinary man for so long. Please know that you are in our thoughts and prayers during this difficult time.
With heartfelt appreciation,

Jazz
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | Team: After the fall of Roe v. Wade last summer, abortion bans have come down all across the country. Now, 12 states have active abortion bans on the books. 80% of Americans want to see abortion protected, yet extremist officials who have been elected or appointed to office are operating in direct opposition to what the majority of their constituents want. We need to show our strength in numbers and make sure these anti-abortion extremists know just how many people they are up against. We refuse to sit by while attacks on abortion access and reproductive health care happen in states across the country. That’s why we’ve started to deploy ballot measures to secure our permanent reproductive freedom. And it’s working. In 5 states just last November, the overwhelming majority of voters cast their ballots in favor of protecting abortion access in their home state. Thanks for your help, friend. — Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. body:
| A new opponent just joined the race, and we are expecting National Republicans to pour millions of dollars into misleading attack ads against Sharice — _just like they did in 2022._

Now more than ever, we need your support to rise to the challenges ahead and keep KS-03 blue in 2024.

**[Taking back control of the House starts right here in competitive districts like Sharice’s, so please chip in to help us hit our goal of adding another 5,000 donations to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66426105/416322153/-569615730?amount=20&contactdata=jPPKGfABzdmM220gC2oO7IQttjGBLhGJcIRzBV9SuAsnU4o2sC2t2hqHGDJ3pP0pSGEsKNnGYd0Xz672e+bfC8FV9D/DVHR4T72//WgXG6bQQyPF1x/9BUZhei5Uw2vDvSH6LDJAudbtPBUPf16eLw==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230713_FR_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_newopponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTYzNzgwMC04ZTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNrer4-rIZrjPCDmSdy5OWq-FX05Km5PQhi0Wd0bhgc=)**

* * *
**_Forwarded Message:_**

I have a campaign update I need you to see. We now have a third new opponent in our race, and this one is reportedly receiving the support of the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC).

Here’s what I know about announcements like this: The NRCC fully stepping into this race is a signal to donors and dark money groups to start spending big on attack ads against Sharice.

Just last month, the Cook Political Report confirmed that the NRCC’s top strategy for holding the House starts here in KS-03. That’s why they’ve made Sharice a top target again in 2024, and why we’ve already seen them attack Sharice’s record of working for Kansas families.

Here’s why they especially want to defeat Sharice:

**Sharice will always fight back against the nationwide assault on reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and life-saving benefits like Social Security and Medicare that millions of Americans rely on.**

It’s crucial that we re-elect leaders like Sharice to keep fighting to protect our rights, strengthen our economy, and lower costs for working families. But now that our race is really heating up, we need to prepare for whatever comes next.

**[In the first 48 hours after this announcement, will you help us show our grassroots strength? Every $20 helps us reach our goal of adding 5,000 more grassroots donations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66426111/416322161/-569615730?amount=20&contactdata=jPPKGfABzdmM220gC2oO7IQttjGBLhGJcIRzBV9SuAsnU4o2sC2t2hqHGDJ3pP0pSGEsKNnGYd0Xz672e+bfC8FV9D/DVHR4T72//WgXG6bQQyPF1x/9BUZhei5Uw2vDvSH6LDJAudbtPBUPf16eLw==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230713_FR_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_newopponent&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTYzNzgwMC04ZTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNrer4-rIZrjPCDmSdy5OWq-FX05Km5PQhi0Wd0bhgc=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: | A new opponent just joined the race, and we are expecting National Republicans to pour millions of dollars into misleading attack ads against Sharice — just like they did in 2022. Now more than ever, we need your support to rise to the challenges ahead and keep KS-03 blue in 2024. = Forwarded Message: I have a campaign update I need you to see. We now have a third new opponent in our race, and this one is reportedly receiving the support of the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC). Here’s what I know about announcements like this: The NRCC fully stepping into this race is a signal to donors and dark money groups to start spending big on attack ads against Sharice. Just last month, the Cook Political Report confirmed that the NRCC’s top strategy for holding the House starts here in KS-03. That’s why they’ve made Sharice a top target again in 2024, and why we’ve already seen them attack Sharice’s record of working for Kansas families. Here’s why they especially want to defeat Sharice: Sharice will always fight back against the nationwide assault on reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and life-saving benefits like Social Security and Medicare that millions of Americans rely on. It’s crucial that we re-elect leaders like Sharice to keep fighting to protect our rights, strengthen our economy, and lower costs for working families. But now that our race is really heating up, we need to prepare for whatever comes next. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Our opponents and their donors will do whatever they can to mislead Kansans about Sharice’s record of delivering for working families while they promote extremist politicians who will continue to attack our individual freedoms. We won’t let them. Thanks, Mohona Campaign Manager, Sharice For Congress | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Judge me by my enemies | | | Friend, My left-wing opponent Jacky Rosen has already enlisted the help of the **ENTIRE** left-wing swamp to try and defeat me. This is Captain Sam Brown, and if you thought the** Democrats were going to give me an easy race, you were sorely mistaken.** The latest establishment politician to come out against me:****[_**Hillary Clinton 's running mate Tim Kaine!**_](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=768e7c8292634bda99c5a410e94627b6&_e=6jL9jV221AH4hPO_H1BFjED12UF8UIHjA_lYttrt8E7a9aBGYdxJlis7jq5iEblVz86TwuobQQjgQBj6vu8domZ3CXf9jp2CKkJr-cZG5N2LrhFWeciZ-qfQVf-wChp9gfR15JphZ3Hg77tLwFjIn3K0ZbiMIQi9HXBxAa_wVNt5ED8klOJTXSZFX0GsycAMZCHIeEVZp01nHrJtLa10o3-rafrdRO75Q9ggiaJxb6ItjNEq03xlY6L9LhxwkuWMRmFArafkuJeFYbmFForRxdsavrviFsS2HN1yttWhnP5bYKpeeuavgN8_Vbc9QYQLa9UM6tVujeLsGm0UFAMHnKGHNsbNhvvMuYTVpqFOTtP5q_YnoiwMykJGP5163Q--QCOaq5majIj_0PJOevGLVsywJe807xHeikiZRBY4kuSt00L9sw0CvF2siVRsbMhs) The first thing I learned when I ran for Senate was that the establishment protects their own. Friend, there's an extremist in this Senate race, but it isn't me. Here are the facts: Jacky Rosen voted for Joe Biden's **ENTIRE** left-wing spending package, including an **UNPRECEDENTED** expansion of the IRS. Jacky Rosen supported **EVERY** failed Biden policy that led to our border crisis. Jacky Rosen **ENDORSED** Joe Biden for another four years as president - despite everything he's done to make life difficult for everyday Americans. **If Jacky Rosen really wants to see an extremist, she should look in the mirror.** [_**Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT to help me FIGHT BACK against the far-left 's egregious attacks?**_](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=768e7c8292634bda99c5a410e94627b6&_e=6jL9jV221AH4hPO_H1BFjED12UF8UIHjA_lYttrt8E7a9aBGYdxJlis7jq5iEblVz86TwuobQQjgQBj6vu8domZ3CXf9jp2CKkJr-cZG5N2LrhFWeciZ-qfQVf-wChp9gfR15JphZ3Hg77tLwFjIn3K0ZbiMIQi9HXBxAa_wVNt5ED8klOJTXSZFX0GsycAMZCHIeEVZp01nHrJtLa10o3-rafrdRO75Q9ggiaJxb6ItjNEq03xlY6L9LhxwkuWMRmFArafkuJeFYbmFForRxUHUt6D7vM8ZKCGIbanM4yrHdcMZRfP2Zbik_8DDPFWzHqz0w3nF3K-YHDJqKc00qAls4gheGaqeEAby6w-Z151Zx864xf-uGiXF8HgLR9_mgIXEois5JH9BktHolRHc_5WvKdUxxQAX4Tv9X7HnUzrmjTbRkNdg4ThQVaoaU6ty) I can't do this without your help, Friend. name: Mayra Flores
subject: Everyone knows it’s not really about results, it’s about power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62950435:JBFzwVIjN:m:1:3299561967:877B18F9EE0A58F14FF1ED8515B0EA9D:r "OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM
MAYRA FLORES")
---

Hi Patriot!

My name is Mayra Flores. If you don't know me, please allow me to introduce myself:

\-- My family came to America when I was six the right way: _legally_
\-- I'm a pro-border security, Pro-Life, Latina Conservative
\-- My family lives right along the southern border in Texas and my husband is a border patrol agent
\-- Last year, I won the most-watched special election in the entire country
**\-- I just launched my 2024 campaign and the latest polls have me A HAIR ahead of my Liberal opponent**

Please do not underestimate the importance of this single race. Republicans have a razor-thin Majority in the House, so everything comes down to this. _If we win this race, we will save our fragile Majority._

_**[That's why I'm calling in the cavalry.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62950435:JBFzwVIjN:m:1:3299561967:877B18F9EE0A58F14FF1ED8515B0EA9D:r "That’s why I’m calling in the cavalry.")**_

I JUST launched my campaign and I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to rally the resources we desperately need to tip the scales in this toss-up race and WIN IT ALL.

---
| | | [STAND WITH MAYRA FLORES ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62950435:JBFzwVIjN:m:1:3299561967:877B18F9EE0A58F14FF1ED8515B0EA9D:r "STAND WITH MAYRA FLORES →")
---

My Liberal opponent is receiving a flood of donations because national Democrats are desperate to stop us. **They know my very existence -- as a pro-border security, Conservative Latina -- calls their entire narrative into question. **

Look, Latinos are naturally Conservative. All the Democrats do is pander to my community and promise us the world.

But everyone knows it's not really about results, it's about power. Conservatives are the only ones _actually_ fighting for the American Dream -- and winning this race will prove it.

_**[The polls have me neck-and-neck against my Liberal opponent so any donation you can make right now will go a long way... especially because I JUST launched my campaign!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62950435:JBFzwVIjN:m:1:3299561967:877B18F9EE0A58F14FF1ED8515B0EA9D:r "The polls have
me neck-and-neck against my Liberal opponent so any donation you can make right now will go a long way... especially because I JUST launched my
campaign!")**_

I know it's a lot to ask but any amount you can spare will be greatly appreciated.

I mean it. Anything helps. So can I count on you?

For America,
Mayra Flores

---
* * *
---
|
---
| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

| | Derek, The ground game. Door-knocking. Canvassing. Phone banking. Sometimes these crucial efforts get overlooked in the chaos of social media campaigning and attack advertisements flooding the airwaves. But the ground game is how elections are won or lost. And after this troubling headline we saw a couple weeks ago: **_“Trump tops Biden for first time in Morning Consult poll”_** , we figured it was as good a time as any to remind you that **now** is the time to invest in the ground game in Virginia. The good news is, Mark is already on the job, spending his free time traveling throughout Virginia to elect Democrats statewide. But truthfully, that headline put our team a little on edge. We need to step up our ground game today to ensure that not just the General Assembly and the Senate stay blue, but that the White House does too. **_[So we’re asking, Derek, can you chip in towards our mid-month fundraising goal to help Senator Warner invest in Virginia’s ground game? We need your help to get out the vote across the Commonwealth to keep Virginia blue and send President Biden back to the White House next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66431085/416332070/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230713_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzBjZDFiNC05MjIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEs4OqoCtxoE_eYS-_KtToai1_aM2nMQ4RuuBuyyU50=)_** Thank you, Team Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66431086/416332098/-423155490?refcode=mw_em_230713_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzBjZDFiNC05MjIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEs4OqoCtxoE_eYS-_KtToai1_aM2nMQ4RuuBuyyU50=)********

subject: ICYMI: Less than four months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi there - We have less than four months until Election Day; less than four months to criss-cross the district, spread our message, and shore up our campaign resources. That’s where you come in! Will you chip in to my campaign right away to help ensure my team and I have the resources we need to win in November? It’s not even so much about the dollar amount itself - just the support and number of individual donations. [ That’s why today I’m only asking for $4 ](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/167bf9650da63642/2bece71a997a9830c3d6b838967d376c/37923)\- $1 for each month left. [Do you have $4 to spare? ](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/167bf9650da63642/bb4ae46a81556cb6c3d6b838967d376c/37923) From day one I truly wanted this to be a grassroots campaign, fueled by volunteers and individual supporters like you. With broad grassroots support, I’ll be able to handle anything Virginia Democrats throw at me - and trust me, they’ve got their eye on my district. They’d love nothing more than to flip it this November and retake the House of Delegates. Not on my watch! So what do you say? Will you contribute $4 today to fuel my campaign across the finish line in November? That’s: $1 for the rest of July. $1 for August$1 for September$1 for October [Total: $4](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/167bf9650da63642/a101639a7af849d2c3d6b838967d376c/37923) Thank you!

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66431374/416333364/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzg4ZTk3NC05MzIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nu667_0bwzfW5BduHxM2-I7KmFcfI_ga-i0H2LYsUeI=&emci=249f69b0-8a21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c788e974-9321-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, now is our moment.

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: re: July fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Here’s the situation:
#
We’ll be honest, Peter.
Supporters like you helped us close out June with another record-breaking fundraising quarter. But between the holiday last week and the summertime slowdown every campaign has come to expect around this time each year, **July hasn’t gotten off to as strong of a start as we were hoping.**
A lull in online fundraising probably doesn’t make much of a difference to politicians like Josh Hawley. In fact, just this week, a new Super PAC funded by a handful of billionaire mega-donors and corporate elites announced it had raised over $1 million to prop up his campaign + fund ads attacking Lucas.
But since Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or shady mega-donors, our grassroots campaign is relying on real people like you, responding to emails like this one, to keep building our movement and to stay prepared for the fight ahead.
**That’s why today, we’re setting a goal of raising $15,000 by July 15** — and why we’re reaching out to ask if you’ll make your very first donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to help our campaign stay on track.
**[So Peter, will you step up and add your first donation of $10 or anything at all to our grassroots campaign today? Every dollar will help us defend Lucas from the national GOP’s relentless attacks and reach every Missouri voter with his unifying message before Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34925?refcode=em20230713-3393&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3393%2E614464%2EPQaQ4F)**

Lucas and our whole team are so grateful for your support, Peter.
Let’s defeat Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s Senate seat, together.
— Team Lucas Kunce

body:
| | | Peter, It is Lisa, Finance Director for Senator Rick Scott.

Are you ready to **_DEFEND_** Florida’s Senate seat in 2024? I know I am, but our team can’t do it alone.

Our [**mid-month deadline**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b8351650a6384edbbe2fbf1eb2d3e531&_e=4bbLw7bompNiUQj48XQaeOiUVBmHv7tbHnCifNsckTWZt0rEsRuu3WFwyTKrVHdV2-PexY1fpyj247bN5_CBTwdU9ZdbVdtgZBwFKg0YBOq7ZsqkYjmbC9llELuS8ADUbye2RCExtS7wnPkaWE_ZzpJyZh_h1QFCkZlJLW4Eoqfa5MkSyzP_vtqAmjnTiSvVqRU3Y0L-VXUerOnpjGt84OQr32l96HKEzvl9UBmQ_bMuRxDIoCUlmqAIfJV14ARcjjvshnUe4_fx54p9D-YZQjh7s-gyI5ErfSYucMh7DYNS9KTGjbyuGsQWW2npL9-d0KVrCXxZ1SI8tx7xqIAuC2RbCr2X4UggkDHYekJBeFo%3D) is in just _two days_ , and we need your help to match the influx of Democrat money pouring into Florida.

Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | PLEASE NOTE THAT DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS LAUNCHED A NEWSLETTER THAT IS AVAILABLE FOR FREE. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AT [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DxMKR-dHYgZhX2grmlwXNKPl-H2Q-Rv7lzU0Hl2hpDyGj4EP7UYD_gajuGr70VXRYquXnx9IvCLui2jNZt-prElSqcd7QvYjZ8dGoCgBzs-a6whFNExOoThQPZurwMoMr2KBq7rFBUx4grIqbC64c0-yLzm5aQYT&c=S3jCGsc1kihs0CiOa0nYDzkOaa50IGUQVMWRXXUF6GQ5ueD4eFjTdg==&ch=pb2-rZUk8hCY_9EMzXGWTIA_RYd12aKIa6I7YZ5mnIR7PvAd2js-Rg==). SUBSCRIBERS WILL HAVE ACCESS TO EVERY INTERVIEW DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS CONDUCTED OVER THE PAST 3 YEARS, EVERY ARTICLE HE'S WRITTEN OVER THE PAST 12 YEARS, AND A BUNCH OF OTHER INTERESTING CONTENT. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AND HELP US SPREAD THE WORD BY TELLING OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT.
---
---
# Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research; Founder of FIRST; and Inventor Extraordinaire
---
In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Dean Kamen, founder and President of DEKA Research and founder of FIRST, the world's leading nonprofit advancing STEM education. He shares his story from basement creator to a self-taught engineer solving some of the world's toughest problems. Dean also describes how and why he purchased buildings from Warren Buffett as well as how he modeled FIRST (For Inspiration and Recognition of Science and Technology) around the logic of sports, creating role models in science and technology. He concludes with simple advice for navigating uncertainty: work hard and don't be afraid to take a risk.
Tune in via the links below!

---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DxMKR-dHYgZhX2grmlwXNKPl-H2Q-Rv7lzU0Hl2hpDyGj4EP7UYD_pai0UVEky7fnYrFGSo0ieQE-Ec8LvZC8SyQbyYvSncNP3RFnrcMpyNrs195c42yRNqWX5mZOo3rd8RB73WgzjNLEDHNwDYZ5Q==&c=S3jCGsc1kihs0CiOa0nYDzkOaa50IGUQVMWRXXUF6GQ5ueD4eFjTdg==&ch=pb2-rZUk8hCY_9EMzXGWTIA_RYd12aKIa6I7YZ5mnIR7PvAd2js-Rg==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DxMKR-dHYgZhX2grmlwXNKPl-H2Q-Rv7lzU0Hl2hpDyGj4EP7UYD_pai0UVEky7fnYrFGSo0ieQE-Ec8LvZC8SyQbyYvSncNP3RFnrcMpyNrs195c42yRNqWX5mZOo3rd8RB73WgzjNLEDHNwDYZ5Q==&c=S3jCGsc1kihs0CiOa0nYDzkOaa50IGUQVMWRXXUF6GQ5ueD4eFjTdg==&ch=pb2-rZUk8hCY_9EMzXGWTIA_RYd12aKIa6I7YZ5mnIR7PvAd2js-Rg==).
Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. To subscribe (for free), please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DxMKR-dHYgZhX2grmlwXNKPl-H2Q-Rv7lzU0Hl2hpDyGj4EP7UYD_ltXJbmAAbtlOt3WATgF9Q_4vfb-_o3Qzh85JskB5V3ArI2lRjH2Q9qsd9vAWKBFyTgPch1ribnVCFJEBksucMo2ajLSCbSFfjPytqw5mbkU&c=S3jCGsc1kihs0CiOa0nYDzkOaa50IGUQVMWRXXUF6GQ5ueD4eFjTdg==&ch=pb2-rZUk8hCY_9EMzXGWTIA_RYd12aKIa6I7YZ5mnIR7PvAd2js-Rg==)

clean_body: Podcast, radio show, conversations... | | | | PLEASE NOTE THAT DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS LAUNCHED A NEWSLETTER THAT IS AVAILABLE FOR FREE. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AT ==. SUBSCRIBERS WILL HAVE ACCESS TO EVERY INTERVIEW DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS CONDUCTED OVER THE PAST 3 YEARS, EVERY ARTICLE HE'S WRITTEN OVER THE PAST 12 YEARS, AND A BUNCH OF OTHER INTERESTING CONTENT. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AND HELP US SPREAD THE WORD BY TELLING OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT. Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research; Founder of FIRST; and Inventor Extraordinaire In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Dean Kamen, founder and President of DEKA Research and founder of FIRST, the world's leading nonprofit advancing STEM education. He shares his story from basement creator to a self-taught engineer solving some of the world's toughest problems. Dean also describes how and why he purchased buildings from Warren Buffett as well as how he modeled FIRST (For Inspiration and Recognition of Science and Technology) around the logic of sports, creating role models in science and technology. He concludes with simple advice for navigating uncertainty: work hard and don't be afraid to take a risk. Tune in via the links below! PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND! For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times! You'll find my conversations with Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at ==. Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. name: Hearing Aid Advice
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet...
body:
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college.

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661495%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CpQBIweJ7v%2bt62Rxtn1yqA&sysid=1)
---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661496%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xSISN9l7UAPWxXE7Vn1o%2bw&sysid=1)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G4PIr%2bXv6ofx7Ma2FYLAaQ&sysid=1)
[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661496%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xSISN9l7UAPWxXE7Vn1o%2bw&sysid=1)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G4PIr%2bXv6ofx7Ma2FYLAaQ&sysid=1)

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: The numbers show: Every state is a pro-choice state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | Looking for 20,000 responders. Please be one of them! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66432538/416337307/812411409?sourceid=1050458&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MzMzBkYy05NDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrHAJkP6jrjry0CbROV3GRWBhoiVrLpw8gaNNzSCQ2M=&emci=bac330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d3c330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Iowa Republicans just passed one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country in a middle-of-the-night special session called by Iowa's anti-choice governor **_specifically to attack reproductive rights_.**

**We know most Americans oppose bans. Now, we need to know where this community stands — which means we need you, Peter. Do you approve of the Iowa ban?** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66432539/416337308/812411409?sourceid=1050458&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MzMzBkYy05NDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrHAJkP6jrjry0CbROV3GRWBhoiVrLpw8gaNNzSCQ2M=&emci=bac330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d3c330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Bad news out of Iowa, Peter.

Anti-choice Governor Kim Reynolds called a special session this week _specifically_ to restrict abortion, and she got what she wanted. In a cowardly middle-of-the-night vote, Iowa Republicans obliterated the right to choose in their state by passing one of the most extreme and restrictive abortion bans in the country.

Recent polling shows that **73% of Americans (including Republicans, and including people who live in states with bans in place) oppose abortion bans**. So-called leaders who legislate in direct opposition to those numbers are not reading the writing on the wall, and will face their constituents at the ballot box. It's as simple as that.

**We need to know where our community stands on this. We're looking for 20,000 responses, and we need you, Peter. Do you approve of abortion bans like the one passed in Iowa?** [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66432540/416337309/812411409?sourceid=1050458&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MzMzBkYy05NDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrHAJkP6jrjry0CbROV3GRWBhoiVrLpw8gaNNzSCQ2M=&emci=bac330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d3c330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Thank you for letting us know.

\- the EMILYs List team

[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66432541/416337310/812411409?sourceid=1050458&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MzMzBkYy05NDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZrHAJkP6jrjry0CbROV3GRWBhoiVrLpw8gaNNzSCQ2M=&emci=bac330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=d3c330dc-9421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) |
