name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: REMINDER: Kellyanne Conway would love to meet you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Come join us for an exclusive event with Kellyanne Conway. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12614011?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=295263f8b3&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| I hope this message finds you in great spirits. As the Chairman of the Republican Party of Nebraska, I'm delighted to share some exciting news with you.

We are privileged to welcome Kellyanne Conway, one of the most influential figures in American politics, to our upcoming NEGOP+ Booster Event and State Central Committee Meeting on August 18/19. We are incredibly excited about what will be an enriching and enlightening experience for us all.

**About Our Guest, Kellyanne Conway**
As the campaign manager for President Donald J. Trump in 2016, Kellyanne Conway etched her name in history as the first woman to successfully guide a U.S. presidential campaign to victory. She then served as Counselor to the President from 2017 to 2020, where her sharp political insights and her skills in communication were vital to the administration. We look forward to hearing from this distinguished strategist, pollster, and commentator.

**About the Event**
This event is a part of our ongoing commitment to engage our community in meaningful dialogues about the future of our Republic. To join us at this exclusive gathering, we request a **[minimum membership of NEGOP+ Basic Level If you haven't fulfilled this requirement yet, you can do so here.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=32a7ee7fa1&e=25844e23a8)**

Looking forward to your participation in making this event a grand success.

Best Regards,
---
| Eric Underwood
Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=49ad6d3d73&e=25844e23a8)**

clean_body: Come join us for an exclusive event with Kellyanne Conway. | | | | | | | Peter, | I hope this message finds you in great spirits. As the Chairman of the Republican Party of Nebraska, I'm delighted to share some exciting news with you. We are privileged to welcome Kellyanne Conway, one of the most influential figures in American politics, to our upcoming NEGOP+ Booster Event and State Central Committee Meeting on August 18/19. We are incredibly excited about what will be an enriching and enlightening experience for us all. About Our Guest, Kellyanne Conway As the campaign manager for President Donald J. Trump in 2016, Kellyanne Conway etched her name in history as the first woman to successfully guide a U.S. presidential campaign to victory. She then served as Counselor to the President from 2017 to 2020, where her sharp political insights and her skills in communication were vital to the administration. We look forward to hearing from this distinguished strategist, pollster, and commentator. About the Event This event is a part of our ongoing commitment to engage our community in meaningful dialogues about the future of our Republic. To join us at this exclusive gathering, we request a Looking forward to your participation in making this event a grand success. Best Regards, | Eric Underwood Chairman Republican Party of Nebraska | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

name: Jacky Rosen via Blue Amp Action
subject: re: McConnell’s handpicked candidate
body:
I needed to reach out directly: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc612d816-3a98-4369-b9ec-758f6700010c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | I needed to reach out directly, Peter: GOP extremist Sam Brown just launched his campaign to defeat me here in Nevada. Mitch McConnell handpicked him because he knows Brown will be his rubber stamp in the Senate, voting for anything including a national abortion ban. I’m fighting as hard as I can to defend my seat from a GOP takeover, but I can’t do it alone. [Will you chip in $5 or more now to split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action's to help me keep Nevada blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5613bee-0e70-430f-b7c5-ce3efbb0a444/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T172aa67d-9784-4d1d-9587-1827adff5aa8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With experts at FiveThirtyEight saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, McConnell and his GOP allies are coming after me as a top target. Now, The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – and a recent poll shows me 2 points down. This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, Peter. I simply cannot compete with the GOP’s massive war chest unless supporters like you chip in. In a race this close, every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing – so please, I’m humbly asking: [Will you chip in $5, $10, or as much as you can spare to split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action? I’m counting on your urgent support to keep Nevada and the Senate blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49b20eda-1b84-4e8b-ad27-bdb19d9ce502/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71800cf2-a86d-4cf4-b55a-4da777348478/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: American Update
subject: Trump Hosts ‘Sound of Freedom’ Screening with Jim Caviezel
body:
And Tucker Carlson To Host First GOP Forum: Will Trump's Attend?

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661413%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bZq8e8olRi0N3IGnmLMXjg&sysid=1 Trump Hosts ‘Sound of Freedom’ Screening with Jim Caviezel

At his Bedminster club in New Jersey, the former President, Donald Trump, is making preparations to host a special screening of the film “Sound of Freedom,” an unexpected blockbuster that brings to light the disturbing reality of child trafficking to the general public.

Friend - THANK YOU!
Thank you for believing in the power of our movement, in American greatness, and that our country's best days - despite the Democrats' every effort - are still to come.
It's because of my incredible supporters like **YOU** that even with the entire weight of Crooked Joe's corrupt DOJ coming down on me, my resolve to SAVE our country is stronger than ever.
With you at my side, Friend, we are truly UNBREAKABLE.
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=70f65ec5cbd1476e9828b3cb65515531&_e=SzeR_rWEJb-GCZd_u2fkHQ8Drn21p5g7UcqdS3w7NsCMHtObZay-AP-4DszZiQqocFO_SGJS1jWczbT6_XtARvieTCy-ltv9vzJNhEanziFMrTvycinrafWHMve08SvNML7hPNGciwKbO4Lv50k0yXF8cYJJSwvNrRCMePbuzxAaDK4iJ21QnoCv6cSylWzX_Mo1Dy5rkgS8lWPabrVPnFcyHyPAKx4Kdn_c1EMyLBrspxME6Fn8GW1xIfSKSmWWPPxCrPG9X0m-rEn06nN917D5sgk0JaijOlcZQVdpJeCKdeZKE5hgEnnQZPEnAFoWeEOfhEBgwvipFPuty04g0xyMm5b8ednpXfFTZft3b7YT17X6T2vW_YA7_HpRlNV2FmPsleqLvyDacu6Y_Pg045GXplisGEW5h7uH88A-BRk%3D)

But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I'll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed right beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Team Daniels
subject: Help Rocio wish her Mom a Happy Birthday!
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
It's Shamaine's Birthday, and Rocio is asking you to help her wish her Mom a HAPPY BIRTHDAY!
Friend
Let's be serious, Shamaine's daughter, Rocio, is too young to reach out to you to ask for your support for Shamaine's campaign.
But one day, Rocio will understand that her mom decided to step-up because she wanted her daughter, and all of our children, to grow up in an America where they are treated equally and paid fairly regardless of their gender identity, race, ethnicity, religion, or whom they choose to love; a country where their voice and their vote matters, and where they have more and better opportunities to build the life they want. Shamaine also wants to leave our children a world that isn’t threatened by climate change and where the water is safe to drink and the air is safe to breathe.
If you want the same things for your children, and their children, then join Rocio and all of us at Team Daniels by making a contribution to support Shamaine's campaign!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Thank you for your support!
Team Daniels
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress

Harrisburg, PA 17106

name: Leader Mitzi Epstein, Arizona Senate
subject: A Democratic majority in AZ can happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, a project of the Arizona Democratic Party
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/adlcc2024?refcode=X_emaillogo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/adlcc2024?refcode=X_emaillogo]
Friend,
When I was first elected in 2016, we had far fewer Democrats elected. It was an uphill climb to put a stop to the GOP and their priorities.
As the Minority Leader of the Senate today – I am proud to say we are two seats away from a legislative majority in my chamber. That is because of the hard work of the Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, and folks like you.
WHAT DO YOU WANT TO SEE THE AZ LEG PRIORITIZE? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/k7SB_ZulVEi5x36s7IQYiQ2]
Since I was elected, far-right members of our Legislature have only become more extreme since then. From banning books, to targeting our LGBTQ+ community, to criminalizing abortions and more, I know this is the most extreme legislature Arizona has ever seen.
We’re now asking dedicated Democratic champions like you for feedback: what do you think is the MOST important priority for Democrats heading into 2024? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/k7SB_ZulVEi5x36s7IQYiQ2]
We have to cut through the Republican noise in 2024 to win in our battleground districts, and we are grateful to have you on our team.
Thank you,
Senate Minority Leader Mitzi Epstein

We recruit and train candidates for legislative office and equip their campaigns with the infrastructure and resources to win.

name: Bill Spadea
subject: [LIVE SOON] Common Ground Podcast
body:
Peter, Bill is still on the trail, so we will be airing another encore episode of the Common Ground Podcast at 4:30PM ET this
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/f4d166515c379a49ef026dedb3afa3fc/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCV1TQhvIiGieYg6h-lQS-u6rKNk4n9vrfBU0HXme9_jjUAoC0lJBQHc6cGYBxZoLLniKClqJBXl68v8teu5Fggub7FuOgXB-DW8APPZZT6zgAaFBjnswyhN8viUJXlqSFVo0_Gfx3E2i2e7C5MMpumnGGtO2964WwhIdzgvqrhZRUctDH8lUm1g22VT1428mBJZrUrRnW3BezSCQimU1Wd9isNbMz0BFJBi1w==)
---
| Peter, Bill is still on the trail, so we will be airing another encore episode of the Common Ground Podcast at 4:30PM ET this afternoon.
Key topics of the stream will be **corruption in Hollywood, dead whales, and a Misinformation Act that is being pushed on your kids.**
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO WATCH AN ENCORE SHOWING OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST (STARTS AT 4:30PM ET)](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/3ce878807ba6f33bcabae3863196e03b/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0t-JYQ7kZBBcxG1DnMeNaTjMD4lE_97Y4WrgrbvnXsudwRCWUhiHEK408PzfLBAYymUQElxI6koX18vWLu-a0El5C3RTacgHL-GF2A-u17gWECDQoMc9lGcsjw5ZSxPDakKbTr-8zjOZvFsdxHLYJp-irEWtO2Nu4WQdIfzIi7MKjrqyvBXItWGtl02dd3IiymRfFVW3dmuRI9GUCiFkn_Wpzi8NdMTEvpi1Q==)
---
|
---
| The episode being streamed today features incredible lineup of special guests including **Congressman Jeff Van Drew, Actress Leigh-Allyn Baker, and Dr. Ben Carson.**
---
|
---
| **Leigh-Allyn Baker** is an actress who starred in such shows as Charmed, Will & Grace and Good Luck Charlie. She gave up a successful Hollywood career and moved from California to Tennessee for freedom. She now spends much of her time as an advocate for parental rights and freedoms for all. **Congressman Jeff Van Drew** has been representing the New Jersey Congressional District 2 since 2019. Van Drew’s district includes many shore towns and he has been on a mission to halt the offshore wind projects until research disclosing the impacts on our environment and the fishing industry is completed. Ocean life is being put at risk as our Governor and President force through their Green New Deal policies, without giving full consideration to their real-world impacts. We have seen a complete lack of transparency from New Jersey's leaders, as well as D.C. politicians who are ramming through these projects in order to push their climate agenda." **Dr. Ben Carson** , Founder and Chairman of the American Cornerstone Institute and the former Secretary of the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development in the Trump administration, has recently gained media attention with his concerns on the passing of the bill requiring for all K-12 students undergo a "media literacy" training program each year to combat disinformation and "sustained attacks" on "our democracy." Carson’s article in the Washington Examiner explains the dangers of this law, signed by Governor Phil Murphy. Free speech is facing new attacks in California and New Jersey.
**Make sure you don't miss out on tis all-star lineup of guests,** [**click here to access a powerful encore of the Common Ground Livestream now (we'll be live right at 4:30PM EDT),**](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/dc5265fa5dff309db3e751f5ca88c235/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0t-BuFOJEQ0F1HrsPFRQzozjE_JxP_eWFGbgrbvnXsudwRCUQpKKwjhSjfP88ECjYwrjoJiKahkj6-3DFzftaDm4pJo2SkIx6_hNzCfXS9YWUCDQoPstlGcpUVyyNMiM6Qqten4z-M4H896E6U5TNNPMTac1r1xtxCS7nBeVHGziva6NvyZSLWhbTPZNFKcTImoFqzujnbNezSCUikU1Wt9hsNTM90BGIZi3A==) Bill
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/11057964/22c37129a0e2a9b7) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8ULbje0gBil6_G4fJWC-VmhTCBz3pcFNySjJmsQ0r-hVLF0L2q-70beQa1Q9oJnTMOBkCrcbJJmzjmTAzirVaCyIQ45nKo2Lecwm6UrRXYs-5gNvCRVlEsZ6Irr5ROUMTR_qCvax0l3R9KwOc7v1JnGlM4MfISLlJr2TnO5U5pontiuww_1tW7XJsvxTWBHnX4nYeZ8JgYIoLalNkiKqwWatieWh0nHee29IdqCvZjeYswH3fL-8jdHsE8n-LlAOtqj6n_LayovF7a44_VJ2OM8FvoHdrJakRlH0hUGEyZfz4qDrn7ROtx-fophpCeX9p5q_tmPD-3cLqGK-_3GMZS8/3xu/oqSWhY5zSjC4MQjFwAHG-w/h0/4m1rho428niBcLvlRVRZGpX6nAMXEwjt8sbzeYQqpSs) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAnWMeGQRTWwg9hmIWTfqeDzOaUkg2xHb5RXAB52CeRAliRiz-wVkmWnJUoBunfm2AKK_xj0SOs8XqkY_ZKSxzp4uJCAxW6fnQzGEZqPkD2i0DF9x2qsGVQHdNewMKRGnlrR5mnOYcyYrbZitVzt9Vx5dZzq1xZod8eeJUuHz7Zhxa7fx_00RSFmfXTy-mcpN62ayKNGGCeXcgT2U4nzeUP16U0MucTNWRGXaf4hAF_qlB1MtPSc_CaFIS8HwEBjP4N5NzN4jCp9Z4GOWugtOgLBWsHDNDNmlWqk16oeHuoxzzNncrKPa4Z_ky92hxd_oZwn6APtK4F4c14EpuCXRhKhqyu_uk1Uczbw6HE1vOA49xeRw-6kiyepBYV-LJdPI0/3xu/oqSWhY5zSjC4MQjFwAHG-w/h1/cFV1gsQ-uQ4cXG89g1C_qJ0fYz_CdYLpkMwgmLofnvM) **“We love you, Barbara. We think you would make a great senator. But Adam Schiff, he just looks like a senator.”**

Peter, I can’t tell you the number of times I’ve heard this on the campaign trail.

And I’ll be honest, it breaks my heart. Like Adam, I have served in Congress for over 20 years. I’ve sponsored over 600 bills. I’ve brought tens of millions of dollars home to California to build affordable housing, create good-paying union jobs, address the climate crisis, and provide housing for the unsheltered.

**The difference? Adam is a white man, and I am a Black woman.**

You see, since 1789 there have only been two African American women elected to the Senate — Vice President Kamala Harris and former Senator Carol Moseley Braun — who, together, served a total of 10 years. Maybe that’s why when people think about what a Senator looks like, they don’t think of a black woman. Well guess what? I think it's past time we change that. So whenever someone tries to tell me that a Black woman with all the experience I bring to the table can't win — I just smile and say, "Watch me."

**We can win this fight, Peter — but it's not going to be easy. Black women candidates on average raise just _one-third_ as much money as white women — a metric that has become painfully clear in the fundraising deficit in this race. That's why I'm reaching out: I need to raise another $10,000 by midnight to overcome these hurdles and pull ahead, and I’m counting on your help to get there.**

[If you’re ready to help me win this race so I can become just the third Black woman elected to the Senate and build a progressive future for all of us, will you split a donation between myself and The Collective PAC now?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAnWMeGQRTWwg9hmIWTfqeDzOaUkg2xHb5RXAB52CeRAliRiz-wVkmWnJUoBunfm2AKK_xj0SOs8XqkY_ZKSxzp4uJCAxW6fnQzGEZqPkD2i0DF9x2qsGVQHdNewMKRGnlrR5mnOYcyYrbZitVzt9Vxz1Fg6dBKfiYaaN6CzIR-K9R4lQ0PTDz4Q8v27r28OhFhkqHwJZ2zxlSsLhl9LYBpk6EPdbgmSU1YeMVIOkYPqA2RPy9WSMUvusprkSmFYgQtRKdC_dJfxRokkuy77EYLkMhh3PuGFbFieqN9FavC_QXvn6NOap_1QdQ7-mWG7NjouQcJZctKuLFLPlEp6G9wM7oL63v7-Zlo-wRY4BoRqZ6GxpoaLJvin5Aw_UXYbwi/3xu/oqSWhY5zSjC4MQjFwAHG-w/h2/jHkEQtDVPi3Ra6ACwxMMo8sChVHxXa8omqrr4ujGOtI)

I have _never_ backed down from a tough fight. Growing up in a world of racism and discrimination, backing down has simply never been an option for me. Because when someone doesn’t give me a seat at the table, I bring a folding chair. Just like I did at only 15 when I worked with the NAACP to integrate my high school cheerleading team and become the school’s first Black cheerleader.

Now, I’m ready to take the fight for justice to the Senate, where my lived experience as a Black woman making true progressive change for Californians will give a voice to those who are currently voiceless.

**So even if a Black woman isn’t what people think of when they think of a U.S. Senator, you can help change that. Because together, I know we can shatter this glass ceiling. But it's going to take serious resources to spread our progressive message and win, and I’m counting on you to help power this campaign forward.**

[Please, will you rush $10, split between myself and The Collective PAC to help me win in California? Every dollar you give will go directly toward fueling our progressive movement to victory.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x2n0vr6CP7mcVfNApeYaGAnWMeGQRTWwg9hmIWTfqeDzOaUkg2xHb5RXAB52CeRAliRiz-wVkmWnJUoBunfm2AKK_xj0SOs8XqkY_ZKSxzp4uJCAxW6fnQzGEZqPkD2i0DF9x2qsGVQHdNewMKRGnlrR5mnOYcyYrbZitVzt9Vx_tcQWq1Jvfny7lhrv8aCvxpij9U5rTiixritFdhlxY4dXeF_v9Q6I1c8EB_rAHx8Urb-m01KQ8FQLiBx0iIajB8uFuKbBSqMsMemMauUZJmLBozGgo_o506nZOle4641mEqTI8Z3lt57W13YYQv2z42GNRgBdAn8WUYFWZF3rgDukOKB0Gno3tU1-iJ_rPU-XHMp1U5zyOgh1YT7cQ8-4fto7WiCiy9N8Oy9rJIYc7f/3xu/oqSWhY5zSjC4MQjFwAHG-w/h3/3rFRQXBIvftSn8bGVjZvnw_hTDiJ3WlmhojnEzx_vXc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | “We love you, Barbara. We think you would make a great senator. But Adam Schiff, he just looks like a senator.” Peter, I can’t tell you the number of times I’ve heard this on the campaign trail. And I’ll be honest, it breaks my heart. Like Adam, I have served in Congress for over 20 years. I’ve sponsored over 600 bills. I’ve brought tens of millions of dollars home to California to build affordable housing, create good-paying union jobs, address the climate crisis, and provide housing for the unsheltered. The difference? Adam is a white man, and I am a Black woman. You see, since 1789 there have only been two African American women elected to the Senate — Vice President Kamala Harris and former Senator Carol Moseley Braun — who, together, served a total of 10 years. Maybe that’s why when people think about what a Senator looks like, they don’t think of a black woman. Well guess what? I think it's past time we change that. So whenever someone tries to tell me that a Black woman with all the experience I bring to the table can't win — I just smile and say, "Watch me." We can win this fight, Peter — but it's not going to be easy. Black women candidates on average raise just one-third as much money as white women — a metric that has become painfully clear in the fundraising deficit in this race. That's why I'm reaching out: I need to raise another $10,000 by midnight to overcome these hurdles and pull ahead, and I’m counting on your help to get there. I have never backed down from a tough fight. Growing up in a world of racism and discrimination, backing down has simply never been an option for me. Because when someone doesn’t give me a seat at the table, I bring a folding chair. Just like I did at only 15 when I worked with the NAACP to integrate my high school cheerleading team and become the school’s first Black cheerleader. Now, I’m ready to take the fight for justice to the Senate, where my lived experience as a Black woman making true progressive change for Californians will give a voice to those who are currently voiceless. So even if a Black woman isn’t what people think of when they think of a U.S. Senator, you can help change that. Because together, I know we can shatter this glass ceiling. But it's going to take serious resources to spread our progressive message and win, and I’m counting on you to help power this campaign forward. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for standing with me in this fight. — Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We’ve lost too many beloved orcas to corporate pollution. But our work to fight back must continue.
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
| | [ONLY 32 HOURS TO GIVE IN HONOR OF WORLD ORCA DAY ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874418?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, it’s almost World Orca Day, and I had to reach out to you in advance with a crucial update on our work to protect this majestic species, our fragile oceans and our only Earth.
**Right now, there are only 75 Southern Resident orcas left alive, and greedy corporations are pushing them to the very brink of extinction. Cruise ship pollution is wreaking havoc in the waters these orcas call home. And just one cruise ship can dump millions of gallons of toxic wastewater directly into the ocean. **

At the same time, cruise companies power their massive fleets with the dirtiest heavy fuel, **belching emissions and generating ACIDIC wastewater.** But thanks to massive investments in greenwashing, most vacationers don’t know the devastating impact of taking a cruise – and **this destructive industry is booming like never before.**
**Friends of the Earth is fighting back to protect our orcas and our planet from corporate greed and the catastrophic pollution problem it creates.** But we’ve already lost too many beloved orcas like young Ripple, playful Cappuccino and gentle Marina – and we must act before the last surviving members of their pods waste away too. **That’s why a generous group of donors agreed to MATCH every gift, dollar for dollar, up to our $90,000 World Orca Day goal so we can keep up the fight to protect our oceans from Big Polluters**** – but this opportunity expires at midnight tomorrow.**
**Because you’ve been such a committed supporter, we’re counting on your help to give us the best chance of meeting our goal. We even created a custom link so we can see your impact right away. ****Please, will you hurry now and make your gift to protect our orcas, our oceans and our only Earth? Every dollar will be DOUBLED with our limited-time match up to our $90,000 World Orca Day goal! **
| | [EARLY ORCA DAY ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874418?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Orcas are suffering, starving and being invaded by relentless industry expansion. The cruise industry is growing and bringing more mega-polluting ships into orcas’ feeding grounds and migration routes. Meanwhile, Big Oil and the shipping industry keep expanding their projects in an endless pursuit of more profit. From driving away their food supply to the deadly threat of oil spills, the consequences for our last surviving Southern Resident orcas could be dire. **But we don’t have to stand aside and let these greedy industries get away with it. **
**That's why hitting our World Orca Day goal is so crucial to struggling orcas, our organization and the sustainable future we’re fighting for. **We’re reaching out to you specifically to be one of our early-bird donors because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you donate now, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on key decision-makers and rein in greedy corporations before it’s too late.
**But time is rapidly running out, and we have to make this World Orca Day really count. So please, make your membership gift now – and have it DOUBLED – to be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our oceans and our planet while we still can. ****[Your personalized World Orca Day link is right here, so make your early-bird gift to fight back for the sake of precious ocean life now.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874418?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
| | [EARLY WORLD ORCA DAY ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874418?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Standing with you,

Marcie Keever
Oceans and Vessels Program Director
Friends of the Earth
|

That's why hitting our World Orca Day goal is so crucial to struggling orcas, our organization and the sustainable future we’re fighting for. We’re reaching out to you specifically to be one of our early-bird donors because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you donate now, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on key decision-makers and rein in greedy corporations before it’s too late. But time is rapidly running out, and we have to make this World Orca Day really count. So please, make your membership gift now – and have it DOUBLED – to be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our oceans and our planet while we still can. == | | == Standing with you, Marcie Keever Oceans and Vessels Program Director Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm suing Kaiser Permanente and I need your help
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out

| |
---
| | Dear Friend,My name is Chloe. You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znfp3ajfgtvlnh8hnmap36ppc1ebks7sfidj900o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zokp07841d9j530ek3qi0t9dvfl8o6nbm2ei9or8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2paqmsaqj3jq26herjkkscogj1tjc7vn3a4kong_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me.She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children.And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old. On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this.That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
| |
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmfk4pqbc010rhdm8h1gheumsk6gnt3o3a4vr24o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4hol3dse17n6hgiceb7e9imnvp4cn37f5dtn2f8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlukkr6b9igcq6h842omunome8rebv052ts11lq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf83iabs4ahbj51shbraubd1i8s0bhsgnf226tc8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs)
---
| | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8n4s5r3g26ibc4s7s8i7p2l77otfjt71ug3mkg8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. -Chloe
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zep7tv35ubjvi2n7e0q55l2uue8niu519t47b81g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zml5e9ho40g238qi7s7i9bvp586p2nvd9ma34e2o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9jm9pj4cdh2bs)

Friend – you might find this hard to believe when you think about the _tens of millions_ of dollars _ _ that GOP super PACs are set to spend to defeat us, **but the average grassroots donation to our campaign is just $26.**
We're mighty proud of that fact – and of the grassroots movement that we're building together. It's made up of folks like you who believe in our fight and chip in what you can, when you can.

This grassroots movement is how we're going to win a race that _NBC News_ says will be "one of the nastiest and most expensive in the country" and defend our razor-thin Senate majority.
**But here's the problem:**_The Cook Political Report_ is calling our race a toss-up – and experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say Ohio could decide Senate control. We simply cannot surge ahead and win without ALL hands on deck.
**Now, we're coming up on a midnight fundraising deadline, but we're still falling short of our $10,000 goal. If everyone reading this chipped in $26, we could reach our goal in no time – but we know not everyone will, so we're asking you, friend.**

No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. We're mighty proud of that fact – and of the grassroots movement that we're building together. It's made up of folks like you who believe in our fight and chip in what you can, when you can. This grassroots movement is how we're going to win a race that NBC News says will be "one of the nastiest and most expensive in the country" and defend our razor-thin Senate majority. But here's the problem:The Cook Political Report is calling our race a toss-up – and experts at FiveThirtyEight say Ohio could decide Senate control. We simply cannot surge ahead and win without ALL hands on deck. Now, we're coming up on a midnight fundraising deadline, but we're still falling short of our $10,000 goal. If everyone reading this chipped in $26, we could reach our goal in no time – but we know not everyone will, so we're asking you, friend. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for being part of our grassroots movement. Team Sherrod Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work. Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you. = Thank you! = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

body:

Friends,
Hey, it’s Adam Schiff. I’m reaching out to you personally because I want you to join me in supporting Democrat Josh Riley and Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
If you have been following my work, then you know that I am deeply concerned about the future of our Democracy and our country. We cannot allow right-wing extremists to hijack our Democracy, and undermine the values and ideals that make us who we are as Americans. We just can’t.
That’s why electing pro-Democracy, pro-Rule of Law candidates like Josh Riley to maintain our House Democratic Majority is so critical.
Friend, Josh’s race in Upstate New York is among the most competitive in the entire country. The Hill has named it one of seven races that could determine control of the House, and the Cook Political Report is naming it a TOSS-UP.
This is a monumental opportunity for Josh’s people-powered movement to prove its strength before the election. Can I count on you to split $25 between Josh’s campaign and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Thank you for stepping up at this critical moment,
Congressman Adam Schiff

name: Left Action Petition
subject: Add your name: Disqualify Trump from the 2024 ballot >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Use the 14th Amendment to disqualify Trump from the 2024 ballot >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9a9b1fb-5d24-45be-b183-4e1bc33eb9b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34829fdc-d40b-4939-83bc-c78e41bdcbbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The thought of Trump spending another four years in the White House is terrifying – it would spell the end of our democracy. And even though he’s under investigation for several of his crimes and facing dozens of federal counts, he’s still the Republican 2024 frontrunner. [But the 14th Amendment should disqualify Trump from running again, and states should use it to keep him off the ballot.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f6926a0-8909-40c8-8c70-c3c704c612ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Secretaries of state are responsible for certifying eligibility of candidates who appear on the ballot, and under the 14th Amendment, they could – and should – disqualify Trump from running because of his involvement in the Capitol insurrection. See Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, "No person shall be a Senator or Representative in Congress... or hold any office...who, having previously taken an oath...to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the [Constitution]." [We need state governments to make this happen – sign your name to tell state officials: Disqualify Trump from the 2024 ballot! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23f94be6-26cb-4c2d-9618-06bc9c2c3e67/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95b609ec-fa80-4c9b-9863-4b4091c5886c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T379b805a-9c3d-4374-b6f8-7dcc085310e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta497ebc1-9b7f-4f8d-968f-7cdb07ae5bed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51541554-94d2-40b6-b656-dafa666d537b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19fd2f7f-247e-41bb-bfac-02425baf5448/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

name: Eagle Publishing
subject: Closing: The secret to seven-figures in 8 months [Outrageous but True]
body:
My investors just completed a third straight $1 million year.

| | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Fellow Investor,

My investors just completed [a third straight $1 million year](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4th4tiu6ca9daobhog49rfqqa88dao9mp0gha78_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge0oj4c3h2bs).

Had you been with us, each year you could have started with a mere $5K...

And nine months later, walked away with a cool million. Each year, from 2020 through 2022.

Last year was special. It took just eight months.

So now we’re going to do it a fourth and final time.

Why is it going to be our final time?

Because the previous years were beta tests.

In short, we’ve tweaked and optimized the system for three straight years.

And while it still made $1 million in 2022, even as the markets crashed...

I’ve got some fine-tuning to do to make us _more money, even faster_.

[So we’re going to need 87 new beta testers](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0sf3r7o6rav60knqjithdbq6el6m5ct7r2rnr18_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge0oj4c3h2bs).

All you need is a cellphone, $5K in a brokerage account, and [this amazing trading strategy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2mrbc4o667lo8880nlc2n6rkiccanefgdgpp3o8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge0oj4c3h2bs).

It’s the only way I’ve ever seen newbie traders easily bank $1 million in 8 months.

[Click here to apply for one of the 87 beta tester spots before they’re gone.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqgss14hkprd7ta9pqfd73hgnlda9j2fheiujcm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge0oj4c3h2bs)

Donald J. Trump July 13th, 2023
_President Trump will be joined at the screening by Eduardo Verástegui, Jim Caviezel and Tim Ballard._
**Bedminster, NJ —** President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will host a screening of the film Sound of Freedom at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster on July 19, 2023. The screening will be attended by club members and supporters.
Sound of Freedom [grossed $41.7 million](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kEtPxCAUhX8N3dHA5dF20YXjpJtJJu407ipcLEqHBhhx_r2pr919fDnn5MzrFry7jaQ7EIDF20wAiLgjACd5eDrr0-PpSM_PDxs9aiXr_oV7AlBuG_6jvyotrrMP-7U7NnZU4DhrcOS6H0BrxXmzjMwiH2YFvTAGNSrTO8MGI40egDMtGj8CA8E6LriWXOoWejMb7LThQw9CciKZxfwenY2XOdi3kq7r1pq4NmFcStnyd6aJwFRrbZcYwq3GaBNuMRVMO0lgWuOHx_w30AvWfcnxerE0OuoSoo0rfYmfNDrnDdIfsCw4F0yZchBKCRAKCExNGu1WfQg-645I9roXsTt9BQAA__9LGmwD) in the first week of its release and [opened at No. 1](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kEtPxCAUhX8N3dHA5dF20YXjpJtJJu407ipcLEqHBhhx_r2pr919fDnn5MzrFry7jaQ7EIDF20wAiLgjACd5eDrr0-PpSM_PDxs9aiXr_oV7AlBuG_6jvyotrrMP-7U7NnZU4DhrcOS6H0BrxXmzjMwiH2YFvTAGNSrTO8MGI40egDMtGj8CA8E6LriWXOoWejMb7LThQw9CciKZxfwenY2XOdi3kq7r1pq4NmFcStnyd6aJwFRrbZcYwq3GaBNuMRVMO0lgWuOHx_w30AvWfcnxerE0OuoSoo0rfYmfNDrnDdIfsCw4F0yZchBKCRAKCExNGu1WfQg-645I9roXsTt9BQAA__9LGmwD) in Texas, Florida, and Arizona theaters. The feature has taken the nation by storm, [beating out Disney’s Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM1uqzAQhZ_G7IzwYGxYsLi5EZtIUXetujP2ODjFP8JOad6-oqq6_b7RnKOjfFqdfY5EngjA4kwmAKT9RwAu_PR2FZfXy5le318SPYuO74eF_wSgPBP-nf5-qdErtx5UniszdmBZU-HIRD-AEB1j1TKK2epZo5Fibg3jVnHNrOBDP3QamJSVG6GBtpGsZYIzLmrotdIohWZDDy1nhDcG80e0Jga1mnvZHj7VOvpqHZdSUv7pNBGY9n2vbfwKuOfDE5g8GqcITDk-gqHRUrshmujpjDp6zLTERG9bzNmFG70_1iflZaE-fjqkM6pyYBeMU0HRewyYq200aXfr6rKQhDe3Y4Ij7TsAAP__JwJsKQ) in July 4th movie ticket sales despite appearing in far fewer theaters, securing the top position in the box office for the day. The film which is being distributed by Angel Studios, was produced by Mexican filmmaker Eduardo Verástegui and stars Jim Caviezel.
Verástegui who was previously appointed a member of President Trump’s Advisory Commission on Hispanic Prosperity and who has continuously advocated for a strong and vital bilateral relationship between the U.S. and Mexico, emphasized the importance of coming together as a society to address this pernicious evil and eradicate child trafficking.
The film is based on the true story of federal agent Tim Ballard’s mission to save children from child sex traffickers in Colombia. Liberal media outlets like the New York Times, Los Angeles Times, and The Hollywood Reporter have refused to review the film, while publications like [Rolling Stone](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kLGO3CAQQL8Gd1gwxuAtXOSyolnplC5ROgzjM1kMFrBx_PcRUXTtzNObpzH7Efx6zUS9EYDNu0IAyPCFADzE2493-fj-uNP3n98OepejONsWvhKAeh34if639LgbH9pU3Ts3j7By1uHM5XQDKUfOu20WfOEczc0MjknnlBmVm5SdxCKBcYmdn4HBwBQfuBRcyB4maywqafltgkFwIpjD8kyrS9EE96vm1370Nu1dmLdaj_KvSRPQ53n2S0ZfF5NrIwhojBVzNT7uGCsB3Y4R0EwR0JwR0DmF4OMHLTVFpDWbsmGhJb2io2mla0Z0aad7ss9Cf3s8MRfq0hmPYK5CizUBG2g3Hxwt-Kc51tXbZ7P66F6l5ouA7vLsjtOH4ItURLCP9rxW-TcAAP__qH9_bg), [Washington Post, CNN, and The Guardian](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kEGPmzAQhX-NuRnZY7DJgUPTyJdIUW-tejN4HNyAjcykiH-_YrXa68yn9z49t6xzDEfPzJUBTNFvDICpHwzg3lz_PPT99_3GH39_rfym22Y_v_CTAdCx4jf6lVLj4uJ8Xs2t8n0LQYoKe6m7C2jdSllN_TAqbXxrBhdaZboQuuCUUuIiWq0VtlXsQYASRiqpG9noGrrRjWj0KC8dqEayRnjcXjn4nNzs_1F5L2s95qWa-4lo3T6dLAO773s9FIw0uEInwcBiIizkYlowEQN7ljGwwjCwUjCwKc-EfHU0IcWRL-ij447Ija-N58S3_E6e58BDQfR54b7E_5j4cPAhPjOVg7vkeUBXGNiq9H7d4zzHTRvWiOe50KnyEQAA__9YA3QS) have trashed the film and mocked the millions of movie-goers who purchased tickets to screenings.
In his first month in office, [President Trump said ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM2OnDAQhJ_G3Bq5G2PMgUM2Iy4jrXJLlEtk_DM4a2yEvUHz9hGjKLdWdVXpU-ltj8E_Jza8MaI12MKIWPeFEd3F2493ef9-v8H7z2873GQvzutLXxlRfe7uv_VfS-s2HeKlDrfGTj155I2bUKqRpOwRm3XSNGhhLe8NmkGNZEdnHQrOzei1XJYmTMSp4wN2KAUK2ZIy2rhBGhwVdQKZ4NaVj-xtTjra3_X43PbW5K2J01rrXl5MM6P5PM_21GUN6VFz2nOpl43RnPeQQk6F0VxXB68G0HYLKZR66BpyglCg6o-QHrDkaEGbl1ozmLwtusIVdH9ChOxh_dx0gnpo74O5Moxm4qgYzYjXPTKaO0coVW_AC0RAdAoUtxz84HAUyva9F79KzcezXesWm2Oy-xliDEUOTPDHte3F_zcAAP__jQCG4w)he was “prepared to bring the full force and weight of our government” to end human trafficking, and [signed an executive order ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM2OnDAQhJ_G3Bq5G2PMgUM2Iy4jrXJLlEtk_DM4a2yEvUHz9hGjKLdWdVXpU-ltj8E_Jza8MaI12MKIWPeFEd3F2493ef9-v8H7z2873GQvzutLXxlRfe7uv_VfS-s2HeKlDrfGTj155I2bUKqRpOwRm3XSNGhhLe8NmkGNZEdnHQrOzei1XJYmTMSp4wN2KAUK2ZIy2rhBGhwVdQKZ4NaVj-xtTjra3_X43PbW5K2J01rrXl5MM6P5PM_21GUN6VFz2nOpl43RnPeQQk6F0VxXB68G0HYLKZR66BpyglCg6o-QHrDkaEGbl1ozmLwtusIVdH9ChOxh_dx0gnpo74O5Moxm4qgYzYjXPTKaO0coVW_AC0RAdAoUtxz84HAUyva9F79KzcezXesWm2Oy-xliDEUOTPDHte3F_zcAAP__jQCG4w)directing federal law enforcement to prioritize demolishing the criminal organizations behind forced labor, sex trafficking, and child exploitation.
President Trump’s leadership resulted in a [14% increase](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM2OnDAQhJ_G3Bq5G2PMgUM2Iy4jrXJLlEtk_DM4a2yEvUHz9hGjKLdWdVXpU-ltj8E_Jza8MaI12MKIWPeFEd3F2493ef9-v8H7z2873GQvzutLXxlRfe7uv_VfS-s2HeKlDrfGTj155I2bUKqRpOwRm3XSNGhhLe8NmkGNZEdnHQrOzei1XJYmTMSp4wN2KAUK2ZIy2rhBGhwVdQKZ4NaVj-xtTjra3_X43PbW5K2J01rrXl5MM6P5PM_21GUN6VFz2nOpl43RnPeQQk6F0VxXB68G0HYLKZR66BpyglCg6o-QHrDkaEGbl1ozmLwtusIVdH9ChOxh_dx0gnpo74O5Moxm4qgYzYjXPTKaO0coVW_AC0RAdAoUtxz84HAUyva9F79KzcezXesWm2Oy-xliDEUOTPDHte3F_zcAAP__jQCG4w) in human trafficking convictions in 2017 over the prior year. In 2017, President Trump’s Director of National Intelligence [raised the issue of human trafficking to a top priority](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM2OnDAQhJ_G3Bq5G2PMgUM2Iy4jrXJLlEtk_DM4a2yEvUHz9hGjKLdWdVXpU-ltj8E_Jza8MaI12MKIWPeFEd3F2493ef9-v8H7z2873GQvzutLXxlRfe7uv_VfS-s2HeKlDrfGTj155I2bUKqRpOwRm3XSNGhhLe8NmkGNZEdnHQrOzei1XJYmTMSp4wN2KAUK2ZIy2rhBGhwVdQKZ4NaVj-xtTjra3_X43PbW5K2J01rrXl5MM6P5PM_21GUN6VFz2nOpl43RnPeQQk6F0VxXB68G0HYLKZR66BpyglCg6o-QHrDkaEGbl1ozmLwtusIVdH9ChOxh_dx0gnpo74O5Moxm4qgYzYjXPTKaO0coVW_AC0RAdAoUtxz84HAUyva9F79KzcezXesWm2Oy-xliDEUOTPDHte3F_zcAAP__jQCG4w) for America’s intelligence agencies. In 2018, President Trump made history as the first president to participate in the President’s Interagency Task Force to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons.
As President, Donald J. Trump took historic steps to end human trafficking and protect the innocent. In January 2020, President Trump recognized the 20th Anniversary of the Trafficking Victims Protection Act and [signed an Executive Order](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kMGumzAQRb_G7EB4MAYWLPoasYn01F2r7ow9hmmwjfAkUf6-ImrfbnTPzOjomrBv5F-j6D4EwEouCwDRfBMAV_Xx61Nff14v5efvH3t50a16nhS-CwB-7fi1-u9LhcHQdqbdpXBjC17WBY5S9wNo3UpZrCP2Wg89dgO2czsr8LXXnYG6H6QcpLQFjVBDU3eykVpJpSvorbHYaSuHHholhaod5lvyLkWzuT983MNe2RSKbVyZ9_x2mgRMb_JciXFN94yVOexKD8zVkh4Cpvkg9BSXXGY2jAEj5_9XpXGBImU-DFOKpU0hEDO6c5oNU1zK9R5MLPkw3pO9ncl-JEb7hhRjshhZwFQco9uftG2UdSdUvZwtncJ_AwAA___2nHph) on Combating Human Trafficking and Online Child Exploitation in the United States, creating the first ever White House position solely dedicated to combatting human trafficking.
In 2019, [President Trump invited Tim Ballard to the White House](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j0Fr8zAMQH-Nc2uxZEVODj58_UIugTLYoGM3x3YXb84aGneh_364jN2Ennjo2XlJ8Xw3Qh8E4hT9KhCF-icQBzq8Hnk4Dd3u-Pa07DquaSsU_wvEfF_C3-mvZR9mG1PZ6q7ypsYzyCoY4KZF5hqgmgyPbmxH69kFsiwVA1v2zaisDs4qWUWDEpXUoIAJiPfYOOuCZgdtg4pAkPRh_byc_eXLJv-Rr7d52bvLXCUz5bysj596gX3eYs7hWpjA_hRTerbf4WUKw6OzX7PNtzIAayZoqUaFRMQoG6H6VagOZXU1ftliSnFlLUi-l8ai_AkAAP__CZFbuQ) to share his experiences and highlight the importance of President Trump’s border wall. President Trump built over 450 miles of robust border wall and instituted strong immigration policies like Title 42 to thwart these horrific crimes from occurring across America’s southern border.

Trump July 13th, 2023 President Trump will be joined at the screening by Eduardo Verástegui, Jim Caviezel and Tim Ballard. Bedminster, NJ — President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will host a screening of the film Sound of Freedom at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster on July 19, 2023. The screening will be attended by club members and supporters. Sound of Freedom in the first week of its release and in Texas, Florida, and Arizona theaters. The feature has taken the nation by storm, in July 4th movie ticket sales despite appearing in far fewer theaters, securing the top position in the box office for the day. The film which is being distributed by Angel Studios, was produced by Mexican filmmaker Eduardo Verástegui and stars Jim Caviezel. Verástegui who was previously appointed a member of President Trump’s Advisory Commission on Hispanic Prosperity and who has continuously advocated for a strong and vital bilateral relationship between the U.S. and Mexico, emphasized the importance of coming together as a society to address this pernicious evil and eradicate child trafficking. The film is based on the true story of federal agent Tim Ballard’s mission to save children from child sex traffickers in Colombia. Liberal media outlets like the New York Times, Los Angeles Times, and The Hollywood Reporter have refused to review the film, while publications like , have trashed the film and mocked the millions of movie-goers who purchased tickets to screenings. In his first month in office, was “prepared to bring the full force and weight of our government” to end human trafficking, and federal law enforcement to prioritize demolishing the criminal organizations behind forced labor, sex trafficking, and child exploitation. President Trump’s leadership resulted in a in human trafficking convictions in 2017 over the prior year. In 2017, President Trump’s Director of National Intelligence for America’s intelligence agencies. In 2018, President Trump made history as the first president to participate in the President’s Interagency Task Force to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons. As President, Donald J. Trump took historic steps to end human trafficking and protect the innocent. In January 2020, President Trump recognized the 20th Anniversary of the Trafficking Victims Protection Act and on Combating Human Trafficking and Online Child Exploitation in the United States, creating the first ever White House position solely dedicated to combatting human trafficking. In 2019, to share his experiences and highlight the importance of President Trump’s border wall. President Trump built over 450 miles of robust border wall and instituted strong immigration policies like Title 42 to thwart these horrific crimes from occurring across America’s southern border. | | Will Hurd wants to _**tackle the issues** _that keep him up at night, fellow American. Our country isn't safe thanks to Joe Biden's inaction at the southern and northern borders and Donald Trump's empty promises. Our law enforcement at both are saying the same thing: _"We need help."_ Will is the ONLY presidential candidate to visit the northern border. It's time to stop grandstanding and actually put words into action.
---
|
---
The truth is – the situation at our southern border is a major threat to our homeland security and the opioid crisis. So what do we do about it? _**Will's Common Sense Solutions →**_
* _Achieve operational control of the border_
* _Enforce the existing definition of asylum_
* _Pool our federal resources to help struggling countries build an economic plan and address the root causes of immigration_
* _Streamline LEGAL immigration_

Basically, it comes down to the need to enforce our laws, help our Central & South American allies address the lack of economic opportunity, and tackle real immigration reform. **Will represented the largest border district Congress and he knows what needs to be done to secure it.** [_**Contribute your first $1 or more to Will to help him put these solutions to work.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=e484ae054e4642cc93462e6ff9427d07&_e=zfwUhErmiozlSRoPsllT20gjqOaBCwnInemwKtuR7CN9afiguQn45boGoYkFNS-_4zoh1HLNwJp9RTGtrW0bPAI6aZvcK-hiChEp-jDW7i3TXxzZ-I-IbYt2Qm7uY9qJ2d-yX3LX9XGbckLEP_KEtjcRPKTerad-mZGwVyJglkfoVERmkISfTjiCNRoYhYQ2tQ2YlKLbRVrJFJmtDq2CgJI26ixHRtBwYy_lWtwf0T1mzlqS3nQntKaV_xzF7vlpcEGk2y8iXJTcJYpq0i27x7ukU_4FrIvUhH538e8rhP0P5O_CuVoEr00h4X3bi4YNoa7LdyFD-Pofiry31Mc2HERzlqi5aSKZjsVHt4ssbriht1oxx5fAxitrg4KqgGBv)

clean_body: Focus on the Issues...| | | | | Will Hurd wants to tackle the issues that keep him up at night, fellow American. Our country isn't safe thanks to Joe Biden's inaction at the southern and northern borders and Donald Trump's empty promises. Our law enforcement at both are saying the same thing: "We need help." Will is the ONLY presidential candidate to visit the northern border. It's time to stop grandstanding and actually put words into action. | The truth is – the situation at our southern border is a major threat to our homeland security and the opioid crisis. So what do we do about it? Will's Common Sense Solutions → Achieve operational control of the border Enforce the existing definition of asylum Pool our federal resources to help struggling countries build an economic plan and address the root causes of immigration Streamline LEGAL immigration Basically, it comes down to the need to enforce our laws, help our Central & South American allies address the lack of economic opportunity, and tackle real immigration reform. Will represented the largest border district Congress and he knows what needs to be done to secure it. It's going to require Republicans and Democrats to come together to solve this problem. It will take courage, but isn't that what America is all about? Will believes that the country is not as divided on this issue as D.C. politicians would have you believe. Thank you,Team Hurd for America P.S. Your $1+ donation will make sure a common sense voice qualifies for the first GOP debate. Let's make it happen! | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

It's no secret that “anti-Trump” (but still hard-right) Republicans have been struggling recently to gain ground in the presidential primary — just look at how Ron DeSantis has floundered.

But now, _The New York Times_ is reporting that Rupert Murdoch (owner of Fox News and a major kingmaker in Republican politics) wants **Glenn Youngkin** to enter the race.

A potential Youngkin presidential run has serious implications for Virginia politics. It could fire up Republicans across the Commonwealth and put seats like VA-10 even more in play. And more immediately, it means that Youngkin and the Virginia GOP will double down on this year’s state legislative elections. **If they gain a legislative trifecta, it would be a massive boost to any national ambitions Youngkin might have.**

**[So Jennifer is more determined than ever to fight back and hit the trail for Democrats running for the State Senate and House of Delegates. clean_body: Rupert Murdoch wants Glenn Youngkin to run for President. This has serious implications for Virginia politics. = It's no secret that “anti-Trump” (but still hard-right) Republicans have been struggling recently to gain ground in the presidential primary — just look at how Ron DeSantis has floundered. But now, The New York Times is reporting that Rupert Murdoch (owner of Fox News and a major kingmaker in Republican politics) wants Glenn Youngkin to enter the race. A potential Youngkin presidential run has serious implications for Virginia politics. It could fire up Republicans across the Commonwealth and put seats like VA-10 even more in play. And more immediately, it means that Youngkin and the Virginia GOP will double down on this year’s state legislative elections. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hate is not the curriculum my children will be taught
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I believe as a parent, we have a fundamental RIGHT to direct our children’s education and upbringing.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znu2kscqdc5go437gl8ml7akaab6naf887j1ri48_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
Friend, Let me be clear: Parents should not have to worry about what their children are learning during school hours. The fact that, as Governor of Florida, I had to get involved, is an insane commentary on how the Left is controlling children's education right now. I believe that as parents, we have a fundamental RIGHT to direct our children's education and upbringing. That is a view of the primacy of parents. This isn't a Republican view. It's not an independent view. It's not a Democrat view. This is a fundamental view for every parent, grandparent, and future parent out there. I'm the ONLY candidate in this race who has the record and will to fight for American children's innocence. _**Are you ready to join my mission to protect our kids from the Left?**_
---
| | [Donate today to join the fight](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp3a9pqr79dljv1aj54iq6ce3cjp8tjav9ehno6g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
During the COVID lockdowns, the ruling class forced masks on children and untested mRNA vaccinations on young kids, denied families the ability to visit loved ones in the hospital, shut down churches, destroyed communities, and locked children out of their classrooms. This same ruling class is now defending sexualized content in schools and encouraging children to change genders behind their parents' backs. National Democrat leaders have adopted the notion that children belong to the government. Enough is enough. _I am a parent who wants to shape a better future for my children, and this is why I have pledged to wage war on the Department of Education as President._ The Left doesn't like that we're doing this. The media doesn't like that we're doing this. But parents appreciate it. That is what matters to me. And it means we're above the target.
---
| | | | | [DONATE $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvh52qir4ioa750lqrjv4lu0hsm9v83nlprakr8g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
| | | [DONATE $25](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi813a373gar1c7o4na9jc1kljev3iukmfobjo4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
| | | | | [DONATE $47](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoknm5s7ccnis35jrde9f2ieiaf02viqpfnkd5j8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
| | | [DONATE $75](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeifs31dum0vupjh64i6nnnu7f85jnh7054c04c0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
| | [DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zckapnkr60bdrcn2c0ti0o473ifnfctgni25en8g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
**In the free state of Florida, we are not using tax dollars to teach kids to hate our country or to hate each other.** In K-12 schools, I am taking a stand against:
* Critical Race Theory
* The sexualization of children
* Gender ideology

Friend, I will fight and do battle with anybody or any institution that's seeking to rob children of their innocence. There will be no compromise on this point. I want you on my team. _Please, join me today by donating here:**[https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3t7gi7hllpbvgvb0ji3in665s8sv49cl2vcsho_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs "https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today")**_ In Freedom,
---

---

Ron DeSantis
---
| | [STAND WITH TEAM DESANTIS: DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4gs0sffopodjfbuvlnm8g10fdn9kugjbh0u4o88_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn4h2p3susifeebihpa4hn8bddijtbnputtp1vvo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge8p37c1h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
