And it means we're above the target. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | In the free state of Florida, we are not using tax dollars to teach kids to hate our country or to hate each other. In K-12 schools, I am taking a stand against: Critical Race Theory The sexualization of children Gender ideology Friend, I will fight and do battle with anybody or any institution that's seeking to rob children of their innocence. There will be no compromise on this point. I want you on my team. Please, join me today by donating here: "" In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Finance Team, Lateefah for Congress
subject: Why we joined this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
When Lateefah gets to the House of Representatives, she’ll be bringing with her all of our voices and our values.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)
California’s 12th Congressional District and the East Bay community is special, with a history of leading the progressive movement for California and the whole nation. Now, it’s incumbent on us to ensure we send a progressive champion like Lateefah to represent us in Washington, D.C.
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230713?amount=10&refcode=em20230713&refcode2=60_1163_eh6R6Q&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)**
Our diverse community knows how to organize, advocate, and effect positive change. And we joined Lateefah’s finance team because no one is more qualified to take our shared stories to Washington, no one else has showed up more and clearly dedicated their life to making sure people in power cannot ignore us, and no one else is prioritizing the lives of Black, brown, disabled, and elder folks like Lateefah.
[](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/118?t=2&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)
That’s the kind of leader Lateefah is, and **that’s why we’re setting a new fundraising goal today: $5,000 in grassroots, small-dollar donations before the end of July.** Why grassroots? Because when Lateefah gets to the House of Representatives, she’ll be bringing all of our voices and our values – not corporate PAC money – with her.
[**So what do you say****: Will you chip in any amount to help us reach our $5,000 grassroots fundraising goal and keep up our campaign to elect Lateefah Simon?**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/118?t=3&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230713?amount=10&refcode=em20230713&refcode2=60_1163_eh6R6Q&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)**
The finance teams for candidates who take big corporate PAC checks probably have an easier job than we do. But we work day in and day out to power this movement with grassroots donations big and small because that way Lateefah can fight for the people, not corporate interests, when she gets to Congress.
[**Whatever you chip in to help us reach our $5,000 goal will help us do everything we can to make sure Lateefah fights for change at a national level. Can you make a donation today?**](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/118?t=4&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230713?amount=10&refcode=em20230713&refcode2=60_1163_eh6R6Q&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)**
The best part about this job is seeing this movement grow and grow. Thanks for everything you do!!
Talk soon,
Finance Team
Lateefah for Congress
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230713&t=5&refcode2=60_1163_eh6R6Q&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=60%2E1163%2Eeh6R6Q)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

| Scott Walker was a disaster for Wisconsin, and now he’s going all in to defeat Tammy.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=566%2E35263%2EciU1hs)
**Peter — Scott Walker, the former Republican Governor of Wisconsin, recently said he wants nothing more than to defeat Tammy in 2024.** He doesn’t want to run against her though — no surprise given that Wisconsin voters sent him packing in 2018. Walker finally got the boot after eight years of rewarding wealthy donors and special interests while leaving hardworking Wisconsinites behind. Turns out, Wisconsinites didn’t want to re-elect someone who put his own political ambitions above what’s best for our state. Unlike Walker, Tammy has delivered results for working families in Wisconsin from expanding access to affordable health care to protecting marriage equality. She’s in this fight _for the people_ , not the special interests. But this is going to be a tough race, and Walker will prop up whoever the Republicans nominate. If our opponent is anything like Walker, they’ll be a threat to abortion rights, voting rights, and workers’ rights. **[Scott Walker was a disaster for Wisconsin, and he’s going all in to defeat Tammy. name: Mayra Flores
subject: I just launched my 2024 campaign and the latest polls have me A HAIR ahead of my Liberal opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Please do not underestimate the importance of this single race.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zac4v0nisjbei45pkms63ureutvvfene4pfbbi6o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o36c1h2bs "OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAYRA FLORES")
---

Hi Friend!

My name is Mayra Flores. If you don't know me, please allow me to introduce myself:

\-- My family came to America when I was six the right way: _legally_
\-- I'm a pro-border security, Pro-Life, Latina Conservative
\-- My family lives right along the southern border in Texas and my husband is a border patrol agent
\-- Last year, I won the most-watched special election in the entire country
**\-- I just launched my 2024 campaign and the latest polls have me A HAIR ahead of my Liberal opponent**

Please do not underestimate the importance of this single race. Republicans have a razor-thin Majority in the House, so everything comes down to this. _If we win this race, we will save our fragile Majority._

_**[That's why I'm calling in the cavalry.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl2pe9gt7id00b040mcre9k9nk65ac1l6cg3mcg0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o36c1h2bs "That’s why I’m calling in the cavalry.")**_

I JUST launched my campaign and I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to rally the resources we desperately need to tip the scales in this toss-up race and WIN IT ALL.

---
| | | [STAND WITH MAYRA FLORES ->](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgipjpah8d092a477sadd931li834mp8hvsnhj5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o36c1h2bs "STAND WITH MAYRA FLORES →")
---

My Liberal opponent is receiving a flood of donations because national Democrats are desperate to stop us. **They know my very existence -- as a pro-border security, Conservative Latina -- calls their entire narrative into question. **

Look, Latinos are naturally Conservative. All the Democrats do is pander to my community and promise us the world.

But everyone knows it's not really about results, it's about power. Conservatives are the only ones _actually_ fighting for the American Dream -- and winning this race will prove it.

_**[The polls have me neck-and-neck against my Liberal opponent so any donation you can make right now will go a long way... especially because I JUST launched my campaign!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z739i5062pl31o0hf11o8rp4bpuo7rqlsvq1e4jo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o36c1h2bs "The polls have me neck-and-neck against my Liberal opponent so any donation you can make right now will go a long way... especially because I JUST launched my campaign!")**_

I know it's a lot to ask but any amount you can spare will be greatly appreciated.

I mean it. Anything helps. So can I count on you?

For America,
Mayra Flores

---
* * *
---
|
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I will never stop standing up for what I know is right—even when it goes against the grain of public opinion.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziklta0hh9s7ne9ac62mpeu8mdr9137s6n98qa4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
FNAME, **The time for chirping from the sidelines is over.** Talk is ineffective, and that's why my message has been simple: **2024 is the time to put up or shut up**. As a leader, your job is to put the interests of the people you serve above your own political gain. I've done that in Florida, and I've watched the American people cry out for real leadership nationwide. I will never stop standing up for what I know is right--even when it goes against the grain of public opinion. The American people deserve a President with a track record of taking action and standing for what's right. The lack of action from our leaders across this country has gone on for far too long. Joe Biden has done more to damage our nation than anyone, and Kamala Harris has done nothing at all. I am DONE hearing excuses. If Republicans want to ditch the culture of losing, then it's time we try something new. In Florida, I showed the country the playbook for defeating the woke mob:
* Giving parents back their voice in the classroom by BANNING CRT and pornographic content for young kids

* STANDING UP against woke corporations who have tried to force taxpayers to fund an ESG agenda

* DEFEATING Faucism and giving back Floridians the freedom to breathe and see their families after the elites in DC shut down the country

I'm tired of seeing Republicans lose. _A_ _ren 't you, FNAME_ _?_ I promise you, with me as your candidate and President, Republicans will forget this culture of losing once and for all. To make sure we're able to achieve this, I am asking for your continued support. **[If you can, will you pitch in?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qf87uq99htalddgjub6cc98jret808nua4tncg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs "If you can, will you pitch in?")**
---
| | | | | [DONATE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9adfpdhdoc5b3et78sks9nl5qsb20mqrvh20cmo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
| | | [DONATE $47](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8il6n9a5lsi1uh7otc7fm1i7k7ui6ilcto7hhq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
| | | | | [DONATE $75](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ukchrrtc0ri4319769n31f5hv3prob2hq0hhn8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
| | | [DONATE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd6aco76f8opu4o2ifav2p4t0k7a8gfqb22364g8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
| | | | | [DONATE $150](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjm704rjm98jauqfn621sm0adep3o5dnffgibr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
| | | [DONATE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuo3mfdgqmifrkh3s00r0cggvcjuvauk56pruad8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
_The time to act is now. The time for leadership is now._ 2024 is going to be the year that our Great American Comeback takes shape. Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. We **will** fight back and WIN. I am humbly asking for your support today, FNAME. Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make.
---
| | [JOIN TEAM DESANTIS BY DONATING TODAY!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr3o3frf7grn2qigeq0df1kh9n01dkdourcd9teo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
Our Great American Comeback is attainable as long as we're willing to fight for it.

In Freedom,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z74urbbu3vrcbt89mjcvcqjgq6kgcmuhmp88kq98_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis
---
| | [STAND WITH TEAM DESANTIS: DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze8ah82vvf63penj9e1br7qm59u56j19qrn52nk0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
|
**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zis721r504dq40kschos57pem4v22pjqcqc6pifo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge4o32chh2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28882%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vD2HlwNMvCq%2fehUed8m5jQ&sysid=1 "but you only have until
midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28881%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hEDSgI%2fGjIac6a%2fODNjerQ&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28883%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wf0WS2P5W9he7JrAUFB%2bmw&sysid=1 "Renew your membership
before it’s too late ")_**

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28884%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z485rjZFnZjH1paoD%2bd55g&sysid=1 "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28895%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8FI8oMy64BMmcf8fLII98Q&sysid=1 "Are you going to renew
your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to
let your streak fade away?")_**

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28897%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5uI9bOlZATrqSAkWNWSlnQ&sysid=1 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c28898%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=thBrlbG3ajJaOTAbjtenLw&sysid=1 "Renew before it’s too late
")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

body:
Your response represents every Republican in your state.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be4710c27a0843d89bbb6e5f06656a74&_e=abYCPeJyutSfjZWG06UkaWUZpBqbjHjdbLoNe3NiXc-Xw_gVKY9s2ham1KKP9cVORNypXg7XdvzgI0UbCuY2FGeFVd0pOnKxyfV_y27TZsnpOvNACF5aLBLGlEGS-k-5UOZOtCnosxKz_gbpx0Uojwdb1-o60BhQx_I_lOIKmDHdkw_xRdQgz4FHTsVzxwW2SPfLeqG3OLbuAbAV3BekK8QcarJVGW9w1_JulBGuR0DWGkXQAGzoLxT8y9llF5m-8FxJlKKniCTbxTCPeR0y2v6j7Yc1bRi_GGxuf2u0OSak-fWoGoq9wLgWTVltDCLj524ABUrDwt_AAjZ_NhAlEdiov-dizZL5YK0VIi8eV_GOohrbDqm88Y7dugAOd68elLDftoAnL9WQFtf1tOBGI1AQqYi7zzI0hwod-mYegn_v8aLbBifidYNRChItFp1DUMjjsMYEVoap5x88XerIc7MFItW9sMZMgRl6HAR29nI%3D)

The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Friend.

**The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. **

Loyal grassroots supporters like you can be the difference between putting CONSERVATIVES back in charge to restore American greatness or potentially losing the Senate to Chuck Schumer, Adam Schiff and other radical Socialists forever.

That's why I'm asking if you will take one of the most important surveys to date: _**[The Official 2024 Presidential Canvass.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be4710c27a0843d89bbb6e5f06656a74&_e=abYCPeJyutSfjZWG06UkaWUZpBqbjHjdbLoNe3NiXc-Xw_gVKY9s2ham1KKP9cVORNypXg7XdvzgI0UbCuY2FGeFVd0pOnKxyfV_y27TZsnpOvNACF5aLBLGlEGS-k-5UOZOtCnosxKz_gbpx0Uojwdb1-o60BhQx_I_lOIKmDHdkw_xRdQgz4FHTsVzxwW2SPfLeqG3OLbuAbAV3BekK8QcarJVGW9w1_JulBGuR0DWGkXQAGzoLxT8y9llF5m-8FxJlKKniCTbxTCPeR0y2v6j7Yc1bRi_GGxuf2u0OSak-fWoGoq9wLgWTVltDCLj524ABUrDwt_AAjZ_NhAlEd5FsYx--EVz-DBR35jYzFOZfdv5C7PCo2y4EOdXFQm8jq4ygFPQM96LyrlU5_2M88sFK0BxGWbuS2w2t911Fh0xXy1TiTSv0bQ9TLYtPletvhyw5kOkN86KFJigw06Ct99OaFN7rEANrNf9q5-dFgk%3D)**_

I don't think I can stress to you just how important this is, Friend. We have ALL felt the horrible effects of the Biden-Harris "agenda," and this may be our LAST CHANCE to correct it.

We have ALL felt the horrible effects of the Biden-Harris "agenda," and this may be our LAST CHANCE to correct it. ****************************************************************************************************** Senate Republicans asked me to review responses from our top patriots in every state across the country, and YOUR answer via the Presidential Canvass has been selected for review. Please don 't wait too long before I'm forced to move on to the next patriot in your state". Thank you, Kellyanne Conway ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. subject: FORMER SHERIFF JOE ARPAIO SUES FORMER MEXICAN MINISTER OF INTERIOR AND CURRENT PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE MARCELO EBRARD CASAUBON FOR ALLEGED DEFAMATION
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0b5fb0a237e7/breaking-fbi-put-spy-inside-disabled-marines-legal-defense-team-11855756?e=8edd2b8f7d)
---
|
---
|
---
**FORMER SHERIFF JOE ARPAIO SUES FORMER MEXICAN MINISTER OF INTERIOR AND CURRENT PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE MARCELO EBRARD CASAUBON FOR ALLEGED DEFAMATION, INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS**
_Arpaio Had Demanded Public Apology for Branding Him a Murderer and Gun Smuggler To Allegedly Incite Violence Against Him_
(Palm Beach, Florida, July 13, 2023) Former Sheriff Joe Arpaio, commonly known as America’s Toughest Sheriff, has filed a complaint for alleged defamation, intentional infliction of emotional distress and civil assault by Marcelo Ebrard Casaubon, a former Mexican Minister of the Interior and current presidential candidate, for branding Arpaio as a murderer and gun smuggler, in a case styled _Arpaio v. Marcelo Ebrard Casaubon, (Case Number: 177297112, 15th Judicial Circuit, Palm Beach County, Florida)._ A copy of the complaint is embedded below and speaks for itself. Larry Klayman, the founder of both Judicial Watch and now Freedom Watch, and the latter’s current Chairman and General Counsel, had this to say upon filing suit on Arpaio’s behalf: “My client has been a fine and distinguished public servant for decades, serving not just as the Sheriff for Maricopa County, Arizona, for almost 25 years, but also in various other high government posts including the Drug Enforcement Administration. For Mr. Ebrard to publish widely in Florida, nationally and internationally that Sheriff Arpaio “promotes the assassination of migrants” to the United States, not only harms Arpaio’s reputation, but in effect is a call to violence against him by persons who would wrongly believe this. In fact, as alleged in the complaint, Arpaio has received death threats. Sheriff Arpaio initially asked Ebrard for an apology to mitigate the damage and imminent harm that was caused to him, including death threats, but was given the callous cold shoulder by Ebrard. And, when the Arpaio asked the Biden administration and its National Security Advisor, Jake Sullivan, to help to clear his name, he was ignored, as he was by Senator Krysten Sinema, who was also summoned for assistance. Now, a jury of Arpaio’s peers will sit over this outrage and justice will be done.” For more information contact Asher Anderson at Asher.andersonfw@gmail.com

name: Katie Porter
subject: Have you ever waited hours for a rental car? Or paid junk fees at a hotel?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Legislation to save you time and money on your next trip.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26439%2E3422442%2EdHhu-3)
Derek, as millions of families travel this summer, I’m working on legislation to make sure you don’t get ripped off on your next trip:
✈️ Starting with flights: The airline industry has been consolidating for years, and that’s led to higher prices. Now, there are reports that **JetBlue is trying to rig the process to merge with Spirit.** I’ve been scrutinizing this merger since it was first announced, and now I’m urging the Department of Transportation to hold JetBlue accountable. I’ve also introduced legislation to enforce **prompt refunds for canceled flights** and stop airplanes from shrinking seats even further.
🚗 Then you go to rent a car: And you’re stuck waiting in line for hours, only to be told the car you reserved isn’t there. My Rental Car Consumer Protection Act would require rental car companies to provide you with the **vehicle you reserved within half an hour of the reservation time.**
🏨 You make it to the hotel: I’ve called out Marriott for charging **excessive junk fees and asked the Federal Trade Commission to look into it.** Hotel chains received billions in federal aid during the pandemic and are now seeing record profits, **they must meet workers’ demands for more fair pay and better working conditions.** I’m standing proudly with the Southern California hotel workers who are currently on strike.
🌲 My own family will be hitting the road this summer—and I know how expensive traveling can be. That’s why I’ve pushed Congress to fund programs that preserve our National Parks and make access affordable so that families can get outside and spend time together.
Derek, big corporations shouldn’t be ripping you off. The work of holding powerful companies like these isn’t popular in Washington because of the outsized influence they play in our politics. [**I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, can you chip in $10 today to help power our campaign so I can continue this work in the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230713-1?refcode=EMAJ13_1_TRI_20230713_V1_F&refcode2=26439_3422442_dHhu-3&akid=26439%2E3422442%2EdHhu-3)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230713-1?refcode=EMAJ13_1_TRI_20230713_V1_F&refcode2=26439_3422442_dHhu-3&akid=26439%2E3422442%2EdHhu-3)**
Many thanks and happy travels!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ13_1_TRI_20230713_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26439_3422442_dHhu-3&akid=26439%2E3422442%2EdHhu-3)**

Derek, as millions of families travel this summer, I’m working on legislation to make sure you don’t get ripped off on your next trip: ✈️ Starting with flights: The airline industry has been consolidating for years, and that’s led to higher prices. I’ve been scrutinizing this merger since it was first announced, and now I’m urging the Department of Transportation to hold JetBlue accountable. I’ve also introduced legislation to enforce prompt refunds for canceled flights and stop airplanes from shrinking seats even further. 🚗 Then you go to rent a car: And you’re stuck waiting in line for hours, only to be told the car you reserved isn’t there. body:
The pundits said we couldn't do it. Together we proved them wrong. | | | | |
---
# You Showed Up—Let’s Do It Again
|
---
Dear Friend,
Becky Edwards here. When the pundits and prognosticators said that it would be impossible to gather 7,000 signatures in 28 days, you showed up. With your help, you helped us achieve big goals.
**My team just confirmed the numbers:**
* Nearly 400 Utahns
* Collected over 12,000 signatures
* In just 25 days

We can build on that momentum, win the Republican primary, and win this election. _**But, I need your help to do it.**_
In order to reach even more voters, we need the financial resources to accomplish a winning campaign. Others may be more wealthy and well-connected, but we have something even better: YOU!
Every donation you make goes directly to ensuring we can reach voters in every corner of this district. [**Will you chip in $5, $25, $100, or even $1,000 to help us get there?**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=107f3cc13f&e=6484bb6dd5)
We just proved the pundits wrong together—let’s do it again!
Becky

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

Catherine Cortez Masto successfully defended her seat in Nevada by one of the smallest margins seen last year (_less than 1%!_). In true swing state fashion, though, Nevadans handed Sen. Cortez Masto her victory _at the same time_ that they voted an anti-choice extremist in as the Silver State's new governor. States don't get much more purple than Nevada.

This cycle, Sen. **Jacky Rosen (NV)** is facing her first reelection after becoming the only Democratic candidate to successfully flip a Republican-held Senate seat in 2018. We KNOW Republicans are targeting this seat, and will spend HUGE amounts of money in their fight to flip the seat and the chamber.

If this sounds out of the norm...that’s because it IS! Sinema is cashing big money checks from special interests to fund her luxury lifestyle, all while obstructing our most basic rights and dodging any accountability from constituents.**We’ve had enough.**
**When you have no moral high ground you’ll take checks from anyone–which is why Sinema’s war chest is so big. | | Friend, The soul of America is calling. _Will you answer?_ My team and I are working hard to defeat **one of the worst right-wing extremists in Congress** : Jim Jordan. I believe our country deserves truth, sanity, and a Congresswoman who will actually get things done for all Americans—in short, everything you have wanted but have never gotten from Jordan’s disastrous tenure in Congress.

JFK once said, “Ask not what your country can do for you, but what you can do for your country.” So I’m asking, will you step up and join this fight with me, so we can unseat this immoral traitor and threat to our democracy, and save the very soul of America? We need you. We are literally fighting fascism.

Nothing will help set us up for success right now more than a monthly donation to our campaign.

Your commitment signifies our shared passion to save our country.

Additionally, **it allows my team and I to plan ahead and execute the winning game plan we need to flip this seat:** how we get our inclusive message out to voters, how many organizers and door knockers we can hire, and ultimately how many Ohioans we can bring into the fold.

We can flip this seat and make Jim Jordan a thing of the past, but we need your help to do it. **[For less than the price of a Netflix subscription, you can be a part of this urgent mission and help restore honor to Washington, DC. Dear Friend, The Biden Administration is proposing a massive expansion of offshore drilling leases in the Gulf of Mexico, and possibly Alaska. These new leases go directly against President Biden's commitment to cut carbon emissions and are incompatible with a desperate need to combat climate change and protect struggling ecosystems. We need a huge public outcry to convince President Biden and his administration to reverse course before it's too late. You can take immediate action to prevent this dangerous path forward.
---
[ Take Action Now ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTBAb6zPaB9OcGRCvJj4mdjuIBsTZ2i7nG4P8woOHjWPmAYCTe9IXFYqhkTVfLeUtECWZ6WzwgcYrYaq4EpQeL4L59K5rr9tpHmEOgXuNV0byUbO_3QGyUPo-yyjlihKtMRXffkZuXY4PVcbmBLHYTITeGlYdrJk3-bLcPxt3YUUaFWAcrlDfl65mGFA3XZJN76eZxOWnkD52V9ixrpzEkBm_nzJfqq9VrPgRhtkHrq8GAQkGVtjxSb9_VNKp16OvMaaqfNmZc4K69kys7qPtewLKvOtiFGLXU7Xscuvn57WbxqP-50_5mYPDzLdSPT4Jf-rwZ-V3k1yZBTmLtizrdzDq5B4tdTfeRwWQm0sJklpgzFR1n772QSe7Pzt1ay6YvrGCqxuOGwyqZxm8DAkIPvVLWdDy4LuIm-3bE8vYE6L4EjpcCod_4g68PbGKE2BWYs1UPLISBgzcDwKFA6temg/3xu/j7RappQCQVaRx4S3YzsB1Q/h1/slyoWVNg9A-ppc8Y4a6tznT_EHfEKhP7L89quPSb_2k)

---
Risky offshore drilling irreparably harms our coasts, communities, and climate. Just one oil spill would spell catastrophe for beaches, Indigenous and coastal communities, marine wildlife, and fishermen alike. Allowing new oil and gas leases not only poses significant risks to our environment but also fails to address the key issues we face today. The production of U.S. oil does not set the price of gas; instead, it is subject to fluctuations in the global oil market. New leasing would do nothing to lower gas prices, as it would take at least five years for oil from new leases to reach the market.
---
[ Sign Now ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTBAb6zPaB9OcGRCvJj4mdjuIBsTZ2i7nG4P8woOHjWPmAYCTe9IXFYqhkTVfLeUtECWZ6WzwgcYrYaq4EpQeL4L59K5rr9tpHmEOgXuNV0byUbO_3QGyUPo-yyjlihKtDbfy1NMeM5YZyGSaiZIeeYgn60Beoeq4ImwkR3Ief9zEJpVZBJpCFJ07d8-y1-liyNEkgZ_Pm0RBpMNEqi7yqQWX6gSccxaUyyWTLd2My9J7fN8Y3FlVuhmfFml963tlJb3o2Wn6DQI1GvTBJbiXw0No71LrDUHRnsTxzl51sacFvtZgdIAHimaJpQYfyBA_vBqQ0hDdHtMZwghVQ-oOWGjVe4GVGnxmaDUlejCg7tPkaw5R57b08IYqW1pH-BWFafMOXTxZcW6vcxTPNUL8I9fgZZ_qZLdU6yh-9ZP-bkcSfLYfcN-9vZ3rxEyLpVYBh8RF2GG7zQxP-FsJw5Jn_I/3xu/j7RappQCQVaRx4S3YzsB1Q/h3/70AryihTZ8iDyfD9Ph1cuYrjTm8ui3iMrPImsFiGu_4)
---
It is clear that the decision to expand offshore drilling is driven by short-term gains rather than considering the long-term impacts on our environment and the well-being of future generations. The Big Oil industry is pushing for an expansion of current offshore oil drilling beyond the 12 million acres of ocean waters they already have the rights to — and they’re only using a quarter of that. The reality is that leasing our ocean to oil and gas companies will only lock us into the climate-destroying fossil fuels of the past for decades to come — which is exactly what the fossil fuel industry wants — at a time when we need to be rapidly transitioning to 100% clean energy to save our planet.
---

These new leases go directly against President Biden's commitment to cut carbon emissions and are incompatible with a desperate need to combat climate change and protect struggling ecosystems. We need a huge public outcry to convince President Biden and his administration to reverse course before it's too late. You can take immediate action to prevent this dangerous path forward. | Risky offshore drilling irreparably harms our coasts, communities, and climate. Just one oil spill would spell catastrophe for beaches, Indigenous and coastal communities, marine wildlife, and fishermen alike. Allowing new oil and gas leases not only poses significant risks to our environment but also fails to address the key issues we face today. The production of U.S. oil does not set the price of gas; instead, it is subject to fluctuations in the global oil market. New leasing would do nothing to lower gas prices, as it would take at least five years for oil from new leases to reach the market. It is clear that the decision to expand offshore drilling is driven by short-term gains rather than considering the long-term impacts on our environment and the well-being of future generations. The Big Oil industry is pushing for an expansion of current offshore oil drilling beyond the 12 million acres of ocean waters they already have the rights to — and they’re only using a quarter of that. The reality is that leasing our ocean to oil and gas companies will only lock us into the climate-destroying fossil fuels of the past for decades to come — which is exactly what the fossil fuel industry wants — at a time when we need to be rapidly transitioning to 100% clean energy to save our planet. | Paid for by the Natural Resources Defense Council. By signing, you may receive communication from the Natural Resources Defense Council. Here's our | | Sent via . name: Shawn Wilson
subject: Peter, I’d like to tell you why I’m running for Governor.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Will you take just 30 seconds to hear me out?

Peter, some of you know me very well, and some of you are just getting to know me better as a Democrat running for Governor of Louisiana. I am grateful you’re here and taking the time to read my message. **_[I’d like to tell you a little bit more about myself and why I got into this race in the first place. But first, I have to ask: Can you chip in $25 before my critical mid-month deadline on Saturday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66440523/416368410/218720461?amount=25&refcode=em_WIL_FR_MM1-Bio_071323&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIyYmU3MjctYTcyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yF4xrcEUOLjr37TyM9eRPpFBlf5UowLuonhehSHJyYM=)_** My name is Shawn Wilson. I’m a father, grandfather, husband of 28 years, lifelong Democrat, and public servant. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66440528/416368411/218720461?amount=25&refcode=em_WIL_FR_MM1-Bio_071323&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIyYmU3MjctYTcyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yF4xrcEUOLjr37TyM9eRPpFBlf5UowLuonhehSHJyYM=)
_That’s me with my wife and partner of 28 years, Rocki._ I’ve spent the last 25 years in state government, having been appointed or served in an executive role for three Governors and one Lieutenant Governor. Seven years ago, I was appointed Secretary of the Louisiana Department of Transportation and Development. When I was appointed to that role, Louisiana was facing record budget deficits and a slumping economy. The department was short on funds and hadn’t broken ground on many of the big infrastructure projects that we’ve needed for _decades_. So, we got to work bringing local, state, and federal leaders together in collaboration with business owners, farmers, and neighborhood associations. Together, we got things done and created the largest infrastructure investment in our state’s history. **The bottom line is this: I know and love Louisiana, and I have spent my career working to make our state better.** **_[Now more than ever, we need leaders who will build bridges, not burn them. That’s the kind of Governor I promise to be, but I need your help to get there. Please, will you join me in this fight with your first contribution before Saturday’s mid-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66440530/416368417/218720461?amount=25&refcode=em_WIL_FR_MM1-Bio_071323&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIyYmU3MjctYTcyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yF4xrcEUOLjr37TyM9eRPpFBlf5UowLuonhehSHJyYM=)_** It’s go time, Peter!

We just launched our first TV ad to reach as many voters as we can before Election Day. It’s a critical message, and keeping it on the air is a key part of our path to victory.

**But there’s one thing you learn when you run for office: TV ads aren’t cheap.**

My team set a $7,500 goal earlier this week to help power our movement, but we’re nowhere near close. Without hitting this goal, we won’t be able to keep our ad on the air and make all the other critical investments we need to reach voters.

clean_body: (Our new kick-butt TV ad) | = It’s go time, Peter! We just launched our first TV ad to reach as many voters as we can before Election Day. It’s a critical message, and keeping it on the air is a key part of our path to victory. But there’s one thing you learn when you run for office: TV ads aren’t cheap. My team set a $7,500 goal earlier this week to help power our movement, but we’re nowhere near close. Without hitting this goal, we won’t be able to keep our ad on the air and make all the other critical investments we need to reach voters. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let’s get it done and bring home the win. body:
There’s one clear choice 👀 | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66441084/416369863/-2090587605?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjMmU5ZmE4LWE3MjEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9SSwHJw8Ru3UFnK9kT9bjPPMsmcUCzp9dOuGjmoI_hE=)
---
Peter, Voters next year will need to make a choice. A choice between four more years of President Biden’s agenda to move our country forward....

Or four years of an extremist MAGA agenda. **We think the choice couldn’t be more clear. But we want to know if you agree. Are you on board with President Biden and the Democrats’ agenda, or the dangerous Republican agenda?** **[BIDEN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66441085/416369864/87033255?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLL_2_071323_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjMmU5ZmE4LWE3MjEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9SSwHJw8Ru3UFnK9kT9bjPPMsmcUCzp9dOuGjmoI_hE=)** **[REPUBLICANS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66441086/416369865/87033255?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLL_2_071323_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjMmU5ZmE4LWE3MjEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9SSwHJw8Ru3UFnK9kT9bjPPMsmcUCzp9dOuGjmoI_hE=)** It seems like every single Republican running for President is bending over backwards to see who can be more extreme, more bigoted, and more destructive than the candidates next to them. **Republicans want to:** Ban abortion. Ban books. Tell teachers what they can teach. Keep trans kids out of sports. Strip away LGTBQ rights. Expunge Donald Trump’s impeachment. Repeal child labor laws. Make it easier for criminals to get their hands on guns. Cut Medicare & Social Security. Gut our healthcare system. Keep anyone who doesn’t agree with them away from the ballot box. Give their richest buddies a tax break while the rest of us pick up the bill. And that’s just the start of it. **Meanwhile.... President Biden and the Democrats will continue to:** Restore our standing on the international stage. Apply Bidenomics to create hundreds of thousands of new jobs and bring prices down on the goods we use every day. Invest in the infrastructure of the future while creating jobs and protecting our environment. Defend reproductive rights. Reduce the cost of health care while increasing access. Expand rural broadband. Protect LGBTQ children and allow everyone to live as their authentic selves. Restore voting rights. Defend democracy. We think you get the picture. clean_body: There’s one clear choice 👀 | = Peter, Voters next year will need to make a choice. A choice between four more years of President Biden’s agenda to move our country forward.... Or four years of an extremist MAGA agenda. We think the choice couldn’t be more clear. But we want to know if you agree. Are you on board with President Biden and the Democrats’ agenda, or the dangerous Republican agenda? = = It seems like every single Republican running for President is bending over backwards to see who can be more extreme, more bigoted, and more destructive than the candidates next to them. Republicans want to: Ban abortion. Ban books. Tell teachers what they can teach. Keep trans kids out of sports. Strip away LGTBQ rights. Expunge Donald Trump’s impeachment. Repeal child labor laws. Make it easier for criminals to get their hands on guns. Cut Medicare & Social Security. Gut our healthcare system. Keep anyone who doesn’t agree with them away from the ballot box. Give their richest buddies a tax break while the rest of us pick up the bill. And that’s just the start of it. Meanwhile.... President Biden and the Democrats will continue to: Restore our standing on the international stage. Apply Bidenomics to create hundreds of thousands of new jobs and bring prices down on the goods we use every day. Invest in the infrastructure of the future while creating jobs and protecting our environment. Defend reproductive rights. Reduce the cost of health care while increasing access. Expand rural broadband. Protect LGBTQ children and allow everyone to live as their authentic selves. Restore voting rights. Defend democracy. We think you get the picture. This is why we have to ask: Are you on board with President Biden and the Democrats’ agenda, or the dangerous Republican agenda? = = Thanks for your input, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. body:
He'll represent the great people of Montana in a way Jon Tester never did.

Friend,

Did you see the important Senate alert?

**Tim Sheehy announced his run for US Senate in the great state of Montana, and he is the perfect man to get the job done. He is a former Navy Seal and Purple Heart recipient who fought to protect our country and paid the price. Tim runs an extremely successful business he built from the ground up, and will be an outstanding Senator alongside Chairman Steve Daines.**

Republicans only need to _flip two seats to take back the Majority in the Senate,_ and one of our best opportunities is in the **RED state of Montana.**

The Democrats know Tim is a direct threat to their fragile Majority, so they're already using every dirty trick in the book to knock him down, and we can't let them succeed.

Will you join me in _supporting Tim Sheehy to DEFEAT far-Left Senator Jon Tester_ so our Party can TAKE BACK the Majority?

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpqgje8130flphl19g17ctai7g88au4553u5b8j0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9516vc9qjq4euknjr7llfba7b9j4q38elt2sllo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjvvlbre7e8bk8te741g2647vcbpt03s5tbpbmno_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z42ro7cbevr15i2ig7br7l95p9tc373j9fdimgco_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvm4m24p7q1fhcavdil80lu81s8voukc1adrq4hg_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq8qji0cvucrd1am3b04mkr26emkoc1oim1unbro_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z78fkdldehi4hg2a503c4f790loj17a0vk7mmch0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6h82f2a1huskco0r6eq4peah4ghbcta30sllueo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd03b3olffekb01cinhajhjcoooepjmk9eb772mo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9ge6o72c9h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors. I won't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. | | That was our average donation in June, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign just over 4 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Peter, Let me be clear: Parents should not have to worry about what their children are learning during school hours. The fact that as Governor of Florida, I had to get involved, is an insane commentary on how the Left is controlling children's education right now. I believe that as parents, we have a fundamental RIGHT to direct our children's education and upbringing. That is a view of the primacy of parents. This isn't a Republican view. It's not an independent view. It's not a Democrat view. This is a fundamental view for every parent, grandparent, and future parent out there. I'm the ONLY candidate in this race who has the record and will to fight for American children's innocence. _**Are you ready to join my mission to protect our kids from the Left?**_
---

During the COVID lockdowns, the ruling class forced masks on children and untested mRNA vaccinations on young kids, denied families the ability to visit loved ones in the hospital, shut down churches, destroyed communities, and locked children out of their classrooms. This same ruling class is now defending sexualized content in schools and encouraging children to change genders behind their parents' backs. National Democrat leaders have adopted the notion that children belong to the government. Enough is enough. _I am a parent who wants to shape a better future for my children, and this is why I have pledged to wage war on the Department of Education as President._ The Left doesn't like that we're doing this. The media doesn't like that we're doing this. But parents appreciate it. That is what matters to me. And it means we're above the target.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
Defending Parental Rights

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.
