clean_body: Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, Friend. body:
Jacky Rosen needs your immediate grassroots support to fight back.

| I had to reach out right away, Peter:

**Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat my friend and colleague Sen. Jacky Rosen in Nevada – and according to analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ , this race is likely to decide Senate control.**

I’ve been in Jacky’s shoes before, so I can tell you firsthand: She needs every bit of grassroots support she can get – and she needs it __right now__.

Because here’s the thing: McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada with over $55 million to flip this battleground state red. I was able to win the closest Senate race in the country by **7,928 votes** because of a dedicated team of grassroots supporters by my side. But the GOP is gearing up to spend even more this time around to make sure their handpicked candidate defeats Jacky.

**That’s why _The Washington Post_ is calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – and now, a recent poll shows her two points down. The only way Jacky can overcome the GOP’s spending, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue is with your grassroots support, but she’s falling short of her critical $50,000 rapid-response goal.**

subject: Ron Paul: Do This With Your 401(k) Before 2024
body:
What's the best way to stop Biden's agenda?

| | | |
# **Ron Paul: What Retirement Savers Must Do Before The 2024 Election**
---
**Ron Paul: What Retirement Savers Must Do Before The 2024 Election**
### **... This could save your hard-earned money AND the country at the same time.**
**... This could save your hard-earned money AND the country at the same time.**
| | | Hi, Dr. Ron Paul here. What's the best way to **stop Biden 's agenda?** No, it's not voting Republican. Although that might help, there is something much better: __**It 's called voting with your wallet!**__ Here's what I mean... Democrats get easy votes by giving away newly printed money. But this cheapens our money supply. And it hurts Americans by forcing them to pay extra for food, rent, and gas. So what happens when the people start demanding REAL MONEY? I predict...
---
| | **Biden 's Inflationary Con-Job Will End**
---
| **Biden 's Inflationary Con-Job Will End**
---
| | Which is why I'm asking _all patriotic Americans_ to diversify into PHYSICAL precious metals. We need to help this process along, and demanding real money protects the country from moral and financial corruption. _But that 's not all it does._ Gold and silver also **safeguard YOUR savings from inflation better than anything else available.** So it's a win-win for both you and America. Fortunately, we have a lot of options for investing in precious metals. # We've Got a Country to Save!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter, When I announced my run for the presidency, I told you that I was compelled by a sense of duty. My father and brothers served in our nation’s armed forces, and to me, it was also important to give to the country that had given us so much, too. That time has come. Washington is out of control, and politicians couldn’t be more out of touch with the needs of ordinary Americans like you and I – the people that make this country work. We need courageous leadership backed by common sense and a commitment to getting big things done. [**We’ve got a country to save. I’m ready to do my part, but I need your help. To earn a spot in the upcoming GOP debates, I need at least 40,000 individual donors contributing ANY AMOUNT. That’s right – even $1 counts! Can I count on you to give today?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=478fc34557&e=0be619cbaa)
---
Your support allows me to share our message of a new Golden Age for America, where our best days are ahead, not behind us. **Will you help me?** Thank you, **Larry Elder
**GOP Candidate for President [**P.S. All of my fellow GOP presidential candidates are either career politicians or billionaires. But I’m running for President to serve as the candidate for We the People, not special interests. That’s why I need your financial support to secure my spot on that pivotal debate stage. Can you donate ANY AMOUNT, even just $5, today?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=316f924ecd&e=0be619cbaa)

Ever since they announced their plot against our America First Movement, we’ve only GROWN our already massive leads to more than 30 points in nearly every early primary state... ...Not to mention our now 20-POINT LEAD in the great state of Florida! But with alarm bells going off for these treacherous RINOs, leaked reports show they’re now holding “crisis talks”out in the Hamptons to plot a last-ditch scheme to stop us. Friend, now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. We MUST continue to counter their plots and dark money schemes at every turn. name: Bob Casey
subject: Our Senate majority is at risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=298%2E552475%2EYhOBSM)
Peter,
Pennsylvania is always one of the most competitive Senate battlegrounds in the country, and we can’t expect our race to be any different.
Mitch McConnell has already announced that Pennsylvania is one of his top targets — which means we will be up against the full force of the GOP establishment.
In a race like ours, we cannot afford to fall short of a single fundraising goal.
[**Peter, I’m counting on your support to help kick off July strong. Please pitch in now and help add 2,500 donations by midnight on Saturday so we can keep fighting to defend our Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230713-1?refcode=em20230713-1&refcode2=298_552475_YhOBSM&akid=298%2E552475%2EYhOBSM)
**[Donate now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230713-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230713-1&refcode2=298_552475_YhOBSM&akid=298%2E552475%2EYhOBSM)**
I go to work every day on behalf of Pennsylvania to fight to make things a little easier on our working families. We’ve achieved important wins for our Commonwealth that will make a difference in the job opportunities in our state and money heading back into people’s pockets.
**But in 2024, our Democratic majority in the Senate is at risk** — and with it the chance to continue our progress. That’s why I’m asking you directly:
[**Will you give $5 or any amount you can to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal of 2,500 donations, defend this seat, and hold our Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230713-1?refcode=em20230713-1&refcode2=298_552475_YhOBSM&akid=298%2E552475%2EYhOBSM)
Thank you for chipping in a donation if you can; it means so much.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=298%2E552475%2EYhOBSM)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=298%2E552475%2EYhOBSM)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

He’s a native Floridian with blue-collar roots, played baseball at Yale, and graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. He served in the Navy as a JAG officer in Iraq, worked as a federal prosecutor, and worked in the halls of Congress. As governor, he has kept Florida free, taken on woke corporations, and stood up to the liberal media. He’s the freedom fighter that America needs. | PAID FOR BY NEVER BACK DOWN INC. **MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**

In 2020 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I 'm a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I'm the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd0ba453d9d040ecb594098f611f854d&_e=TaPQ7mPBB0IjtODslYzRReYlWEJYRQZZuEmRZGM-GpNUbmzl32jmlKQAKs8Mmx-pYFpNWSJYGf1UF1Z0P9tZ6tn66XeL8-gbiw6nb3EWaF_u-IXsapuOe7-qxt7-bEb5RY7uofyMPLLlpEXLuhGnUiYkwm4WiWBghDsm0UxkVP4L08tjx9rcMVmB9KltlHnAoWOLWIWGiGDzvywrhJJWdd9T44drpfcv3d6lN96YsMdFeA0iABs7VYn4JwXNGr6LuueDobZZrqbeFkVzCKXCudOhiAXQPjdE17I3C9zh-LciRDY0AeH-STo9qTJ5Bh_RSH2mEW8JpfyJJimCduN_AHNQjltdKFlLNm8XQIYgu8nPblGrsRdojej2LvHW4GnohLRbfLKafeb8Ody4B0AIMBWh0VlOXRaSkduuJZ1FxG3Nmkb8x5MHUTbLlBJT6PAr3xjWe5M4A2W7wcPxBBDw4P5Osf6Pb1AcvlceLt0gJH0%3D)**

I won't beat around the bush a minute more- this is the most important battleground race in the nation & together we can deliver Joe Biden & the liberal narrative a humiliating & historic upset.

**So I 'm humbly asking if you'll support me with your kindness & generosity just one more time before Biden & the Democrat machine hit us with their million dollar advertising blitz to end my candidacy.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cd0ba453d9d040ecb594098f611f854d&_e=TaPQ7mPBB0IjtODslYzRReYlWEJYRQZZuEmRZGM-GpNUbmzl32jmlKQAKs8Mmx-pYFpNWSJYGf1UF1Z0P9tZ6tn66XeL8-gbiw6nb3EWaF_u-IXsapuOe7-qxt7-bEb5RY7uofyMPLLlpEXLuhGnUiYkwm4WiWBghDsm0UxkVP4L08tjx9rcMVmB9KltlHnAoWOLWIWGiGDzvywrhJJWdd9T44drpfcv3d6lN96YsMdFeA0iABs7VYn4JwXNGr6LuueDobZZrqbeFkVzCKXCudOhiAXQPjdE17I3C9zh-LciRDY0AeH-STo9qTJ5Bh_RSH2mEW8JpfyJJimCduN_AJ7o0JgmX0OoaWvDMK6hJSx8bF0ITxRsg4bp8DQ-qJozqTdBUnDagzrV4tqVyCmmuIIA3QMHesidTC3qAAzttwsc_5CNDNjBjdazN3_h8Jy8RsFfDi9v7rEJh0bjd6UJotqNw6gZ5PygmpYDpA4Fl2U%3D)**

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2c9li6ub5rv3qcbnbuqk6p0alt1hlvipef9040g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zklbvvp5ucircohp4o5kgql8trd7rs59n07dou0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3nukihhlcnj8c43sb87cqar0qo5b2gl9m78va10_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhel5iq3tgue17bcoe09mtfc4ssap5qmh2m0gv48_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrue10mfllrnq9143ogcuho1eebscgugmmhkj6uo_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zid8fqs52cpsq4cvjtcjj25ub4di46uks6k7o41o_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziivir5chaajl4mgcldl65n4nr1eqjfsjsoquh88_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrj0cksm5u71ufvjog5t3tc0rhe0mtnigtitjg2g_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z62legqik1k8mrlb5r4vvb7srd0rrgrf8q2udaj8_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8dovs8ia4qpbi810n1c2gm720hn7br970l9gut0_rp22sh2s8i66o74s9geeob6c5h2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

We are looking ahead to what we need to do to protect this seat and support Republican victories up and down the ballot next year. ---
**Early Match Access: Give now in honor of World Orca Day!** | [DONATE IN THE NEXT 5 HOURS](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874962?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend**, **I want to take a moment to make sure you are one of the first people to get**special early access to our upcoming World Orca Day match**. As one of our most dedicated members, will you help us set the tone for tomorrow? Because whether you make a gift could also mean the difference between survival and utter extinction for Southern Resident orcas and a future of our planet.
Big Polluters make us believe that their destructive actions are normal and simply the cost of doing business. But there’s nothing normal about their planet-killing actions, which are also driving the last 75 Southern Resident orcas to EXTINCTION.
To make matters worse, 13 of these orcas were designated as particularly "vulnerable" last year due to their weakened physical conditions as their food is becoming increasingly scarce, and oil tanker noise and the risk of an impending oil spill increase the threats to their survival. Big Polluters are making it hard for these creatures to survive -- and hurting their entire ecosystem and the communities who live nearby -- but we have the power to stop them together. Friends of the Earth is part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network -- and the Earth has never needed a friend like you or us more. **_Your World Orca Day support will give us one of our best chances to fight back for endangered orcas and our planet._**
That's why we need your help: to help combat these threats and protect our planet, a group of generous donors have agreed to match all World Orca Day gifts up to our $90,000 goal, but only until midnight tomorrow. We need you help to reach our goal -- and the last 75 Southern Resident orcas in the world desperately need your support. Because you've been such an essential supporter, we created a custom link you can use to make your impact TODAY and set us up for success early -- so hurry and give now! Here's your link:
[EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874962?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization, endangered orcas, and the planet -- and we know you recognize how high the stakes are. **With only 75 Southern Resident orcas left in the world,** oil tanker and cruise ship traffic increasing, and the ever-present threat of oil spills, we don't have time to lose.
The stakes for endangered orcas and our only Earth have never been higher, so we cannot get complacent -- and we know you won't let that happen. But we're counting on you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
Please, be part of the solution that helps us end this crisis and save our Earth! Your personalized World Orca Day link is right here -- make your membership gift now to make every dollar count:
[DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT IN THE NEXT 5 HOURS ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874962?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1874962?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans & vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. clean_body: Adam Schiff is on a dangerous mission to turn the Supreme Court into a partisan arm of the Democrat Party. | | DEFEAT ADAM SCHIFF Fellow patriot, “Dangerous” “Partisan” “Failed” “Reactionary” “Extreme” These are just some of the words Adam Schiff used to describe the U.S. Supreme Court recently as they have handed down rulings such as stopping Biden’s student loan forgiveness, ending racist affirmative action, and striking down Roe v. Wade. I’m Adam Schiff’s conservative Republican opponent, and to save the Supreme Court, Adam Schiff is renewing his push to pack the Supreme Court with liberal justices and manipulate it until his political agenda is served: Adam Schiff is on a dangerous mission to turn the Supreme Court into a partisan arm of the Democrat Party , and if he gets elected to the Senate and put on the Judiciary Committee, he could have the power to do so! Schiff has vowed to make corrupting the Court his top priority if he reaches the Senate. We can’t afford to have Schiff making decisions on nominations to the Court or shredding the separation of powers. Thanks for your support, Eric Early Republican for Senate | | ABOUT ERIC EARLY Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. Not a career politician. Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. name: Jason Crow
subject: Talk is cheap.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Team, Exactly a year ago today, I joined my colleagues in passing the PACT Act through the House. As a veteran myself, I know how important it is to get our servicemembers the care they deserve. Soldiers I served alongside in Iraq and Afghanistan suffer the effects of toxic exposure. Because of the PACT Act, our veterans are starting to get that care. But today also marks the day my colleague, Lauren Boebert, voted against the legislation: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66444299/416380308/1080436694?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230713_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IzMzU4Yi1hZjIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vn_zSeHVnkJ6-U0y3M8kCcKpvtBP5RP4kqn9Vik00Q=) Unfortunately, this isn’t anything new. We’ve known for a while that Lauren Boebert and MAGA extremists would rather score political points than get things done. Just weeks ago, they paid lip service to the sacrifices veterans made to serve our country — all while threatening to make drastic cuts to veterans’ benefits. **Talk is cheap. Leadership requires showing up.** Congress has the ability to make a real difference in people’s lives. We need to stop grandstanding and take action. **[It’ll take a grassroots movement to beat back extremism and build a new generation of leadership. I’m all in. Will you join me with a donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66444302/416380309/1080436694?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230713_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IzMzU4Yi1hZjIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vn_zSeHVnkJ6-U0y3M8kCcKpvtBP5RP4kqn9Vik00Q=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66444309/416380314/1080436694?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230713_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IzMzU4Yi1hZjIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vn_zSeHVnkJ6-U0y3M8kCcKpvtBP5RP4kqn9Vik00Q=)

body:
| It’s urgent, so I’ll be brief:

**The Cook Political Report just announced that our current race rating is on the verge of becoming a TOSS UP.**

We need to do whatever we can to ensure this shift happens. The best way to do that is to prove the grassroots strength of our movement by hitting our goal of adding 1,000 new donations to our campaign by the end of the week.

**[I am counting on you. I need to ask you to help improve our chances in 2024 by contributing one of the 500 donations we still need today. body:
| | This is frightening: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66444572/416381312/-1360078145?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230713_FR_Trump_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_Trump&refcode2=81107e83-b021-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwN2U4My1iMDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NL7NXYENS_HKv8k3eO4UFuOTT6iIXJc6n-zILqKBZz0=) At a recent Moms for Liberty conference, **Donald Trump called for a direct election of school Principals every year – so if parents don’t like a Principal they can simply vote them out.**

Trump accused the “radical left” of slandering Moms for Liberty as a “so-called hate group.” He then went on to instead call them _“joyful warriors”_ and _“fierce, fierce patriots.”_ Groups like Moms for Liberty are determined to gain complete control over what students are learning in American history, civics, and science. **Putting them in charge of our school’s leaders is nothing but dangerous for our democracy.**

[We need to shut down these political stunts so our children can have the education they deserve. Will you pitch in $10 today to help us keep education out of the hands of MAGA extremists?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66444573/416381314/1647078566?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230713_FR_Trump_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_Trump&refcode2=81107e83-b021-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwN2U4My1iMDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NL7NXYENS_HKv8k3eO4UFuOTT6iIXJc6n-zILqKBZz0=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

subject: POLITICO: “​​​​Dems eye redistricting redos to regain House majority”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This could be a game changer, team
|
---

This could be a game changer, team. **_POLITICO:_
“Dems eye redistricting redos to regain House majority”**

[**_Help fight for fair maps: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66445100/416383356/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230713_FR_7M_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhY2U2NGEzLWIxMjEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LZkLZxb-oE9reyj99JYJsrzCI8L4k6XwJedKcuytQII=) Last November, our fair maps movement helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” But despite our victories, too many Americans continued to live under gerrymandered maps.

**Now, we have the opportunity to change that before the next election.**

→ In **Alabama** and **Louisiana** , lawmakers must now implement new, fair maps to replace gerrymandered maps struck down by the courts.

→ Pending challenges to gerrymandered maps in states like **Arkansas** , **Georgia** , and **Texas** could lead to those also being required to draw new, fair districts. [**_Help support the fight for fair maps nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66445101/416383357/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230713_FR_7M_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhY2U2NGEzLWIxMjEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LZkLZxb-oE9reyj99JYJsrzCI8L4k6XwJedKcuytQII=) Team, when we work together, our fair maps movement has a proven track record of winning big victories for our democracy. But as President Obama warned us, **“Our opposition is counting on [us] to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.”** [**_Our movement is sustained by supporters like you. Will you donate today to support the NDRC’s work to help ensure Democrats have a fair shot at the House majority in 2024?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66445102/416383358/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230713_FR_7M_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhY2U2NGEzLWIxMjEtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LZkLZxb-oE9reyj99JYJsrzCI8L4k6XwJedKcuytQII=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: This could be a game changer, team | This could be a game changer, team. POLITICO: “Dems eye redistricting redos to regain House majority” = Last November, our fair maps movement helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” But despite our victories, too many Americans continued to live under gerrymandered maps. Now, we have the opportunity to change that before the next election. → In Alabama and Louisiana , lawmakers must now implement new, fair maps to replace gerrymandered maps struck down by the courts. → Pending challenges to gerrymandered maps in states like Arkansas , Georgia , and Texas could lead to those also being required to draw new, fair districts. = Team, when we work together, our fair maps movement has a proven track record of winning big victories for our democracy. But as President Obama warned us, “Our opposition is counting on [us] to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.” = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Jane Kwon
subject: Enter OLCV’s 2023 Photo Contest!
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Dear Peter, Summer’s here, which means it’s time for our Photo Contest! We’re beginning to prepare our Scorecard, and a major part of our Scorecard is the beautiful photos of our state that you share with us. We’ve had categories and themes in previous contests, but this year, we have an open theme. Because **we want to know how you like to enjoy the Oregon we’re all working together to protect.** Whether you’re traveling to the coast with loved ones, hiking with your pets, or observing clouds, birds and other local happenings from your front porch–send us your photos! Every year, we love seeing photos of people outdoors enjoying nature and wildlife (with or without furry friends), though in recent years, we’ve also seen some incredible pictures of nature nearby, climate impacts, and the resiliency of our communities. **So this year, please send us the photos that most resonate with you!**

**You have until August 31st to submit your photos of Oregon's outdoors. Send us an email at respond@olcv.org with ‘Photo Contest’ in the subject line and your photos attached.** You may send up to three. Be sure to include your name, the location where the photo was taken, and a short description of why it’s meaningful to you. Select photos will be featured in our 2023 Environmental Scorecard, and one grand-prize winner will be on the cover! All winners will receive a surprise gift. We’ll also post the photos on our Facebook page after our Scorecard is released in the fall, so find and tag yours. I can't wait to see them! Best,
Jane Kwon
Communications Coordinator, OLCV |
---|---
|
|

name: Mary Thomas
subject: New blockbuster legal initiatives from America First Legal...
body:
| | [](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AV4AAB4WKkEAAAAOxxwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBksE-B--3C3PdySI2yDr3UvNEMvAAXqZI/1/Sz5E0NGELeVZwTuM0sptbA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vci1lbWFpbC0wNjIyMjNfMjAyMzA2MjImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD13ZWVrbHktZG9ub3ItZW1haWwtMDYyMjIzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEc)
---
Fellow Patriot, Stephen and I enjoyed speaking with those of you who were able to join us on the America First Legal Supporter Call that we hosted yesterday. This week at AFL, we launched several new blockbuster legal initiatives and continued our fight against Biden corruption, racist equity policies, and heinous transgender policies. **1.** Continuing our efforts to capitalize on the historic Supreme Court ruling on affirmative action, this week, AFL sent a letter to 150 medical schools notifyig them that if they do not comply with the Court's ruling, AFL stands ready to take them to bring legal action against them.More here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-sends-letters-to-150-medical-schools-across-the-united-states-demanding-the-end-of-all-race-sex-and-national-origin-preferences-following-scotus-ruling/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AV4AAB4WKkEAAAAOxxwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBksE-B--3C3PdySI2yDr3UvNEMvAAXqZI/2/OIO_xqXPZ94VU0TxGdn2NA/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLXNlbmRzLWxldHRlcnMtdG8tMTUwLW1lZGljYWwtc2Nob29scy1hY3Jvc3MtdGhlLXVuaXRlZC1zdGF0ZXMtZGVtYW5kaW5nLXRoZS1lbmQtb2YtYWxsLXJhY2Utc2V4LWFuZC1uYXRpb25hbC1vcmlnaW4tcHJlZmVyZW5jZXMtZm9sbG93aW5nLXNjb3R1cy1ydWxpbmcv)**2.** AFL sued the Biden Departments of Justice, State, and Homeland Security for unlawfully refusing to produce records regarding Hunter Biden and the Biden Family’s foreign corruption. More here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-sues-doj-state-and-dhs-for-withholding-hunter-biden-documents/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AV4AAB4WKkEAAAAOxxwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBksE-B--3C3PdySI2yDr3UvNEMvAAXqZI/3/SoaVQHAIg8jnBqiOz6PPIA/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLXN1ZXMtZG9qLXN0YXRlLWFuZC1kaHMtZm9yLXdpdGhob2xkaW5nLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1kb2N1bWVudHMv)**3.** AFL filed a brief with the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit in support of a Tennessee law that protects children from being subjected to dangerous and experimental gender-modification surgeries and treatments. **This resulted in the Sixth Circuit granting a stay, allowing to go into effect Tennessee’s law that protects children from irreversible chemical castration and genital mutilation.** More here: [_https://aflegal.org/afl-files-brief-at-the-sixth-circuit-court-of-appeals-in-support-of-tennessee-law-protecting-children-from-irreversible-gender-procedures/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AV4AAB4WKkEAAAAOxxwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBksE-B--3C3PdySI2yDr3UvNEMvAAXqZI/4/5PgcAbK0s77opeidEV5EfA/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hZmwtZmlsZXMtYnJpZWYtYXQtdGhlLXNpeHRoLWNpcmN1aXQtY291cnQtb2YtYXBwZWFscy1pbi1zdXBwb3J0LW9mLXRlbm5lc3NlZS1sYXctcHJvdGVjdGluZy1jaGlsZHJlbi1mcm9tLWlycmV2ZXJzaWJsZS1nZW5kZXItcHJvY2VkdXJlcy8) And here: [_https://aflegal.org/breaking-sixth-circuit-court-of-appeals-stays-lower-court-order-allowing-tennessee-law-to-go-into-effect-that-protects-children-from-irreversible-chemical-castration-and-genital-mutilation/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AV4AAB4WKkEAAAAOxxwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBksE-B--3C3PdySI2yDr3UvNEMvAAXqZI/5/zviE7y_UMdv2EBNbx5UPWQ/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9icmVha2luZy1zaXh0aC1jaXJjdWl0LWNvdXJ0LW9mLWFwcGVhbHMtc3RheXMtbG93ZXItY291cnQtb3JkZXItYWxsb3dpbmctdGVubmVzc2VlLWxhdy10by1nby1pbnRvLWVmZmVjdC10aGF0LXByb3RlY3RzLWNoaWxkcmVuLWZyb20taXJyZXZlcnNpYmxlLWNoZW1pY2FsLWNhc3RyYXRpb24tYW5kLWdlbml0YWwtbXV0aWxhdGlvbi8)**4.** AFL filed a lawsuit against the United States Department of State for hiding Global Engagement Center (GEC) records regarding the Biden Administration’s outsourcing of censorship to leftist nonprofits. AFL filed nine Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests to uncover records relating to GEC grant awards and funding opportunities, which functionally outsource Biden’s propaganda and censorship program to leftist nonprofits. AFL’s requests related to grants awarded to The Atlantic Council, National Endowment for Democracy, Moonshot CVE, and Digital Public Square, as well as funding opportunities for a “New Counter-Disinformation Game” and NATO. The Department of State, however, has refused to turn over the requested records.More here: [_https://aflegal.org/america-first-legal-sues-the-department-of-state-to-uncover-censorship-grants/_](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AV4AAB4WKkEAAAAOxxwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBksE-B--3C3PdySI2yDr3UvNEMvAAXqZI/6/xbGg8DRltTf1VIGokkOuUg/aHR0cHM6Ly9hZmxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLXN1ZXMtdGhlLWRlcGFydG1lbnQtb2Ytc3RhdGUtdG8tdW5jb3Zlci1jZW5zb3JzaGlwLWdyYW50cy8) All of these incredible initiatives fighting for freedom and accountability for the American people are made possible by your generous contributions. We hope that you will continue to partner with us in our righteous legal crusade to save our great nation._Thank you for your continued and steadfast support as AFL boldly carries the torch in the courtroom for conservatives,_
Blessings, Mary Thomas
| [**DONATE >>**](http://xykkk.mjt.lu/lnk/AV4AAB4WKkEAAAAOxxwAAEcY2LAAAAABL9MAAGV0ABg1MgBksE-B--3C3PdySI2yDr3UvNEMvAAXqZI/7/b1eQXK8J0VaeA2iyWg9rgQ/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vd2Vla2x5LWRvbm9yLWVtYWlsLXBhZ2U_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX3dlZWtseS1kb25vci1lbWFpbC0wNjIyMjNfMjAyMzA2MjImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD13ZWVrbHktZG9ub3ItZW1haWwtMDYyMjIzJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEc)

It's no surprise that over 60% of Kentuckians approve of Andy's job as governor, and that he ranks among the most popular governors in the nation. But all of Kentucky's progress is on the line this year.

We can't continue moving Kentucky forward without re-electing Andy – and it won't be easy. Election experts are calling this the most competitive race in the nation this year and a Republican poll shows Andy is TIED with his opponent.

[**Peter, Andy needs your help to win this tough race. **_Forwarded Message from Kim Nguyen:_**

Last week, we experienced the Earth’s hottest global temperature ever recorded as cities across the nation hit record highs.

**The climate crisis is not some far-off hypothetical. It’s real, and we’re already seeing its devastating impacts.**

Here in California, we have a front-row seat to the climate crisis. In my lifetime, we’ve experienced severe droughts, unbelievable heat waves, intensifying wildfire seasons, and flooding from historic rain.

**I’m fighting for bold climate action to meet the scale of this crisis, but I need to know if you’re with me.** [Do you agree that our leaders in Congress must make climate action a top priority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66445794/416385682/252526810?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230713_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg4MzMwZTUtYjMyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tavm0sypdi7GzeME5b_5_ClZCbdOQfU-k3335gHVDng=&emci=5fd465dc-b321-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e88330e5-b321-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66445795/416385683/252526810?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230713_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg4MzMwZTUtYjMyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tavm0sypdi7GzeME5b_5_ClZCbdOQfU-k3335gHVDng=&emci=5fd465dc-b321-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=e88330e5-b321-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)****

subject: will you add your name?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| | **_BREAKING FROM WASHINGTON:_
Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand introduces joint resolution to certify the Equal Rights Amendment and enshrine reproductive rights in the Constitution.**
---
**Now, we're calling on 20,000 Democrats to add their names in support of the ERA before midnight tonight. [_Please, friend, will you sign on now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66446090/416386637/1555738728?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4293-su-nd&refcode=jtk4293-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0N2Q2ZC1iNDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltC531Z8az74ixsQcYxL3CVI7yc_LLqaZzEi3SJynoo=&emci=5c351e0f-1621-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=64447d6d-b421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender. Activists have been fighting for 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and we can't wait any longer.
**When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , they took away the right for half of the population to access the health care they need. **It's discrimination based on sex — plain and simple
Thankfully, we're closer than ever before to certifying the ERA: 38 states have ratified it — now, it's just one signature away from being added to the Constitution. _But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!_
**That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a new joint resolution that would establish that this deadline should _not_ stop us from certifying the ERA. **With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this joint resolution and finally establish gender equality in our Constitution.
This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. **[_Please, will you add your name before midnight to show Kirsten that you support the ERA? She's counting on 20,000 signatures before midnight tonight!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66446092/416386639/1555738728?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4293-su-nd&refcode=jtk4293-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0N2Q2ZC1iNDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ltC531Z8az74ixsQcYxL3CVI7yc_LLqaZzEi3SJynoo=&emci=5c351e0f-1621-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=64447d6d-b421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

clean_body: | | | | | BREAKING FROM WASHINGTON: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand introduces joint resolution to certify the Equal Rights Amendment and enshrine reproductive rights in the Constitution. Now, we're calling on 20,000 Democrats to add their names in support of the ERA before midnight tonight. | | Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender. Activists have been fighting for 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and we can't wait any longer. When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , they took away the right for half of the population to access the health care they need. It's discrimination based on sex — plain and simple Thankfully, we're closer than ever before to certifying the ERA: 38 states have ratified it — now, it's just one signature away from being added to the Constitution. But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment! That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a new joint resolution that would establish that this deadline should not stop us from certifying the ERA. With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this joint resolution and finally establish gender equality in our Constitution. This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: 2024 is the time to put up or shut up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I will never stop standing up for what I know is right—even when it goes against the grain of public opinion.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=be5212a3fc3b4a1ea0ee3b57f6ff27ed&_e=DDSY7si00j7TKrVUDzfAAtT5wIiH32XLoJHukQtKn8SwT8lm_6yuXa0ZvpTuDrWaWAkmb-ZLwLle-AmD5SB-EX1MzryP2OtuWpzxeoYHSrWFd9cmUKQJGQe9uEolVMXgTLCMmVBILWcr0y8yy3QkZuzLGslvVwOXwYd3zxUzjpUW47ur1pyu9l7mHkecCxLGNBHJeatl-u9_AfjAHqK7irDPJpDQNcCfQ0EKFJDfCVkjJYVV0YY3a73kYjjnqyTQmmszDwk9EwmyuP509m2kqDmqA_qOjT5w4m-yX7-2GoyVRtPMaW3cpye9eCX-MzBjYnDzlStiJZHZpGbBWIkXBDWtI_uRXPPDAWUos0j2U4IB1KRvwxJVs-xofIbPZXO5xuUPftekfJbt5hos9Og6Su1L6aXlTB3CHRLE0bL700tx8mPi6FLQodOikpJMWmBqHT7MXSuKNTHJdN-qPO4gG2XLZEGXpK4ar3CH5wBkYe4%3D)
---
Friend, Let me be clear: Parents should not have to worry about what their children are learning during school hours. The fact that, as Governor of Florida, I had to get involved, is an insane commentary on how the Left is controlling children's education right now. I believe that as parents, we have a fundamental RIGHT to direct our children's education and upbringing. That is a view of the primacy of parents. This isn't a Republican view. It's not an independent view. It's not a Democrat view. This is a fundamental view for every parent, grandparent, and future parent out there. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

clean_body: | Breaking news: In the dead of night, Iowa Republicans passed a six-week abortion ban. This is a dangerous violation of bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom. America deserves better. Governor Gretchen Whitmer is taking aggressive action to make sure what’s happening in states like Iowa will not happen across the country, but she needs the support of this grassroots team behind her. = Since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , states like Iowa have rushed to ban abortion. But in Michigan, we’ve been fighting like hell to protect reproductive rights. First, we repealed our draconian 1931 abortion ban. And now, we’re fighting to expand access to abortion and reproductive care – working to repeal politically motivated laws that make it harder for women to exercise their right to abortion. Folks, this is not a wait-and-see moment —it’s time for action. Under Governor Whitmer’s leadership, we are forging a path forward as a safe haven for safe, legal abortion amid these ongoing attacks on reproductive freedom. We’ve made real progress defending abortion access, but our efforts must extend beyond Michigan's borders. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** = | = = | = = Thank you. We’re grateful for your support in this critical fight. Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. name: Team Bennet
subject: Fighting childhood poverty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071323_CTCreup_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071323_CTCreup_act]
Hi friend,
We need your help.
First, we want to make sure you saw Michael’s email about the Working Families Tax Relief Act. This bill would permanently expand the Child Tax Credit, something Michael has been fighting to do since 2015. It would benefit 65 million children and cut childhood poverty in half across the United States.
Today, Michael chaired a hearing on the Child Tax Credit — on how this bipartisan policy has benefitted working families for the last 25 years.
It has been an undeniable success, but right now, its scope is too limited.
We want to show the public support behind Michael's bill to permanently expand the Child Tax Credit and put money back in the pocket of working parents.
Will you help him make this a reality by becoming a citizen co-sponsor of the Working Families Tax Relief Act today? Adding your name will only take a minute, but will make a big difference. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_071023_ctceitc]
We’ll keep you updated with any progress, friend.
Thanks for your support,
— Team Bennet
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071323_CTCreup_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_071323_CTCreup_act]
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Michael Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Mon, Jul 10, 2023 at 10:46 AM
Subject: I wanted to make sure you saw this
Friend,
Sherrod Brown and I introduced a major piece of legislation last month — and I wanted to make sure you heard about it.
I’ve been fighting to pass an expanded Child Tax Credit since 2015. In 2021, I succeeded — but it only lasted for one year. Now, I’m working to expand the Child Tax Credit and to make it permanent.
This policy is a big deal for America’s kids. When we passed the expansion in 2021, we:
*
Cut
child
poverty
in
the
United
States
nearly
in
half
*
Benefited
60
million
children
across
the
country,
including
1
million
children
in
Colorado
*
Cut
food
insecurity
in
families
with
children
by
26
percent
The Working Families Tax Relief Act, which we introduced in June, will restore the expanded Child Tax Credit, increasing the income of 40 million households and benefitting 65 million children.
This bill will give working families monthly payments to keep up with the cost of living, get food on the table, and pay for child care. It will give them the breathing room they need to set their kids up for success.
I won’t stop fighting for this bill until it’s passed into law. But to show my colleagues in Congress how much public support this bill has, I’ll need your help. Will you become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the Working Families Tax Relief Act by signing on here? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_071023_ctceitc]
BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_071023_ctceitc]
BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_071023_ctceitc]
Thank you!
— Michael

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance–and I’m not going to waste it| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=024e3198d2ea48cba7271403e300d39c&_e=_MP9vvZXYMgO-r255oUa_BpmxBKut8SvThBnZk7UYnIh1SjQEZrm4IzK3LcmjneU0AihgHDzD4XJbmG3_0JLymqRe09MZCjO37u6r4CQUT1UxnoxX4GzkKgGQz8NGW36baO3wvfeDdNFCx5dM4iOD3-LM7JgUUrWvUhiUT93Jefi5q-kEauI3IkzWr5cQYqoaNB3uBZUFDoSNqCY5I0_BNiZacMY-0TrVyWSg-e8v50Uu46RRpd1x89w0m-leMpjr9feMxROCvUy_estylrjOU5RG2Bgj2Gv7foec6tMQEZm7NjyOdypCCIvkzJTwv3iSxxP-BCUQ8bAm3jYsmV9H1DIDE-wlVS1w5hELGTnOORjUscm8OAKMKtLV9M58Q4V18AIuf_73Cch58NLaZ0JeAajMB1WrhygfZAKpcXGL5A%3D)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=024e3198d2ea48cba7271403e300d39c&_e=_MP9vvZXYMgO-r255oUa_BpmxBKut8SvThBnZk7UYnIh1SjQEZrm4IzK3LcmjneU0AihgHDzD4XJbmG3_0JLymqRe09MZCjO37u6r4CQUT1UxnoxX4GzkKgGQz8NGW36baO3wvfeDdNFCx5dM4iOD3-LM7JgUUrWvUhiUT93Jefi5q-kEauI3IkzWr5cQYqoaNB3uBZUFDoSNqCY5I0_BNiZacMY-0TrVyWSg-e8v50Uu46RRpd1x89w0m-leMpjr9feMxROCvUy_estylrjOevTlYOM4wzFzSXuVOGrwgi5e_496DNJQvJm9msYbhktlWitih7uvhJ7nNJyCUjkM0X3ni_VsNOCBVq4HOczs1FpKseevTCazLtkTIVfzoMnR26UbErE1LFLG5s-XMlJsfoLbN3zzHhj8quk11whJdc%3D) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=024e3198d2ea48cba7271403e300d39c&_e=_MP9vvZXYMgO-r255oUa_BpmxBKut8SvThBnZk7UYnIh1SjQEZrm4IzK3LcmjneU0AihgHDzD4XJbmG3_0JLymqRe09MZCjO37u6r4CQUT1UxnoxX4GzkKgGQz8NGW36baO3wvfeDdNFCx5dM4iOD3-LM7JgUUrWvUhiUT93Jefi5q-kEauI3IkzWr5cQYqoaNB3uBZUFDoSNqCY5I0_BNiZacMY-0TrVyWSg-e8v50Uu46RRpd1x89w0m-leMpjr9feMxROCvUy_estylrjOXZ700Q_wdhmj__Q-5MVRqBV-qqEsEJxKzuVwQQhNFJKmEtozEVO8ICdQN7wPGrWZzX1A5ntACNDoVMiPldAXRieHUYpSynsSt1DqsxLIsyNwjXu5P_iDcMAf2iMajTqJ9MwY99N-x99q-tVrUIVpn8%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=024e3198d2ea48cba7271403e300d39c&_e=_MP9vvZXYMgO-r255oUa_BpmxBKut8SvThBnZk7UYnIh1SjQEZrm4IzK3LcmjneU0AihgHDzD4XJbmG3_0JLymqRe09MZCjO37u6r4CQUT1UxnoxX4GzkKgGQz8NGW36baO3wvfeDdNFCx5dM4iOD3-LM7JgUUrWvUhiUT93Jefi5q-kEauI3IkzWr5cQYqoaNB3uBZUFDoSNqCY5I0_BNiZacMY-0TrVyWSg-e8v50Uu46RRpd1x89w0m-leMpjr9feMxROCvUy_estylrjOTmey91DCyDHnXacetjUQTjVeo-pF6kcEIm2ouMAm2Clkhu5fWXCTXP1kcZXloteD1NXCBQEzypzz1yXJP4RlhUP8w2tCnzZt8ANFjvtUyIkSlSlafBTzS_IXF6rdGCak4qLTsIFxfxcS1fnlN7KT9k%3D)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=024e3198d2ea48cba7271403e300d39c&_e=_MP9vvZXYMgO-r255oUa_BpmxBKut8SvThBnZk7UYnIh1SjQEZrm4IzK3LcmjneU0AihgHDzD4XJbmG3_0JLymqRe09MZCjO37u6r4CQUT1UxnoxX4GzkKgGQz8NGW36baO3wvfeDdNFCx5dM4iOD3-LM7JgUUrWvUhiUT93Jefi5q-kEauI3IkzWr5cQYqoaNB3uBZUFDoSNqCY5I0_BNiZacMY-0TrVyWSg-e8v50Uu46RRpd1x89w0m-leMpjr9feMxROCvUy_estylrjObv2Pd_V6461pb5Gnr6hxE0VSzNTwwofkNVEi9FWVbbtXSm17E-JCnunJcwGhAHW5dcQenr6YsB_LlGx-BVTKbDkS6cb7HmQEJwm5K-SS7TN1Qat2NYEuaMov8EcAKcaaSss7weSCRvP_yYBooREJv8%3D) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---

clean_body: God gave me a second chance–and I’m not going to waste it| | | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,I survived. By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. I truly shouldn’t be alive today. For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable. That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. Duty First, Captain Sam Brown | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. body:
He'll represent the great people of Montana in a way Jon Tester never did.

Friend,

Did you see the important Senate alert?

**Tim Sheehy announced his run for US Senate in the great state of Montana, and he is the perfect man to get the job done. He is a former Navy Seal and Purple Heart recipient who fought to protect our country and paid the price. Tim runs an extremely successful business he built from the ground up, and will be an outstanding Senator alongside Chairman Steve Daines.**

Republicans only need to _flip two seats to take back the Majority in the Senate,_ and one of our best opportunities is in the **RED state of Montana.**

The Democrats know Tim is a direct threat to their fragile Majority, so they're already using every dirty trick in the book to knock him down, and we can't let them succeed.

name: Dan Kildee
subject: I want to hear from you. Will you take my survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| It’s been a busy couple of weeks and my team asked me to reach out so we can hear which of our initiatives is most important to your family.

Every day I go to work for mid-Michigan— _I’m not in Congress to grandstand or get involved in partisan political battles, but to improve the lives of my constituents._

I am proud of my record fighting for working families in Congress and listening to my supporters is a critical part of that work.

Please take a moment to participate in my summer 2023 survey to keep me updated on your thoughts. I still need 500 responses today. Can you take the survey now?

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/localpriorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66453636/416399155/-533696402?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230713_SV_1.3_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_Local&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWRkMmUxYy1iYzIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TNKUyrfmO9zzR6mVgp0cMQCr8RbU6R9D5RQ1hpdhR6s=&emci=a45a1cd3-a221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=eedd2e1c-bc21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

I wouldn’t be able to do the work I do without support from folks like you. It is my honor to represent you in Congress. Thank you for taking the time to share your input.

— Dan
---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! clean_body: | It’s been a busy couple of weeks and my team asked me to reach out so we can hear which of our initiatives is most important to your family. Every day I go to work for mid-Michigan— I’m not in Congress to grandstand or get involved in partisan political battles, but to improve the lives of my constituents. I am proud of my record fighting for working families in Congress and listening to my supporters is a critical part of that work. Please take a moment to participate in my summer 2023 survey to keep me updated on your thoughts. I still need 500 responses today. Can you take the survey now? I wouldn’t be able to do the work I do without support from folks like you. It is my honor to represent you in Congress. Thank you for taking the time to share your input. — Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

subject: We need to fight back.

| Peter,

Republicans in North Carolina are betting everything on the gubernatorial race. And their frontrunner is not good news for our state.

The Republican frontrunner for North Carolina governor has:
* Publicly attacked the LGBTQ+ community with a tirade of transphobic comments
* Claimed that women should not be in leadership positions
* And even _justified quoting Hitler_

Peter, fighting back against extremist Republicans is going to take serious resources, and it’s best we start early.
