name: Roy Cooper
subject: When they ask me if Democrats can win our state, here’s what I say:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We can. We must. We will.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66454732/416400092/823540626?refcode=ea.086549cf-bc21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.086549cf-bc21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY1NDljZi1iYzIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUbv29FJss5Rs892Ru_ZH-hGqssoLudHjMcPNk5wV3E=&emci=1f682543-a221-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=086549cf-bc21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — you may have heard that North Carolina is a target state for Democrats in 2024. I’ve been getting a lot of excited questions from people who want to know if we can really get it done here. Here’s what I say when folks ask me if Democrats can win NC: _We can, we must, and we will._ **[I need you to donate now before our team’s mid-month fundraising deadline on Saturday to help invest in candidates who can win>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66454735/416400093/435245919?refcode=ea.086549cf-bc21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.086549cf-bc21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODY1NDljZi1iYzIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NUbv29FJss5Rs892Ru_ZH-hGqssoLudHjMcPNk5wV3E=)** **North Carolina is the epitome of a “purple” state.** We have 7 Democratic representatives to the U.S. House and 7 Republican representatives. In 2020, Donald Trump’s narrowest victory came here, winning by just 1.3 points. I won my gubernatorial elections in the same years that Trump carried the state. _Democrats CAN win here — if we have the resources that allow us to compete. And it’s never been more important that we do._ Republicans are going full steam ahead on their agenda of fomenting extremist culture wars. They’ve attacked women, LGBTQ+ North Carolinians, and voters with regressive legislation. **We MUST defeat them.** Peter, my team and I have decided to set aggressive fundraising goals to make sure Democratic candidates across the state have the resources they need in the months ahead, as we prepare to make our state blue in 2024. **[We need to bring in $25,000 before midnight to stay on track — but we’re still over $4,850 short. clean_body: We can. We must. We will. | Peter — you may have heard that North Carolina is a target state for Democrats in 2024. I’ve been getting a lot of excited questions from people who want to know if we can really get it done here. Here’s what I say when folks ask me if Democrats can win NC: We can, we must, and we will. = North Carolina is the epitome of a “purple” state. We have 7 Democratic representatives to the U.S. House and 7 Republican representatives. In 2020, Donald Trump’s narrowest victory came here, winning by just 1.3 points. I won my gubernatorial elections in the same years that Trump carried the state. Democrats CAN win here — if we have the resources that allow us to compete. And it’s never been more important that we do. Republicans are going full steam ahead on their agenda of fomenting extremist culture wars. They’ve attacked women, LGBTQ+ North Carolinians, and voters with regressive legislation. We MUST defeat them. Peter, my team and I have decided to set aggressive fundraising goals to make sure Democratic candidates across the state have the resources they need in the months ahead, as we prepare to make our state blue in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you very much, Roy = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. | | | **The Democrats are in FULL BLOWN PANIC MODE! **

Friend, this is Mayra Flores (R-TX) and I JUST launched my 2024 campaign.

I am an America First Latina Conservative, Pro-Life and wife to a border patrol agent. Last year, I won the BIGGEST special election in America, and now I'm running again.

My Democrat opponent and his deep-pocketed megadonors are already pouring in tons of cash to sink my campaign. **[Unfortunately, the latest polls have this race DEAD EVEN, but that won't be for long with your help.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a50ec06a939f40dbade4d36e9e81ca87&_e=PxKr4TY6QAVAcOzzTcKMp5yZTi0TIntwV2sqJNlvWMBvgi_pGxS0qD3VG07Wp4gG9amUCirI9qI2_Fin85JTCxnREm8tM6lIM-VR1xJTPPT6IwqAR1nzIbWC10T03jhJBY_T6l4bA0ACsgp-7mxKGvZn7lv3St8buJzDz_6xQp1xxKB5R7rlRajOOgG2uR_Dpln8t9bVZnUmTy6-RLn8s3Hb9Prg867BD6O2KQyVCBJI6llMXvwrzGTGmsgFO-zM-aKRtazZ5_3gUsxNHpOiE7oDlBotDksdINs-VFmbpQsHUHCpnrUlUZuceWUn7wHQThb3EOcNNUokOv5EeDwnKeITObb65YYD2NirqjRexen_sj8MZUXWx_Gr0XHAj2JrwNbcIL9jEgbtCq4PMFxXxPPH_11t8IevX5ZVF3bj_o1X9Tr1Ic9O3FNOkfiS3Bf7BSWaRkaNOEwrm7JmA-yv_Q%3D%3D "Unfortunately, the latest polls have this race DEAD EVEN, but that won’t be for long with your help. This mid-month deadline is important for a number of reasons, but most importantly, this is our first deadline since two Republicans announced their candidacy against Susan.

**And listen, Republican challenger Kevin Dellicker is staunchly against reproductive rights and even brags about his 100% rating from the PA Pro-Life Federation.**

He celebrated when _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned and said he would work to pass a national abortion ban if he is elected to Congress.

**There’s so much at stake, Peter.** We must show strong numbers to prove to National Republicans that we have what it takes to win this race next November.

Peter, Did you see Cori’s email below? **Cori is the first member of the House Judiciary Committee to call for the impeachment of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas.** And it seems that with each day we learn more about his corruption and unethical behavior. A bombshell _New York Times_ piece this week revealed that shortly after Thomas was sworn in to his lifetime appointment on the court, he joined an exclusive circle “of extraordinarily wealthy, largely conservative members.” And he has “granted [this exclusive circle] unusual access to the Supreme Court.”[1] Additionally, The Guardian reported this week that several lawyers with cases before the court sent Venmo payments to a top aide of Justice Thomas, including a partner at the firm which just argued the case ending affirmative action in college admissions.[2] **[Justice Clarence Thomas’ blatant ethics violations and continued violation of the public trust makes him unfit to serve on our nation’s highest court. \---Original Message---
Peter, I was the first member of the House Judiciary Committee to call for the impeachment of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, and I’m not going to stop organizing to make it happen. We must not only expand the Court, but also hold its judges accountable to legal and ethical standards. **There are so many reasons Clarence Thomas must be impeached. He should never have been confirmed in the first place, given his history of sexual harassment and abuse.** Once on the Court, he has shown complete and utter disregard for ethical standards and legal requirements, time and time again. **He has exploited his position of power to subsidize a life of luxury. Cruises on a mega-yacht, international flights on a private jet, vacations at private resorts, undisclosed gifts worth literally millions of dollars** \-- the list goes on and on. Thomas may well have violated federal disclosure laws, but these have not been his only ethical lapses, or even his most serious. In a bald-faced repudiation of his ethical obligations, **Clarence Thomas has repeatedly failed to recuse himself when he faced clear conflicts of interest** , which relate to his decades-long attacks on marginalized communities through rulings undermining our democracy, overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , allowing discrimination against LGBTQ+ individuals, and ending affirmative action in college admissions -- to highlight only a few of the worst. [**Justice Thomas has shown he cannot rule with impartiality, and his presence on the bench continues to damage the legitimacy of the U.S. Supreme Court and harm our communities. We cannot tolerate these abuses any longer. Join with me and sign the petition calling for the impeachment of Justice Clarence Thomas now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDue1nhU1qW2YvdTdZBSIeUV85AZRR-IF91TGp0XWEtASMhEQ2SDUJwGpDzSDP2wPbXTQIghf5dsa0ATLPPV4WazBzJaF74RykslwF3rgqcbVX7iR16bgDUNUkz3OVb3Rl5btdXamLEwFfZmeOJZP4_6CJxMYXK8DLIcKjbGeVE2I_J2PeLc-lxjaNpdAzfkHAdSLsXFAdGmRPtHp8KWm3fLJunFdiJhg0BJD4ECXMyS5gTlIj6gwf_kfC5JCNCZtG5eyB4vD093cOJbZlKq4DFUzbRfLktks5fVNcWuDFmNlWEBvnLcXRkGos_HjCdqIQmkZQN2bulGOCHgOoFGBbJY707v7gHIW6Rrj8sOh23hhFuos3XH-_fm9QkW4qb4kK4BQtA-RisV_hortYRKsntVJ1uWUWaQRe-PE2QiPCNcnvzL8MHiddUCI-cP7KnPrfp1Eh0xVHKx_qHQif2qUUS925r8iM3EVBTYiCUvk8xvylFIzsGpFPdwEG_TkPfn2r4/3xu/66cn2rptSqCnbhIi7dGJ4g/h4/ANmrJSkGzQlbM6hjjfJDWBHk4F7NjXuBMuh4IarHjFs)**** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDue1nhU1qW2YvdTdZBSIeUV85AZRR-IF91TGp0XWEtASMhEQ2SDUJwGpDzSDP2wPbXTQIghf5dsa0ATLPPV4WazBzJaF74RykslwF3rgqcbVX7iR16bgDUNUkz3OVb3Rl5btdXamLEwFfZmeOJZP4_6CJxMYXK8DLIcKjbGeVE2I_J2PeLc-lxjaNpdAzfkHAdSLsXFAdGmRPtHp8KWm3fLJunFdiJhg0BJD4ECXMyS5i_xbEh7yKXYvKFp9Wz6KB0Y2_JcrsB_I51WMDg5lt-aqJ6A4FCRJbo7MQHIepH7OkbdFGKcuLbYUsXjr-cspwwK_RKOFUMyQ-C0PxmNg2JnTX1BHHPJ3R31rZHLDB0mT_njld9tMe9mqdBPAN9NLQKD2QZfV96q08TwBwEy7uext-B6F3IIbtglN-55jncM37P-cFRMh66sZsFe0tfjYxBhhlRBR4X_iTjRJBnaNSCnjbZMNn3UvKvuM-lwe8vfHTqjrvb_qy6K3Vm_EsVGbR1/3xu/66cn2rptSqCnbhIi7dGJ4g/h5/9Vf4Q2BASHMmRHqS_bgAVSmVqHbBjx6O83vVtthKaSk) ** Many of Justice Thomas’ conflicts of interest involve the activities of his wife, Ginni Thomas, who **actively advocated for the overthrow of the government** with dozens of state legislators and directly to then-White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows. Yet Thomas continued to hear Supreme Court cases related to the 2021 insurrection, and his was **the only dissenting vote against requiring former President Trump to provide subpoenaed White House documents to the House Select Committee on the January 6th Attack.** Nor was this the only instance in which Thomas’ judicial decisions were in lockstep with the conservative political activism of his wife. One of our primary opponents teamed up with the Failing _New York Times_ to spread LIES about our movement and attack our grassroots donors...

---
Here’s the truth: they’re furious, because they can no longer just _buy_ elections.
---
These special interest donors have to face the reality that grassroots donors like _**YOU**_ now have more power than them in choosing our elected officials. That scares the hell out of them.

__Even_ with all of the MILLIONS in special interest money flowing into our opponents’ accounts, _our_ movement of grassroots donors managed to OUTRAISE *ALL* of them in the second quarter and come in **FIRST** **PLACE** in fundraising._
---
_Never underestimate the power of giving just $1._

As I always say, if you can’t contribute right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, don’t even think about it!

clean_body: RINOs can no longer just “buy” elections.| | | | | Friend, One of our primary opponents teamed up with the Failing New York Times to spread LIES about our movement and attack our grassroots donors... Why would a “Republican” forge an alliance with the Fake News after all of the nasty and vicious lies they’ve spread about us? Honestly, it’s a disgrace. That same opponent is financed by the corrupt special-interest RINO donors who have been trying to shut YOU out of the political process for decades. Here’s the truth: they’re furious, because they can no longer just buy elections. These special interest donors have to face the reality that grassroots donors like YOU now have more power than them in choosing our elected officials. That scares the hell out of them. But here’s the most incredible part... Even with all of the MILLIONS in special interest money flowing into our opponents’ accounts, our movement of grassroots donors managed to OUTRAISE ALL of them in the second quarter and come in FIRST PLACE in fundraising. Never underestimate the power of giving just $1. As I always say, if you can’t contribute right now due to Biden’s disastrous policies, don’t even think about it! But, if you can, these special interest donors, who are clinging to their power for dear life, are pledging to spend $370 million on a plot to stop us. So, anything you can contribute would certainly help. | | Thank you, Donald J. subject: RE:🚨URGENT PRAYER ALERT 🚨
body:
Update!| | | The power of prayer WORKS!!! Anyone who says otherwise has never prayed!!! Just YESTERDAY, we sent out an urgent alert to prayer warriors across the nation, imploring them to pray for an important bill in the California legislature-- SB 14, which was killed in committee. Less than 24 hours later, SB 14 passed out of that VERY SAME COMMITTEE!! T _he prayers of the righteous availeth much!_ We serve a God who HEARS our prayers and answers them!! Till all hear, Sean

Date: Wednesday, July, 12To: {email}
Subject: 🚨URGENT PRAYER ALERT 🚨

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=f2940cba069b466a910a0b0491f6f6f5&_e=wxCgDraBeaIkTy1K87QpnSJhUdYminLYpt_tKeqply3eHlo-4ID9Js4DpEJILmSeB9KzbIbMDAmNgzFmQSeBOuoQ1OhdVOnvo6NJyCIRpF7_CZs0b0yvoqvKbYc5h1Urh7JUNowOfZOVWpkxl429Tcuwx0Tb3DPaLNbm0YSb1Zybsii-LlA-r50tlmV0rPoJcvGquoi4R03vUhT3r2A1kc72Ecgd6h6M5qhd4YpNaeZiVleGUeo8uJkP1uRG91vbHvwFYBNzKxxiwlKGzM_x4XfXoFHFhpOfT__BHQ4CVDUjQHzMZcyzQWmTMrxi6emS)

Right now in the California legislature, a Spiritual battle is raging. SB 14 would increase penalties on those convicted of TRAFFICKING CHILDREN!! George has spent his life solving problems. As Chief of Staff at NASA, George has devoted his career to creating a better future for California and America. Recently, he has supported front-line wildfire responders and public health through his organization Megafire Action.

In contrast, Garcia recently voted for a bill to restrict mifepristone, a safe and widely used abortion medication. And he was recently called “fantastic” by Rep. Matt Gaetz, one of the most extreme-right members of the House.

name: Durbin HQ
subject: Here’s how we can beat the summer slump >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Our grassroots efforts can keep Democrats from falling behind.
#
Peter,
Senator Durbin wrote to you yesterday about our July goal and how critical it is that we meet it. We can’t let ourselves fall behind over the summer — defending the Senate is too urgent.
We were taking a look through our records from this month and we have an ask for you today:
**JULY SUPPORTER RECORD**

subject: Thrown in jail by the woke mob?
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShElP-BkN6BTwqSjnLrauVr_ZB6RFtbfhRIJUS9Pg5NU7D4P5R61gXWMu2Pp5Rdq-UfY9QGvFDRFBi3AXp9sSRDxRHucjNisBGXlb3tfN15uHnnDbd3rqcb8o6QeGWho5wJLREpcYJu3yM98td_zHMDobdFIVnanQ4XqDgCTjwV1M) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShOK0An4_uXMDUS9wtgR7YTmZQ_wD9i1pjqPiK-aZw398pH7kNakXq69tsVkyXF3Ga4p_Irup7zI5CLBXgNlWI7lfYW8Gd70Os2mogBHsq-fY0YY8r87KwqizMDwcfvpTKIRl7rfcumIj--vRjHB1oqLishwcf3sBuaC16aB4yzb1)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShFdvvJfx-5S6e8B4yGG3ywk_wz_4i_NXxg29W6C5cgGWbnwTD7v_uhXw8OQ9-F6twWPTiXokk_eaYefT9wr1LjxX4kDW_3CAuF-UaTJA_BBpqEHfSC1fhWaAVKiRpzw1uDpul654JNFA_LTMJyD24p4mHHX30a-7nlwcGz8Fq422)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShB1s4zVvzBvaZuWUhgqJuZz11Xm9zA7KA70nk6hUf90_y_Wlc2xhp4exyxRQc3OavCr7hysHbxIheSMe6QZOtno6BB3l2Lx0kuMTIsrR8v_3AAv-lQ5FQdMlWRiS8BPKFsB61hfCZT_lYSfabRyO_6fIQdeXFuGi05_yJQok5qop)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShCVNys-vvsQKwUjJ1BKWPvCCtrSsV5QXFTK001_gj2qFGnE2KGxeFjzV7t4pTuLGwRpGZDbDsR6nV4IT0hV_o1Apwom8zyuaON7xsUH4i5RdPmBGWz-fxJ_GUpPpM6beXQ3svI30PWJ4z7nvcVv7fwVkAn-hz59zw-vv90ABhoBO)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShGYgSt5_d6OicMzTSs0eJwljY-NWi7aaz18ArhzAKNCpIWlO96ViMSbk6AZA7YNcgbEQaSgJeAFB3l96VIEqDfzb4qXGpNvVuLpSisqeSefg6WWL-Pi4KbeqhBLvZIubPug3iibh7gf8JtpxMR7HKyjiv1YuEqV_NbbOVijAd9tt)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShERlWp8PuecWyc-F3vIgz28AHJMEU_F8iQJZPqNRnO5I0Xrl5d_gq5HhMiaxqjFO9pc78dBoaXi7c_V4rEr-QgxKro_W8TLDX8kq1wCA72DLTP4NzHo3L-HSApsVCC2mbDF99B-Mich-xpdIyjqpTXlZfKs8KDhUiyxz1sOmjL2C)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShIx9SU577-LepvXvsKquxFwR07r2N3pU9Bfx6j5jNSHHMpdqcCk9GxtLtQ7cLQ4z0FdlZyEy6b-DvqZvT4z9mgM50H5DZ6yCVW9rSZ2v2SFKlmDSN8BdQnaOx9nKkhhZY9KMlDY6pjlbetZGkI64TlY1coEbQVH28LSg7g0xAQ5U)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c011a8088de3415ba21b5cbb4f4bc21b&_e=tb9foWMQo2vCAxmuYAW5FtAHeOJXDuuQDmNQGAMrRLb2YWL-IZLw88-SRoJrixWU1X25NhxJ2dNIzLTM6K6sa9mUcsheWxSO0Qs0FG_o6HLnaOhPy-qjyGHacILHzdjegIM_cHVwMqg3LGJlda3XoSPf_GWqDdnt3xxsE3RKi9OBzpYaewc8H6COiFD-D1_JZnBuxf7qaMrzV99MuQ2ShAO8F16rKCancDliM5RH7S6TjYecXMPljQ1m_cX_5d8Vs77BadE1wZN87n0uJjrJw2IrFu5ssGBpDLwIpO-uWOwSZWXDtdtoMzgtVSjWqUeS0tmBxVHfx1Eb1IseYHE5-uf_zrGVUMQDMWJ1BFPr18h4QopwwT-W6oT8Mj6m9y5C)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

body:
Your response represents every Republican in your state.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e5ad6124794e44968e5ec9c191bfc573&_e=-QX4zMcql5wyzfpRIIHbINP_1mIvw5vQCfSdysP7YST8pmAs1quei0twOyv3pCIZkk1Kxt84LfjN3gT6gTaCD96fPCiOBTGSD5rbaQw_2QyBvZN5w5tC_zh5mW3MwdpReTwiXR17VMA2c17Fm0o_Y2fCF41H8jSyC5WyPSAJTbTpoVDJyQlFIGH5vs-8PzrzA8lYPkkj4pMuZ32x4NcyVYgXZTVI9g5SgEyJWEhdHa4JE8vKBRHUFj86yywWrv7YXMr-Tn_L3RmSbdY-If4tlYAzTM48lw_OXQyBLP9a4GbHQdhPPfWexDjLmAF4-prlXtyDW3Y9EIwTJUMDfzyfLrXV3lrBwwA8ssJVxgnUKLlv_k3xSmrKqyOh5uZmDQFmbdXtS9nChMa0c_G-bnHsJdG46y5_7hi46pn-KHdLDxQRjVsvoEexKBEZO9QyzBsgTnCAX8TsJzJO6Gh7ZF7EcRM-eM97ZX0IgHB-c6e9l-8%3D)

The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Friend.

**The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. **

Peter, Recently, I spoke to CNN to discuss our former President’s disregard for our nation’s secrets and the grave risk his actions pose to our national security.

The former President’s actions further cement my resolve as a member of the House Intelligence Committee to defend confidential information and protect our servicemembers.

If you support my work, I hope you’ll consider contributing to my campaign today. [_**Your contribution matters now more than ever.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66457039/416405572/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230713-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRhNWQzYjItYzIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RU-ayqnZd887TTBXVg4hVBQxKohSUU4CSz-DcY68Oj0=)

As a former CIA officer, I used to collect the information and write the types of intelligence reports that the former President so cavalierly stored in boxes at his hotel. The precautions U.S. intelligence agencies take to safeguard America’s secrets are extraordinary — because this information is paramount to our national security. _**The idea that documents detailing our nuclear secrets would be haphazardly strewn across the floors of Mar-a-Lago is unthinkable.**_

This incident exemplifies why we need competent, experienced individuals leading our country.

I hope you will consider contributing to my campaign today so I can continue to protect our national security. [_**Your support could significantly impact the future of our campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66457041/416405574/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230713-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRhNWQzYjItYzIyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RU-ayqnZd887TTBXVg4hVBQxKohSUU4CSz-DcY68Oj0=)

clean_body: Take a look. | = | Peter, With the Fourth of July, vacation travel, and general summer craziness, we’re sure the last couple of weeks have been busy, but we wanted to ensure you saw this email we sent before the holiday. It is a perfect example of Abigail standing up to those abusing their power and looking out for the people of Virginia and the entire country. = | = Peter, Recently, I spoke to CNN to discuss our former President’s disregard for our nation’s secrets and the grave risk his actions pose to our national security. The former President’s actions further cement my resolve as a member of the House Intelligence Committee to defend confidential information and protect our servicemembers. If you support my work, I hope you’ll consider contributing to my campaign today. = | = As a former CIA officer, I used to collect the information and write the types of intelligence reports that the former President so cavalierly stored in boxes at his hotel. The precautions U.S. intelligence agencies take to safeguard America’s secrets are extraordinary — because this information is paramount to our national security. The idea that documents detailing our nuclear secrets would be haphazardly strewn across the floors of Mar-a-Lago is unthinkable. This incident exemplifies why we need competent, experienced individuals leading our country. I hope you will consider contributing to my campaign today so I can continue to protect our national security. = | = I am grateful for your support, Abigail | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: What makes this campaign unique?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Thank you so much for being here.
#
This campaign is unique.
Almost all of our campaign’s fundraising comes from small-dollar contributions to online ads and emails just like this one.
**As we gear up for re-election, reaching our monthly fundraising goals will directly impact our budget and ability to hire for Alexandria’s re-election in 2024.**
Unlike some other campaigns in your inbox, we will never try to scare you into donating — we know that not every supporter can contribute to every email we send.
But we do still have very real fundraising goals and deadlines that we need to meet to continue to grow our movement and keep Alexandria in office fighting for all of us.
Right now, we’re working to reach our goal of raising $150,000 by midnight on the 15th to stay on track for what we need to raise in July overall.
[Would you be able to make a $5 contribution to help us reach our $150,000 mid-month fundraising goal? Every single donation will truly make a difference and help keep Alexandria fighting for change.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230713.bA8ceM&refcode=em20230713-4628-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230713.bA8ceM&refcode=em20230713-4628-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ)**
Other campaigns send emails with fake 5x matches and tactics to guilt-trip supporters into donating. Instead, we want to inspire you to donate because you believe in the power of this movement.
Our campaign is 100% people-funded, and every contribution to emails like this one — $5, $10, and $20 at a time — truly adds up to compete against the powerful and corrupting influence of big money in our politics.
[Will you donate $5 today to support Alexandria and our collective movement as we fight for racial, social, economic, and environmental justice for all?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230713.bA8ceM&refcode=em20230713-4628-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ)
Thank you so much for being here. Whether you can afford to contribute today or not, we deeply appreciate your support.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230713?refcode=em20230713-4628-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=22&refcode2=4628_2526796_Nh5_tJ&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230713-4628-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=23&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4628%2E2526796%2ENh5_tJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: Thank you so much for being here. This campaign is unique. Almost all of our campaign’s fundraising comes from small-dollar contributions to online ads and emails just like this one. As we gear up for re-election, reaching our monthly fundraising goals will directly impact our budget and ability to hire for Alexandria’s re-election in 2024. Unlike some other campaigns in your inbox, we will never try to scare you into donating — we know that not every supporter can contribute to every email we send. But we do still have very real fundraising goals and deadlines that we need to meet to continue to grow our movement and keep Alexandria in office fighting for all of us. Right now, we’re working to reach our goal of raising $150,000 by midnight on the 15th to stay on track for what we need to raise in July overall. Other campaigns send emails with fake 5x matches and tactics to guilt-trip supporters into donating. Instead, we want to inspire you to donate because you believe in the power of this movement. Our campaign is 100% people-funded, and every contribution to emails like this one — $5, $10, and $20 at a time — truly adds up to compete against the powerful and corrupting influence of big money in our politics. Thank you so much for being here. Whether you can afford to contribute today or not, we deeply appreciate your support. Pa’lante, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Captain Sam Brown
subject: The life I live is not my own.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
God gave me a second chance–and I’m not going to waste it| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82giDJq0uAsgqm4PDu3yqo5DzIPoupfGEY_qpCHZCIPZw6hdQMAOwNEblrO6trGwYMhxvcLkdyGTquOUMyWUyDbm-Gt46WkL74URuxmsKMNh4sE8Nm8qtPdHpa5W0MBs4L2xnSHcziGFm3hyyA9LxjovQ%3D)
---
| | Friend, My name is Sam Brown — I’m a husband, father, small businessman, retired Army Captain, and, as of this week, [**a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82gkjvK-gMfsLTtugF9wg2JMXbnAaSytKgF5iHIbzLmw94KKHYDunY53B19B4U6tkDXSm50c5jhwebAOQTV1nSnbmZywgxuZlHxqdixxJjNXzFM_5gp2pTAibCTbyulPxjB7R-4tMQsVxKqaI558j1DMY%3D) [**While I was serving in Afghanistan in 2008, a roadside bomb detonated below the gas tank of my vehicle.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82gu6o3d4U7CSLvg5hYuKxcyqv3yPut7_2Sfepp6JlRi12miIOJhm-iL3IEXahXPtt-r0m5Vejq2Cp8HyU06dJzFnVCWot6kcj3eBwlMiP8boZMaLqOnSNukNMjxGCdbeKl0aMatDtWab1vk4quCC4QWI%3D)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82gsum_CpvLVQVgmQAS36op13cWVFhE3aDLNhmXtp_nRA_osb0OHmZVzfK9gazXSvyuUVr2vN3TjMaxNKj7ygtJleuFLGvPiXizjtm5tFlFiNExJ5Eafue9TaD2skywI_C6EgEVPynw9iKsyLOmB3-4bs%3D)
---
My body was immediately engulfed in flames. I remember thinking “How long will it be before I burn to death?” But despite our enemy’s best efforts,**_I survived._** By the grace of God, one of my soldiers was able to extinguish the flames and save my life as I was staring death in the face. **I truly shouldn’t be alive today.** For three years, I went through over 30 surgeries to recover from my wounds. I was bed bound, and over 30% of my body was permanently scarred. But this experience taught me the most important and valuable lesson that I’ve ever learned: **_Putting it all on the line in service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable._** That’s why every day since I nearly lost my life, I’ve dedicated every fiber of my being to continue my service to the greatest country in the history of mankind. [**Friend, I’m telling you all this because I’m hoping that I can count on your financial support**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82gmCKp4_TLG-y4PPQhSztEIwIezJ4WRntRQNw5-_GyPG5Rc8FyyI6W2NzR6ZPLH5lg4tUSml3bjzJuIGJvXMglb-DD4qYRTkFos5jcZn0YOC2pkwPd6si2nu1kvuihmcpiql4iIUIKp-NaA4uxGYRnD0%3D) — but I don’t want to ask you to part with your hard-earned money without telling you my story. **_The American people DESERVE a champion who can stand in the fight without flinching. With your help, I can be that champion. _**
---
[**SEND AN ARMY CAPTAIN TO THE SENATE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82gmWSWj-GJo1S9hm_FH9Fog793M01iBmzw6gXlGMKJQfviay36lm8OdbmKrBP_Vz6xVQPtITi3RVOqZ8R6rZcL46Dse7YMomCnBPQnW3Xdxn_TdRYqVYQeIjs9V0zf-PAR-Q1c6zLkW3pDkOi30AcX-k%3D)
---
Friend, my candidacy is truly unique because there’s NOTHING that Joe Biden, the Washington establishment, or the media can do to me that’s worse than what I went through on the battlefield in Afghanistan. [**Can you help me out and chip in $10, 15, or even $25 so that I can continue serving our country?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82gu_GdwlsQy8f7N2FfvYrKiJtwIFJnltRiPU0wep8D6KaQagqmxMfWM0n4QImbTnnsfiHpMPINdI7v_s8WACv4JrcPdKjXCdW2ke6I3gaQ78h-qwF3kAzLUQBLliXz29dNxhz2gyjdaS398MM2mxDMWY%3D) Now more than ever, we need leaders who are willing to serve — even when things get difficult. Nevada deserves nothing less. America deserves nothing less. You deserve nothing less. We owe it to our nation, to our state, and to everyone who has sacrificed in service of our country. [**Please, join my team today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82giW_qn83e-NZv-MOjapJ1AwqN2fHrfKJTN_j9SY_A0t4ForAIKWoXjfUaWR8Ruy_bkYb-cvKqMJx3ztax_9vyvn6n-pJ4JHJba1zvaYvZvsplzHIAkm244CkAJo6Zu3y6N-JRkQuoAESU8HrK0uFMmU%3D) Duty First,
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ba8e4cd6735f485c934bc745b5790ab6&_e=UQWEXKwAp3cf2cJEUxPTit_qq-qIFnGDITef2AKLj9TNb4RrV21jP_ekYNutM99yjKh4S3HT07xsmXtK9C3CFPbrawZNtqE_qjdu3gHlYiOknQYGkh2ZcUK7FuDRMG6ld8hix81nhomCzZmvXdAzXCM0qA0XJ3kNj0un38lIJwpNBaFTQIlbiOrgk7hYZ9wh2x_32ngIJ8pdt81E-x6sZyxa1GqKSPEgVEblenIFuUOnci_jkpi0k4YpcFQuVEr_Xk4er81Z3hMQhQNGgC82gmoGW_6Eh4Z3pDrCVaVB038XfT6bQXuDRujS4uvIEEtWiEOZms1NTQFh1ggsmFgFFxnJGo4_PvL9LAlS5iEZ0ZBxdnuRBexn6e1K7wlK9_P03-6GgfkBVclzS_yvJqLwFDH72Zg4x7o8yDYIzYMXeCE%3D)
---
Captain Sam Brown
---

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Boatloads of cash
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:

Fellow Conservative,

Last week I wrote to you letting you know that my liberal opponent, Jon Tester, raised more than $5 million for his campaign between April 1st and June 30th. No small sum by itself - but remember that his 2nd quarter haul was on top of the $5 million he raised between January 1st – March 31st.

Sen. Tester is raking in the big bucks from liberal donors all across the country, and we need to fight back now to keep this race competitive so we can win this seat and give Republicans control of the U.S. Senate.

You may or may not recall that the last Senate race in Montana – held in 2020 – **brought more than $100 million in outside spending to the state**. Unfortunately, I have every reason to believe that will once again be the case.

I launched my campaign when I did because I knew that building out our team – and finding the resources to fund our race through small-dollar donations -- is not a quick process.

|

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Thank you for standing with me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi team, Earlier this month, we reviewed the numbers from last quarter’s fundraising push, and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **We hit our Q2 fundraising goal!** I want to take a moment to say _thank you_. The continuous support our campaign has received from you and this entire grassroots movement has helped our team stay the course time and again, and I’m so grateful to have you standing by our side. Day in and day out, I’m working in Congress to push past partisan gridlock and pass legislation ensuring _everyone_ — no matter their zip code — can achieve their dreams. While folks chipping in what they can, when they can, is critical to ensuring everyone has a fair shot — making sure everyone has space to speak up and advocate for what they believe in is just as important. So as we prepare for the road ahead, we want to hear about the issues that have been top of mind for you recently — **whether that be strengthening public education, supporting small businesses, investing in resources to support our farmers, or an entirely different issue.** **[Now that you know how critical your voice is to my re-election campaign, will you take our campaign’s official July Priorities Survey and let us know what issues matter most to you as we begin the new fundraising quarter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66457583/416407577/987292533?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230713_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGY1MzdhYS1jNDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74mdX2Cx_iiPvBsRgVpQErmtTExqJQNqB92N733ELOE=&emci=e5e32fa3-c421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c4f537aa-c421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)** | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66457584/416407578/987292533?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230713_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGY1MzdhYS1jNDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=74mdX2Cx_iiPvBsRgVpQErmtTExqJQNqB92N733ELOE=&emci=e5e32fa3-c421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=c4f537aa-c421-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

Friend,

The race for control of the House will be tight, and the stakes could not be higher.

With recent Supreme Court decisions, leading election experts are saying the race for the House is a toss-up. **_In the last month alone, more than five races have critically shifted–we only need five seats to take the majority, which puts momentum on our side._**

No matter what happens, Marcy Kaptur will be in a toss-up race against a Kevin McCarthy-backed opponent, and that’s not changing. Holding this seat is critical to gaining a Democratic majority and delivering on the issues that matter most to our community. We must be prepared.

**[Will you rush $5 or whatever you can afford today to ensure Marcy has the resources needed to stay strong early clean_body: We must be prepared for whatever comes next. | | = Friend, The race for control of the House will be tight, and the stakes could not be higher. With recent Supreme Court decisions, leading election experts are saying the race for the House is a toss-up. In the last month alone, more than five races have critically shifted–we only need five seats to take the majority, which puts momentum on our side. No matter what happens, Marcy Kaptur will be in a toss-up race against a Kevin McCarthy-backed opponent, and that’s not changing. Holding this seat is critical to gaining a Democratic majority and delivering on the issues that matter most to our community. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What a former lobbyist said in the New York Times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Did you see what a former AIPAC lobbyist recently said to the New York
Times:

"Douglas Bloomfield, a former AIPAC lobbyist, said the group will
'probably accelerate its ad campaign against' Omar and Tlaib, as well as
'a few others on its enemies list.'"

AIPAC has spent millions of dollars against us in the past and now they’re
gearing up to increase their ad campaigns against Justice Democrats Ilhan
Omar and Rashida Tlaib. This is on top of the Moderate PAC who pledged to
spend $20 million against us this cycle.

We need your support right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135779?refcode=em20230713-29875&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29875%2E1203867%2E64YCNO ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to help us
fight back against AIPAC?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135779?refcode=em20230713-29875&t=1020&akid=29875%2E1203867%2E64YCNO ]Donate $3

We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party, to continue to
defeat entrenched corporate incumbents and grow our progressive bloc in
Congress. Thank you for being a part of this movement.

More soon,

Team Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=29875%2E1203867%2E64YCNO ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=29875%2E1203867%2E64YCNO ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230713-29875-footer&t=1023&refcode2=29875_1203867_64YCNO&akid=29875%2E1203867%2E64YCNO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=29875%2E1203867%2E64YCNO

| | Peter, you know I hate to bother you, so I’ll keep this quick.

This past month was incredibly busy for Team Tester. From public fundraising deadlines to a new Mitch McConnell recruit jumping in the race to run against me, we’re at a vital turning point.

**That’s why I need your support now more than ever in this campaign.**

The coming months will be critical. We need the resources to respond to any incoming attacks from opponents and national Republicans like Mitch McConnell. McConnell is desperate to buy this Senate seat in Montana, so they’re pulling out all the stops—including recruiting a millionaire self-funder to run against me.

The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. name: Adam Schiff (via RBG)
subject: Something special
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18710?t=6&akid=1902%2E564421%2EcTsm2T) Friend,

Today, you can do something special. You can make your first contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate (and all I’m asking for is $3 split between me and Ron Be Gone — yes, seriously). Here’s why your early support makes a difference:

Running a Senate campaign is not easy — especially in the largest state in the nation. It’s going to take a massive number of resources to hold events all over California, build a strong campaign team and volunteer network, scale up our organizing efforts, print campaign literature, invest in our digital program (👋), and ultimately, get our message out to voters all over the state.

And while we’re focused on that, extremist Republicans are going to be attacking me non-stop — they’re already doing it on Fox News nearly every day. They’re going to do whatever it takes to keep me out of the Senate, and they’re banking on us _not_ having the resources to respond to the constant smears and lies. We need to prove them wrong.

With your help, I’m confident we will. We’re running this campaign without taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and the response so far has been amazing.

If we’re going to make the major changes our country need to protect voting rights, tackle the climate crisis, safeguard our democracy, and more, then we can’t afford to slow down anytime soon.

[**So with that in mind, I’m asking: Will you split your first $3 contribution to my campaign and Ron Be Gone before tonight’s deadline to help fuel this fight?**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18700?t=8&akid=1902%2E564421%2EcTsm2T) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18706?t=14&akid=1902%2E564421%2EcTsm2T)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18707?t=15&akid=1902%2E564421%2EcTsm2T)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18708?t=16&akid=1902%2E564421%2EcTsm2T)
Thank you for being a key part of this team, and for opening this message in the first place. It really means a lot.

— Adam
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1902%2E564421%2EcTsm2T). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1902%2E564421%2EcTsm2T).**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: More Ukraine Drama
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-aqae-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! Tucker Carlson will host a[ _Republican presidential primary forum_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-y/) in Iowa on Friday. Join our watch party [here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-j/)[ _._](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-t/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-i/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-d/) **Fact Check!** Twitter's Community Notes has been the best thing to happen to social media since its inception, and**[nobody deserves a fact-check walloping quite like the Biden White House's gaslighting](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-h/).** **Ukraine Drama** **[Zelensky went on a Twitter tirade](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-k/)** because he doesn't feel like the US is supporting him in his quest to join NATO. Our National Security Advisor fired back **[calling Zelensky ungrateful](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-u/)**. **Are We Headed for WWIII?** Former President Donald Trump said Joe **[Biden is"dragging us further toward World War III"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-o/)** by sending cluster munitions to Ukraine. **UFO? Really?** A Tennessee lawmaker**[issued a dire warning](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-x/) **after claiming to have seen classified UFO footage that hasn't been released to the public.

**Another One Bites the Dust** A Democratic Georgia state legislator from Atlanta**[has defected to the Republican Party](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-m/) **in an astonishing move after her party turned on her for backing school vouchers. **Third-Party Candidate** Could Democrat Joe Manchin be the **[third-party candidate for President](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-c/)** in 2024? **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* Grandma's **[advice](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* Kamala has **[solved a crisis](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-f/)**.
* What do you **[call it](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aqae-trhiujldw-z/)**?

name: Joanna Weiss
subject: I’m disgusted by the GOP efforts to infringe on women’s reproductive rights.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458027/416409345/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM3ODE0NDUtYzgyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UqjsIbHRjZfmiSUloWkQowQwHZpEvJfONCXWresHN6Y=)
Peter,

**Yesterday, in the cover of night, Iowa Republicans passed a six-week abortion ban. This legislation is just the latest in a string of anti-abortion, anti-women laws across the country.**

This is exactly what we warned would happen when _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned – and it's clear that extreme Republicans won’t stop until they enact a _nationwide abortion ban_.

I’m disgusted by these efforts to strip women of their bodily rights, and for us, it’s a reminder about what is at stake in 2024.

**Here in CA-47, my presumptive Republican opponent Scott Baugh is on the record opposing abortion “in any form” -- with no exceptions even for rape or incest.**

This is the same candidate who gave Katie Porter a run for her money in 2022, and who now has the full weight of the national GOP behind him.

Republicans are fired up to try to win this seat, which happens to be the ONLY open “toss-up” district in California. If we are going to retake the majority and defend reproductive rights, we simply can’t fall short here.

**[In light of this news out of Iowa and the continued attacks on women across the county, please contribute $3 to elect a pro-choice woman to Congress, flip the House, and protect our reproductive freedoms.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458028/416409346/-129347026?refcode=em-7.13.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM3ODE0NDUtYzgyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UqjsIbHRjZfmiSUloWkQowQwHZpEvJfONCXWresHN6Y=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, Yesterday, in the cover of night, Iowa Republicans passed a six-week abortion ban. This legislation is just the latest in a string of anti-abortion, anti-women laws across the country. This is exactly what we warned would happen when Roe v. Wade was overturned – and it's clear that extreme Republicans won’t stop until they enact a nationwide abortion ban. I’m disgusted by these efforts to strip women of their bodily rights, and for us, it’s a reminder about what is at stake in 2024. Here in CA-47, my presumptive Republican opponent Scott Baugh is on the record opposing abortion “in any form” -- with no exceptions even for rape or incest. This is the same candidate who gave Katie Porter a run for her money in 2022, and who now has the full weight of the national GOP behind him. Republicans are fired up to try to win this seat, which happens to be the ONLY open “toss-up” district in California. If we are going to retake the majority and defend reproductive rights, we simply can’t fall short here. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna Weiss | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Fellow Conservative,

Last week I wrote to you letting you know that my liberal opponent, Jon Tester, raised more than $5 million for his campaign between April 1st and June 30th. No small sum by itself - but remember that his 2nd quarter haul was on top of the $5 million he raised between January 1st – March 31st.

Sen. Tester is raking in the big bucks from liberal donors all across the country, and we need to fight back now to keep this race competitive so we can win this seat and give Republicans control of the U.S. Senate.

You may or may not recall that the last Senate race in Montana – held in 2020 – **brought more than $100 million in outside spending to the state**. Unfortunately, I have every reason to believe that will once again be the case.

I launched my campaign when I did because I knew that building out our team – and finding the resources to fund our race through small-dollar donations -- is not a quick process.

|
---

clean_body: | | | Helping Senate women WIN EMILYs List has proudly endorsed 10 women so far who can hold critical blue Senate seats this election cycle. Holding this majority means keeping federal abortion rights OUT of the hands of Republicans. That's why we're running a Senate Flash Fund to help Democratic pro-choice women WIN Senate races nationwide. The deadline is tonight. Please be a part of it by donating now: Peter, With 10 pro-choice champions already endorsed, the EMILYs List Senate roster for 2024 is strong. And it better be, because every single one of the women we're supporting is critical to keeping the Senate out of Republican control. A Republican-led Senate, as you know, would be a one-way ticket to a federal abortion ban. That's why I asked the team to run a $75,000 Senate Flash Fund, designed to help Democratic pro-choice women WIN Senate seats in 2024. We're closing the books at midnight, but are currently $14,760 short of our goal. So, I'm reaching out directly, Peter. Will you step up for Senate women, and donate to the EMILYs List Senate Flash Fund before midnight? Our majority is at stake: Thank you, Laphonza Butler President, EMILYs List ** ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? subject: Hey Derek, I wrote you something

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2975%2E5257348%2Ez3IzXy ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I am so incredibly grateful for the support I’ve received
from you lately. So I wanted to write you a quick note to express it.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230713_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2975%2E5257348%2Ez3IzXy ]Please read the note I wrote below, and consider chipping in further to
support our grassroots campaign before our first fundraising deadline of
this new FEC quarter.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230713_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2975%2E5257348%2Ez3IzXy ]Dear Friend, I just wanted to take a minute to express my appreciation for
this amazing grassroots team. Whether you were a founding donor on day one —
when we launched this campaign on that cloudy day in Burbank at the IATSE hall —
or you joined us in Fresno, San Francisco, Sacramento, San Diego, San Joaquin,
Modesto, Orange County or dozens of other towns, I’m so grateful for your
support! Your encouragement, enthusiasm, ideas, energy and determination to make
the economy work for everyone and protect our democracy and planet, drive me and
this campaign forward.[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=july2023_abs_em.rnu5kc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230713_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2975%2E5257348%2Ez3IzXy ]We can bring down the cost of housing and find homes
for the unhoused. We can make sure hard-working Americans can enjoy a good
quality of life, good healthcare, and safe neighborhoods. We can fight for equal
rights and to protect our most vulnerable citizens, including the LGBTQ
community and all our kids. We can do so much more, and we will. It’s because of
people like you that I know we can move our country forward. I am so grateful
for you. Thank you for being engaged, for organizing and for pressing on. Thank
you for being by my side, Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=july2023_abs_em.JwkbNx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20230713_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2975%2E5257348%2Ez3IzXy ]CHIP IN $3

So this is what I came up with...
| | Friend,
---
My team is getting ready to construct the Donor Wall in our First-In-The-Nation Campaign Headquarters.
_I’ve been asking supporters to give $75 to reserve a spot on the wall since we only have a limited number of spaces._
But this morning, as I looked over our second-quarter report, I saw so many donors who’ve given $1, $5, $15, and so on, to our campaign.
I had to do something to pay tribute to those of you who perhaps can’t make a $75 donation, but are nevertheless loyal donors who deserve recognition for all of your incredible support.
_Collectively, we raise millions. And we wouldn’t be here without your dedication._
**So, I decided to leave 3 spots open. I will randomly draw 3 names of donors who make a contribution of just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to put on the Donor Wall.**

clean_body: So this is what I came up with... | | Friend, My team is getting ready to construct the Donor Wall in our First-In-The-Nation Campaign Headquarters. I’ve been asking supporters to give $75 to reserve a spot on the wall since we only have a limited number of spaces. But this morning, as I looked over our second-quarter report, I saw so many donors who’ve given $1, $5, $15, and so on, to our campaign. I had to do something to pay tribute to those of you who perhaps can’t make a $75 donation, but are nevertheless loyal donors who deserve recognition for all of your incredible support. Collectively, we raise millions. And we wouldn’t be here without your dedication. So, I decided to leave 3 spots open. I will randomly draw 3 names of donors who make a contribution of just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to put on the Donor Wall. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, Jul 11, 2023 Subject: THANK YOU To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend – THANK YOU! Thank you for believing in the power of our movement, in American greatness, and that our country’s best days – despite the Democrats’ every effort – are still to come. It’s because of my incredible supporters like YOU that even with the entire weight of Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ coming down on me, my resolve to SAVE our country is stronger than ever. With you at my side, Friend, we are truly UNBREAKABLE. | And it’s because of your support that our campaign holds leads of more than 30 POINTS in nearly EVERY early primary state. Which is why I’d like to honor YOU on our Donor Wall in our First-In-The-Nation Primary Headquarters in New Hampshire! And I don’t mean scribbled on the wall with a crayon, like some other campaigns do... but a heavy, respectable plaque with the names of our great donors finely etched within. | | I’d love to add as many names as possible, but since we will have limited space, I’m asking donors to make a $75 contribution to RESERVE your spot to have your name inscribed in the Wall. But, because I still want to pay tribute to ALL of our donors who made our First-In-The-Nation Headquarters possible, if you contribute ANY AMOUNT, I’ll include YOUR NAME in a beautiful book of donors that will be displayed right beside our Donor Wall Plaque. | Thank you, | Donald J. Hello,
There are critical updates in the campaign against Lauren Boebert.
__**FIRST:**__ Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert in 2022 by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
__**THEN:**__ Adam announced that he is running again in a rematch against Boebert, giving us our best chance ever to kick her out of Congress – and the latest poll shows a TIED race!
__**BUT NOW:**__ **With just two days left until our critical mid-July fundraising deadline, we are still $63,856 short of our $200,000 goal and what we need to defeat Lauren Boebert.**
None of the pundits gave Adam a chance last time. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight predicted Boebert would win by over 45,000 votes. But with Lauren Boebert now on notice, her far-right allies are already on the attack.
**We need to hit our $200,000 goal if we’re going to win, but Adam’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. We’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now to defeat Lauren Boebert:**

clean_body: There are critical updates in the campaign against Lauren Boebert. Hello, There are critical updates in the campaign against Lauren Boebert. FIRST: Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert in 2022 by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. THEN: Adam announced that he is running again in a rematch against Boebert, giving us our best chance ever to kick her out of Congress – and the latest poll shows a TIED race! BUT NOW: With just two days left until our critical mid-July fundraising deadline, we are still $63,856 short of our $200,000 goal and what we need to defeat Lauren Boebert. None of the pundits gave Adam a chance last time. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight predicted Boebert would win by over 45,000 votes. But with Lauren Boebert now on notice, her far-right allies are already on the attack. We need to hit our $200,000 goal if we’re going to win, but Adam’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. name: Natalie Jenkins, Campaign Manager
subject: Looping you in on an internal campaign strategy memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
On a people-powered campaign like ours, we believe our grassroots supporters deserve to know our internal strategy to send Andrea back to Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458808/416412177/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.13_b1_njcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzcwOTlmMi1jOTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKmRQrjnci0zQtyKI9uvLLjDJZa8djvNTvTXuumsegM=)

Hi team – Natalie, here.
Most campaigns keep their campaign strategies pretty close to the chest. **However, on a people-powered campaign like ours, we believe our grassroots supporters (like you!) deserve to know our internal strategy to send Andrea back to Congress.**

That’s why, today, I’m going to pull back the curtain and loop you in on our summer 2023 campaign strategy, __but please don’t forward this email.__
| **_INTERNAL STRATEGY MEMO_**

Three areas of focus in our campaign to re-elect Andrea Salinas:
1. **Deliver Andrea’s message to every corner of the district.** We need to make sure that every Oregonian understands Andrea’s message of change and vision for a better future. [**Chip in to help us afford the TV and digital ads we need to spread Andrea’s message >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458809/416412178/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.13_b1_njcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzcwOTlmMi1jOTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKmRQrjnci0zQtyKI9uvLLjDJZa8djvNTvTXuumsegM=)

2. **Expand our campaign operation.** To reach all the voters we need to win, we’ll need to hire more campaign staff, recruit more volunteers, and bolster our on-the-ground operation. And with hundreds of thousands of voters to reach, we don’t have any time to waste. [**Help us build out our campaign infrastructure this summer >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458810/416412179/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.13_b1_njcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzcwOTlmMi1jOTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKmRQrjnci0zQtyKI9uvLLjDJZa8djvNTvTXuumsegM=)

3. **Fight back against Republican attacks.** National Republicans have wasted no time in attacking Andrea this year. It’s essential that we have the resources we need to combat their misleading attack ads and fight back. [**Pitch in to help our campaign fend off these misleading attacks >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458811/416412180/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.13_b1_njcm_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzcwOTlmMi1jOTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKmRQrjnci0zQtyKI9uvLLjDJZa8djvNTvTXuumsegM=)

---

[**As you can see, we truly can’t do this without you. So please, will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever makes sense for you to help us execute our campaign strategy and send Andrea back to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458812/416412181/-2022851511?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.13_b1_njcm_all-nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzcwOTlmMi1jOTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKmRQrjnci0zQtyKI9uvLLjDJZa8djvNTvTXuumsegM=)

Thank you so much! With this grassroots team by our side, I know we’ll have what it takes next November.

Best,

Natalie

_Natalie Jenkins
Campaign Manager
Andrea Salinas for Congress_

name: Alex-Padilla.com
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
truthfully, having a Republican majority in the Senate would be a disaster.
#

Hi there,
In just a minute, we’re going to ask you to make a contribution — of $3 or any amount you can — to support Alex Padilla and help hold our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link to chip in:[https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/July-13](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july23.J7FMSH&refcode=em230713-1-30&t=1&akid=1422%2E159979%2EiH5pya)**
**Ok, here’s the deal:** right now, our Democratic majority in the Senate is just a single seat. And with _twice as many Democrats up for re-election than Republicans this cycle,_ we have a lot of work to do if we want to keep Mitch McConnell from becoming Majority Leader again.
**And truthfully, having a Republican majority in the Senate would be a disaster.**
They’ll undo all the progress we’ve made to fight climate change so their Big Oil donors can get richer.
They’ll roll back reproductive rights and block abortion access for women across the country with a national ban.
And they’ll push through massive tax breaks for billionaires and big corporations while working people suffer.
**We know you can’t afford to give every time we ask, and that’s ok. But if you can spare $5 today, it would go a LONG way toward helping Alex and Senate Democrats hold our majority.**
[**So please, make a contribution today to stand with Alex and hold the Senate for Democrats. There’s so much on the line and we need everyone doing their part in order to win.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july23.J7FMSH&refcode=em230713-1-30&t=2&akid=1422%2E159979%2EiH5pya)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: speaking frankly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
Day after day, Kevin McCarthy’s majority shows us just how out of step they are with the American people: Day after day, Kevin McCarthy’s majority shows us just how out of step they are with the American people:
1. Public opinion overwhelmingly supports reproductive freedom – but the GOP majority wants to further restrict access to abortion care.

2. Americans nationwide demand action on gun violence as the GOP majority continues to side with the NRA — tragic, preventable loss of life is a price they’re willing to pay.

_We cannot continue to live and die this way._

Tonight is our mid-July budget deadline and we’ve set a goal of recruiting 24 grassroots supporters to help us take on the GOP in 2024. Only if you’re able, can you chip in to help us retake the majority and get back to addressing the challenges we face as a nation?

Here’s a link our team created just for you: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/md_julymm#dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66458959/416412786/-154415767?amount=25&refcode=07132023_md_midmonth_fr_3&refcode2=cdfbbfc5-ca21-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGZiYmZjNS1jYTIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OnDzj3uXNucGhMj9mH0yhjrFgpB0-Re0RJApIB-7g3s=)**

I thank you for your passion and commitment to electing Democrats and taking back the House.

Warmly,

Madeleine

_Sent from my iPhone_

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. name: Kirsten Engel
