body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend!
It's been an exhausting but exhilarating first couple of months on the campaign trail.
I've loved traveling throughout Cochise, Graham, Greenlee, Pima, and Pinal counties — talking to voters, hearing their concerns, and mobilizing grassroots support. This is a people-powered campaign, and none of what we do would be possible without your incredible support.
Check out some of the best shots from the trail below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act]
I met with advocates from NARAL Pro-Choice America in Cochise County. Protecting reproductive rights is one of my top priorities.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act]
We celebrated diversity, tolerance, and love at the Bisbee Pride Parade!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act]
I attended the AZ Women in Blue Annual Luncheon, and I had a chance to speak about our race in AZ-06. It was great to hear from so many other dynamic women leaders from across Arizona!

This is always such a fun family event! https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act]

This has been a great kickoff to this race.
Last year, we came within one percentage point of winning despite being outspent 6:1. That was because of the incredible grassroots support and energy behind our campaign.
Republican Super PACs threw as much as they could at our district — but our message of fighting for every Arizonan rang true.
We launched 11 weeks ago, and we're already seeing even more support from folks around AZ-06. We have a long road ahead, but I know that together, we can win next November.
I'm not accepting any money from corporate PACs this race. Every dollar will make a difference as we reach out to voters in Southern Arizona. Will you chip in now to make sure we have the resources we need to get our message out?
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act]
Thank you so much!
— Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_071323_CampaignUpdate_act]

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Joe Biden Thinks Putin is in Iraq?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, I can’t believe it.

Joe Biden really said that Vladimir Putin is “losing the war in Iraq.”

I know, it’s almost too crazy to believe, but the headlines don’t lie.
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=65b8a754fb4248c6b7a786a69a0175c2&_e=4yBhKgsnOcYhhPkl5HqI8TkYaWvE-vQFAHKmwyo9NqiJAoEeTbw__e7ppWNX91szBdGzFRDt0JlX6IyMxWwgv1yCfq77W9vHtL2fjjw0K4_0wGT_l4Q1OA44EtpjRQ8E7pCpKFesqvHWPgC67GtraNA3SrE91SNPCy0HpnewHewNVr5GMgtfuN_cts17hzcpBbQ5d28ih70BtDsLjZaXGBukEhxPHi5L-kWFj37BuxjmyimBCwnvdDiIEe1CsBkWZuyTacgaC8Lp1SzfAx3O2yUG4pnFJ_yZO8Fh0Bl47ufkScVh4BICJwIgBV-YSuVSeO8Dg8xY88Ez_yGc1HT3mMhtno-RlkQ3EhQreYCTAfXgB44-OdaI7sCUu3uv9L-P)

We have a chance to put the U.S. back in reliable hands: take back the Senate and hold this administration accountable. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn?refcode=230713-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn?refcode=230713-email]Team,
If extreme Republicans had their way, they’d draw Congressional districts in a way that benefits them and only them. They’d pick and choose their constituents to ensure they win re-election and stay in power for years to come.
That’s not how democracy works.
Our democracy functions when every single eligible voter has their voice heard and their vote counted. That way, the candidates who most accurately represent the values of the community are the ones elected. The far-right GOP in North Carolina don’t believe in this, and they are actively working to solidify unfair maps for personal gain.
We need to know where you stand.
Do you believe in fair congressional maps that allow North Carolinians to choose their representatives and not the other way around?

body:
We are gearing up for two major special elections in New Hampshire that could help state Dems flip the House this November. | | |
---
| | **To:**[ dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4jwT2DUupNy5HkXqHqZW-7gNW0kubTwc4op2-T00n3j7x6EZH_eWfxewHa2JfZPIRNSKY56janhy-1DhnXii_-_A1dE9NmJRgT3vHXttHuBy4fzeVDwQz2qXLuKLf0pRTT5Q8ZDxGJkYPNvr4Zo6o2y95VEhruz4iX2ChJtWlIfhoUw8Z3sB-5m0EZvF9OLJLVYNaRK0u84fIlVtErZsbG1fLGtVHCmFPAsr-hBVSGke9ViHQlrwd6PW0heBMHJTdyUd-9yhqxTX3TFwK9qZeohodEggBBfJEuYyKrkE-JdwtWR6F-Ag505BrKNF7v91FhPaOqY5vpDd_hMeSXlO3rlFUadSBxrZtrSWjHJs3CCexyoR6PyQsA-uJVotoniwHw/3xu/FP1dI53yT6iZgMY8RwnAcQ/h0/gH-a_5fJk2iN6LOiNCu_uDRka7uXpwO82qdcYmM9uOU)
**From:** Charley Oldaker, Associate Director of Research
**Subject:** Special Elections – New Hampshire Over the next few months, this team has some major work to do in order to secure a Democratic majority in the New Hampshire House. Right now, there are two special elections on the books, with more likely to follow. The outcome of these races could make or break our chances of flipping the chamber this year. Republicans control the House with just a three-seat margin but Democrats are within striking distance of taking control. A key part of my job as the DLCC’s Associate Director of Research is making sure our candidates have the resources they need to stay competitive in races like these. My team works around the clock fact-checking Republican extremists, tracking relevant legislation and digging through voting records, and helping our state-level partners build out a winning strategy. **We even devised an innovative approach to gathering high-impact data points to help build a strong foundation ahead of key special elections for seats in the New Hampshire House.** **It’s simple:** The more resources we’re able to provide to our candidates, the more prepared they are to compete against the GOP’s war chest in New Hampshire and beyond. This work is the driving force behind our success in the states, but it takes a full team, time, and funding – grassroots donations help power our work and give our candidates the tools they need to go up against Republican extremists and win. With just a few weeks before our next Election Day in New Hampshire, the research team is pulling out all the stops to turn these races into victories for state Dems. But we need support from grassroots Democrats to fuel this fight. [Will you help power our work to elect state Democrats in New Hampshire and beyond? Your gift today could help turn the tide for state Democrats in ultra-competitive elections nationwide.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4jwT2DUupNy5HkXqHqZW-7gNW0kubTwc4op2-T00n3j7x6EZH_eWfxewHa2JfZPIRNSKY56janhy-1DhnXii_-_A1dE9NmJRgT3vHXttHuBy4fzeVDwQz2qXLuKLf0pRTUdjW9zUrqq4WVjzEvnFwlV6jGW06UCfwaLcMAsOIfu5yWerMPHCaCnPfchYJEYlQunFhlFzeG0S9ozz8LvtHcQJ0TrzIIC2VoUOV8wwWAbUF5O4oXscaPeTa7LGcWfCf3msL-VWnm3B0Nf-3BTIy-Gai82qf4IElMtRMhfb93Wo4yOGtHSMQDtMPCVpVzQdY0qSjlbdRFrotmEleLKcPXEdUEa5Ghp67mAoVsj2YI7KuFSfwQmEiQM4OM9G-yf95Q/3xu/FP1dI53yT6iZgMY8RwnAcQ/h1/nQbVmI7nSmujVZKE8BJ1IJuAVGMyrHggwnqmxfzFKlo) Thank you for your generosity, Charley Oldaker

name: Supreme Court Update
subject: re: Supreme Court & Social Security -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: Supreme Court to hear a case that could "threaten to END" Social Security!**

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/14816?ask=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11328%2E9716520%2EzdbAGd)
**We urgently need to know where you stand:**
**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/14816?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11328%2E9716520%2EzdbAGd)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/14816?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11328%2E9716520%2EzdbAGd)
---

It's clear, team: With _Roe_ overturned, **_NOTHING_** is safe from the _ultra_ -conservative Supreme Court majority.

**And now, they're about to hear a case that experts say could _"threaten to end"_ Social Security!** **_65 million Americans_ could LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t let the Supreme Court attack this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we need to take action -- _now._ We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support Social Security. _But we’re still 42 responses short in Pennsylvania! _

**Please answer before midnight:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/14816?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11328%2E9716520%2EzdbAGd)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/14816?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230713-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=11328%2E9716520%2EzdbAGd)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you.

body:
We're only days away from our mid-month goal deadline
#
Hey Derek, we're going to let you in on a secret.
Do you want to know what the 🔑 to our success has been? **You, Derek.**
It's you and thousands of other folks powering this campaign one contribution at a time. **[A contribution today would go a really long way toward powering our work to keep John fighting for PA families in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230713-1?refcode=em20230713-1-8459&refcode2=8459_434096_FR4eTi&akid=8459%2E434096%2EFR4eTi)**
Not to get too cheesy here, but it really means a lot to our team that you decided to chip in your hard-earned dollars towards our campaign.
We're building this movement from a place of love and care for a better future for all of us. We want all of our neighbors in the Commonwealth and across the nation to know that John is fighting for them in Congress.
Even in an off-year, we have to prioritize fundraising to keep John in the Senate fighting for all of us. That's why we're hoping to raise $3,000 in the next 3 days to keep up our momentum before the mid-month mark. **[If you could contribute toward our goal, we'd be eternally grateful. You can chip in right here. 👇](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230713-1?refcode=em20230713-1-8459&refcode2=8459_434096_FR4eTi&akid=8459%2E434096%2EFR4eTi)**

Thank you for your support. 🙏
-- Team Fetterman

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: World Orca Day Update for dpwillis67@gmail.com
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
| | [ONLY 27 HOURS TO GIVE IN HONOR OF WORLD ORCA DAY ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1875180?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, it’s almost World Orca Day, and I had to reach out to you in advance with a crucial update on our work to protect this majestic species, our fragile oceans and our only Earth.
**Right now, there are only 75 Southern Resident orcas left alive, and greedy corporations are pushing them to the very brink of extinction. Cruise ship pollution is wreaking havoc in the waters these orcas call home. And just one cruise ship can dump millions of gallons of toxic wastewater directly into the ocean. **

At the same time, cruise companies power their massive fleets with the dirtiest heavy fuel, **belching emissions and generating ACIDIC wastewater.** But thanks to massive investments in greenwashing, most vacationers don’t know the devastating impact of taking a cruise – and **this destructive industry is booming like never before.**
**Friends of the Earth is fighting back to protect our orcas and our planet from corporate greed and the catastrophic pollution problem it creates.** But we’ve already lost too many beloved orcas like young Ripple, playful Cappuccino and gentle Marina – and we must act before the last surviving members of their pods waste away too. **That’s why a generous group of donors agreed to MATCH every gift, dollar for dollar, up to our $90,000 World Orca Day goal so we can keep up the fight to protect our oceans from Big Polluters**** – but this opportunity expires at midnight tomorrow.**
**Because you’ve been such a committed supporter, we’re counting on your help to give us the best chance of meeting our goal. We even created a custom link so we can see your impact right away. ****Please, will you hurry now and make your gift to protect our orcas, our oceans and our only Earth? Every dollar will be DOUBLED with our limited-time match up to our $90,000 World Orca Day goal! **
| | [EARLY ORCA DAY ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1875180?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Orcas are suffering, starving and being invaded by relentless industry expansion. The cruise industry is growing and bringing more mega-polluting ships into orcas’ feeding grounds and migration routes. Meanwhile, Big Oil and the shipping industry keep expanding their projects in an endless pursuit of more profit. From driving away their food supply to the deadly threat of oil spills, the consequences for our last surviving Southern Resident orcas could be dire. **But we don’t have to stand aside and let these greedy industries get away with it. **
**That's why hitting our World Orca Day goal is so crucial to struggling orcas, our organization and the sustainable future we’re fighting for. **We’re reaching out to you specifically to be one of our early-bird donors because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you donate now, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on key decision-makers and rein in greedy corporations before it’s too late.
**But time is rapidly running out, and we have to make this World Orca Day really count. So please, make your membership gift now – and have it DOUBLED – to be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our oceans and our planet while we still can. ****[Your personalized World Orca Day link is right here, so make your early-bird gift to fight back for the sake of precious ocean life now.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1875180?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
| | [EARLY WORLD ORCA DAY ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1875180?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Standing with you,

Marcie Keever
Oceans and Vessels Program Director
Friends of the Earth
|

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: New polling & finance update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
99% of our contributions were $100 or less.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26447%2E3422442%2ENTaqWN)
Good news: A newly released poll shows Katie Porter narrowly leading California’s Senate race.
Bad news: Another candidate outraised us by _five million dollars_ last quarter.
Poll after poll shows that when voters hear from Katie we gain a clear advantage, but we’re at a serious cash disadvantage in this race. [**Can you pitch in right now so we have the resources we need to reach voters and compete?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230713-2?refcode=EMAJ13_2_POL_20230713_V1_F&refcode2=26447_3422442_NTaqWN&akid=26447%2E3422442%2ENTaqWN)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230713-2?refcode=EMAJ13_2_POL_20230713_V1_F&refcode2=26447_3422442_NTaqWN&akid=26447%2E3422442%2ENTaqWN)**
This is truly a grassroots powered campaign. Our average donation last quarter was just $29, and **99% of contributions were $100 or less.**
Katie is confident our team can do more with less, and polls from our own campaign and outside organizations show her with the lead. But if we fall further behind in fundraising, we risk not being able to communicate with and turnout supporters on Election Day. subject: FORMER SHERIFF JOE ARPAIO SUES FORMER MEXICAN SECRETARY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND CURRENT PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE MARCELO CASAUBON FOR ALLEGED DEFAMATION
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fb21a5eb90cc/breaking-fbi-put-spy-inside-disabled-marines-legal-defense-team-11855759?e=8edd2b8f7d)
---
|
---
|
---
**FORMER SHERIFF JOE ARPAIO SUES FORMER MEXICAN SECRETARY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND CURRENT PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE MARCELO EBRARD CASAUBON FOR ALLEGED DEFAMATION, INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS**
_Arpaio Had Demanded Public Apology for Branding Him a Murderer and Gun Smuggler To Allegedly Incite Violence Against Him_
(Palm Beach, Florida, July 13, 2023) Former Sheriff Joe Arpaio, commonly known as America’s Toughest Sheriff, has filed a complaint for alleged defamation, intentional infliction of emotional distress and civil assault by Marcelo Ebrard Casaubon, a former Mexican Secretary of Foreign Affairs and current presidential candidate, for branding Arpaio as a murderer and gun smuggler, in a case styled _Arpaio v. Marcelo Ebrard Casaubon, (Case Number: 177297112, 15th Judicial Circuit, Palm Beach County, Florida)._ A copy of the complaint is embedded below and speaks for itself. Larry Klayman, the founder of both Judicial Watch and now Freedom Watch, and the latter’s current Chairman and General Counsel, had this to say upon filing suit on Arpaio’s behalf: “My client has been a fine and distinguished public servant for decades, serving not just as the Sheriff for Maricopa County, Arizona, for almost 25 years, but also in various other high government posts including the Drug Enforcement Administration. For Mr. Ebrard to publish widely in Florida, nationally and internationally that Sheriff Arpaio “promotes the assassination of migrants” to the United States, not only harms Arpaio’s reputation, but in effect is a call to violence against him by persons who would wrongly believe this. In fact, as alleged in the complaint, Arpaio has received death threats. Sheriff Arpaio initially asked Ebrard for an apology to mitigate the damage and imminent harm that was caused to him, including death threats, but was given the callous cold shoulder by Ebrard. And, when the Arpaio asked the Biden administration and its National Security Advisor, Jake Sullivan, to help to clear his name, he was ignored, as he was by Senator Krysten Sinema, who was also summoned for assistance. Now, a jury of Arpaio’s peers will sit over this outrage and justice will be done.” For more information contact Asher Anderson at Asher.andersonfw@gmail.com

| | | _Copyright (C) 2023 Freedom Watch, Inc.. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Freedom Watch, Inc.7050 W Palmetto Park Rd # 15-264Boca Raton, FL 33433-3426
[Add us to your address book](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=b84e72bd5e)

| Hi there,

We know we reach out a lot about Hillary’s campaign, but hear us out. There’s a method behind this madness.

Below, we listed some of Hillary’s top priorities she is fighting for every day in Congress. These issues can fundamentally change lives in West Michigan so the stakes couldn’t be higher. That's why we reach out as much as we do.

Here are Hillary’s top priorities:
* **Healthcare** \- Hillary is hard at work finding common-sense solutions to bring down healthcare costs including lowering the price of prescription drugs.
* **Reproductive Health** \- As the first mom and woman to ever represent this district in Congress, Hillary is a steadfast supporter of a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions.
* **Jobs and the economy** \- Hillary is continuing the fight to create well-paying jobs with good benefits in West Michigan. As Americans are getting squeezed with higher prices, Hillary knows we must do everything possible to put money back in Michiganders’ pockets.
* **Education** \- Hillary is working to strengthen Michigan public schools to make sure our students are prepared and ready to engage in a 21st-century economy.
* **Social Security and Medicare** \- Hillary opposes efforts to raise the retirement age or to cut or privatize our social safety net. Instead, she advocates for making these programs more efficient by cracking down on waste, fraud, and abuse and letting Medicare negotiate the cost of drug prices.

[_**If you support Hillary’s ongoing advocacy for the interests of West Michiganders, we hope you will consider chipping in today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66459784/416415658/1237824078?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230713-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGRmZGFjYS1kMDIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlxEaev-78v3cvfECtX4RKAiR4g19t81j7f0FjB4NtI=)

clean_body: We listed some of Hillary’s top priorities she is fighting for every day in Congress. | = | Hi there, We know we reach out a lot about Hillary’s campaign, but hear us out. There’s a method behind this madness. Below, we listed some of Hillary’s top priorities she is fighting for every day in Congress. These issues can fundamentally change lives in West Michigan so the stakes couldn’t be higher. That's why we reach out as much as we do. Here are Hillary’s top priorities: Healthcare \- Hillary is hard at work finding common-sense solutions to bring down healthcare costs including lowering the price of prescription drugs. Reproductive Health \- As the first mom and woman to ever represent this district in Congress, Hillary is a steadfast supporter of a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions. Jobs and the economy \- Hillary is continuing the fight to create well-paying jobs with good benefits in West Michigan. As Americans are getting squeezed with higher prices, Hillary knows we must do everything possible to put money back in Michiganders’ pockets. Education \- Hillary is working to strengthen Michigan public schools to make sure our students are prepared and ready to engage in a 21st-century economy. Social Security and Medicare \- Hillary opposes efforts to raise the retirement age or to cut or privatize our social safety net. Instead, she advocates for making these programs more efficient by cracking down on waste, fraud, and abuse and letting Medicare negotiate the cost of drug prices. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We appreciate your support, Scholten HQ | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . Peter,

Last week I wrote to you letting you know that my liberal opponent, Jon Tester, raised more than $5 million for his campaign between April 1st and June 30th. No small sum by itself - but remember that his 2nd quarter haul was on top of the $5 million he raised between January 1st – March 31st.

Sen. Tester is raking in the big bucks from liberal donors all across the country, and we need to fight back now to keep this race competitive so we can win this seat and give Republicans control of the U.S. Senate.

You may or may not recall that the last Senate race in Montana – held in 2020 – **brought more than $100 million in outside spending to the state**. Unfortunately, I have every reason to believe that will once again be the case.

I launched my campaign when I did because I knew that building out our team – and finding the resources to fund our race through small-dollar donations -- is not a quick process.

|
---

**[I need this email to raise $5,000 by the end of the day today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a3ae34d2a6c44eb9bc56d886c94a5c76&_e=3vv4f7MPKB7lnKmvbqM_1AgrOcv96G3g8cO8Bz6vuV7CjY9Vtx3zN3g-YLh8Xeo047ibTZd-avfi1PhqH0pIH4gxlTgFR8UmvO2xIGOZwuqKlsshF21scw4kVjNSt8kJ1zXvy5M-Vtxb5SMUS9pNBe_tUqabqiKsoZDO8Xsq9gPO-YvjTcKeSVnhjWsYiARftn1ksJX06fpjcFaXmRKD4OCHSpAD9uewn8OSnNvByjwlfqBojfkPjA-ZbJblW4zsE5lslWGg2xJ1dFLV2BOYMJsz_a7X5vR57OTs4-BYTBJf0sPC0UFZoIDOYkLz9Fshy_0pHhrZGIGFwU-8ieBI0q0bptXbGY0bdP9s2o_suqsr3bgYb7DYLPso4TlXTpGAz9_Rhau7zpmIkhqJRrMEMSUC7nQA620JvykWCy5NrvVF2y7XIs9jRX3lSHdZBziw)**. No extra quarters for the meter. No giving change to the homeless. No giving dollars to street performers or musicians. No more selling extra items for cash. No buying anything with privacy.

name: Sara (personal)
subject: What it means to be an ally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, let’s talk about allyship.
The term “ally” gets thrown around a lot, and for good reason. In the progressive community, the idea of showing up for marginalized groups has become a big part of how we support one another in this work. And of course, this is a critical concept for white and cis-gender folks to understand and embrace.
But what does it truly mean to be an ally?
To me, it in part means taking on some of the responsibility that’s heaped on to other communities – helping carry the weight of the hardships, nuances, and setbacks and lifting up the accomplishments and the celebrations just like we would in our own lives. It means learning when to step up so that some of the heaviest work – like educating people on what it means to live as a marginalized person – doesn’t fall on their shoulders every time.
These are lessons my two siblings – one of whom is trans and the other gender-nonconforming – have patiently taught people in their lives so that we can better show up for them.
And while I feel personally and deeply connected to the LGBTQ+ rights movement, I think just about anyone reading this email would agree that everyone – me, my siblings, you, your neighbors – deserve to feel safe, no matter our different experiences, challenges, and privileges.
It’s up to us to use whatever privilege we have for good, to focus on concrete ways to be an ally, and to participate fully in the push for progress.
One of the ways I show up as an ally is by using my position as a Member of Congress to fight for progress and raise awareness – and it’s why I was so proud to be included in a list of “ five lawmakers to watch in the fight for LGBTQ equality [https://thehill.com/homenews/lgbtq/4074797-five-lawmakers-to-watch-in-the-fight-for-lgbtq-equality/] ” – a piece that highlighted the ways my colleagues and I are fighting back against the wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation and rhetoric.
But our work in Congress is just one aspect of this effort when, at every level of government, we’re seeing extremism take hold. From the influx of anti-LGBTQ+ state legislation that is putting this year on track to be the worst on record to Republicans in Congress proposing banning Pride flags at government buildings. From Ron DeSantis actually fundraising off a photo of President Biden standing in front of a Pride flag – as if that were a political “hit” – to the Supreme Court that just ruled in favor of a graphic designer who didn’t want to create wedding websites for same-sex couples (who, by the way, never asked her to in the first place).
Being an ally is more important than it’s ever been before.
Just like the word “love” is both a noun and a verb, the word “ally” is the same. It’s not enough to say “I’m an ally” – we all have to step up and take action to ally ourselves with the people and the movements that need our support.
I’d love to hear from you about allyship. How are you an ally, and what have allies meant to you? If you have thoughts to share, please take a moment to reply to this email and let me know.
Thanks as always for reading – and to all my San Diego friends, happy Pride!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Monica Tranel
subject: I’m running against Republican Ryan Zinke — and I need your support.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the elite, not Montana - are helping them do it
body:
| [**Friend, it’s Monica Tranel. I’m running for Congress to represent working Montanans against giant corporations that are making record profits, and shifting costs to everyday Montanans and small businesses. Ryan Zinke has done nothing to keep money in Montanans’ pockets - by working for corporate interests, he’s part of the problem. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49465?t=6&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Monica Tranel and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49466?t=7&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49467?t=8&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49468?t=9&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49469?t=10&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49465?t=11&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL)
My commitment to the Montana I grew up in and love continues. As a 2-time Olympian, I know what it means to go to the starting line. I am choosing to be at the starting line of this race, because our democracy, and our Montana, are on the line.

**But the Montana we love is slipping away. Out-of-state billionaires and corporate monopolies are turning Montana into a playground for the rich and making it unaffordable for working families to live here. Politicians like Ryan Zinke - bought and paid for by the elite, not Montana - are helping them do it.**

It’s time to dust off the purple DNA of our state and fight for a Montana that will restore a strong middle class, with economic security for all.

Whether it was rowing in the Olympics, or fighting against powerful corporations, it was the hard work of growing up on a ranch in Eastern Montana that prepared me for tough challenges.

So now, I’m running to bring that Montana work ethic to Washington to fight for the hard working folks who have been left behind as a result of the Republican economic policies of the last forty years.

[**In 2022, I defied all odds and came within 3 points of beating Ryan Zinke — and this time, I know we can win. But I need you on my team. Will you split a donation of any kind between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me defeat Ryan Zinke once and for all?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/49470?t=12&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9123%2E878179%2EXmWluL).**

clean_body: | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Monica Tranel and VPP will go through immediately: | My commitment to the Montana I grew up in and love continues. As a 2-time Olympian, I know what it means to go to the starting line. I am choosing to be at the starting line of this race, because our democracy, and our Montana, are on the line. But the Montana we love is slipping away. Out-of-state billionaires and corporate monopolies are turning Montana into a playground for the rich and making it unaffordable for working families to live here. Politicians like Ryan Zinke - bought and paid for by the elite, not Montana - are helping them do it. It’s time to dust off the purple DNA of our state and fight for a Montana that will restore a strong middle class, with economic security for all. Whether it was rowing in the Olympics, or fighting against powerful corporations, it was the hard work of growing up on a ranch in Eastern Montana that prepared me for tough challenges. So now, I’m running to bring that Montana work ethic to Washington to fight for the hard working folks who have been left behind as a result of the Republican economic policies of the last forty years. name: Tina Smith
subject: The hottest day on the planet in the past 125,000 years.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Climate change is a crisis, and *this* is what Republicans were doing yesterday. |
#
Devastating floods. Unrelenting heat waves. Uncontrolled wildfires. Extreme ocean temperatures. Some scientists believe that last week we experienced one of the hottest days on Earth in 125,000 years. **This is a dire alarm, folks.** Climate change is here, and its impacts are beyond extreme. And what are Republicans doing? **Instead of working to protect their constituents from the catastrophic impacts of this crisis, the GOP spent yesterday hearing from a fossil fuel industry shill advocating for *more* use of fossil fuels, not less.** The science is clear on this: We must fight to protect our environment, or we will face the consequences. Thanks to our Senate majority, we’ve passed the most significant legislation to combat climate change in history, but clearly, more needs to be done. **[So I’m asking, will you donate right now to help us protect and expand our Senate majority so we can make even more progress on transitioning toward a clean energy economy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66460335/416417964/-1701231322?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20230713_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGJhOWE3Ni1kMjIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZwZL4_nAmYEXmvvv-zKUURCDEmEV-efHrofO4RzgOw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66460336/416417965/-1701231322?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20230713_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGJhOWE3Ni1kMjIxLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZwZL4_nAmYEXmvvv-zKUURCDEmEV-efHrofO4RzgOw=)

name: Asa Hutchinson
subject: Is 'Bidenomics' working for you?
body:
Gas, groceries, and nearly everything has increased in price over the past few years...

| | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/guxUEV7suXSSq1A-gX9qhw~~/AAAHUQA~~~)
---
| | Friend,
Can I ask you a quick question? **Do you think President Biden's 'Bidenomics' is helping or hurting your personal finances?**
President Biden just conducted a tour around the country with his cabinet touting his economic plan, which he now calls 'Bidenomics'. Since President Biden took office, so many of our daily necessities have dramatically increased:
* **The cost of eggs, meat, and other groceries has risen by 11% compared to last year.**
* **A July 4th cookout this year cost 17% more than it did last year alone.**
* **Energy prices have increased an astounding 37.2% since Biden took office.**

I don't know about you but the only growth I have seen since Biden took office has been the size of our national debt!
But I want to know what you think.** ****Do you think President Biden's 'Bidenomics' is working for you and your family?**
**[Please take our official survey!](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/guxUEV7suXSSq1A-gX9qhw~~/AAAHUQA~~~)**
---
| [Take the Survey!](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/guxUEV7suXSSq1A-gX9qhw~~/AAAHUQA~~~ "Take the Survey!")
---
Please let me know your honest opinion. Together, we can bring out the best in America!

Warm regards,

Asa Hutchinson

clean_body: Gas, groceries, and nearly everything has increased in price over the past few years... | | | | | ~~ | | Friend, Can I ask you a quick question? Do you think President Biden's 'Bidenomics' is helping or hurting your personal finances? President Biden just conducted a tour around the country with his cabinet touting his economic plan, which he now calls 'Bidenomics'. Since President Biden took office, so many of our daily necessities have dramatically increased: The cost of eggs, meat, and other groceries has risen by 11% compared to last year. A July 4th cookout this year cost 17% more than it did last year alone. Energy prices have increased an astounding 37.2% since Biden took office. I don't know about you but the only growth I have seen since Biden took office has been the size of our national debt! But I want to know what you think. **Do you think President Biden's 'Bidenomics' is working for you and your family? ~~ | ~~ "Take the Survey!" Please let me know your honest opinion. Together, we can bring out the best in America! Warm regards, Asa Hutchinson | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" | "Shop for Official Team Asa for America Merchandise" | | ~ | | ~~ | ~ | ---|---|---|---|--- ~~ ~~ 3511 SE J Street #311, Bentonville, Arkansas, 72712, United States of America ~~

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66460467/416418452/759276572?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230713-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY0M2ZkYjktZDMyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=voBNQYs5qVTr6UcHkDdcDNUACVYdoIaGiFPPcJ91QHk=)

| Peter,

Our team is proud to have earned the endorsement of WA's National Women’s Political Caucus. Hilary is the only woman in the race, and some career politicians - primarily men - are telling her to wait her turn. But Hilary has been told that before. [_**If you believe Washington needs a governor with her perspective and experiences to tackle our most pressing issues, please chip in now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66460468/416418453/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230713-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY0M2ZkYjktZDMyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=voBNQYs5qVTr6UcHkDdcDNUACVYdoIaGiFPPcJ91QHk=)

---
This endorsement underscores the exact qualifications and identities Hilary holds that make her such an incredible candidate for governor.
1. Washington is one of the country's most progressive states. Still, we’ve only ever elected two women for governor. **Hilary would bring a much-needed perspective** as a mother who had to find affordable childcare while trying to balance a career, all while also caring for an aging father. It’s an experience so many in Washington share.

2. **Talk is cheap, but Hilary doesn’t plan on just talking about women’s health. She has plans to address these problems.** As the only woman in the race, she’s the only one who knows firsthand how critical it is to protect women’s health and reproductive freedom. And, because of her record tackling forest fires and strengthening Washington’s climate resilience, we can trust her to keep the promises she makes.

3. Did we mention she is a mother of three boys? She knows how to handle disagreements. **That’s how she’s won support from both parties on policy victories like funding wildfire fighting and preparation and building climate resilience.** She knows how to bring conflicting viewpoints together and drive toward a solution. Not by compromising her progressive values but by never giving up on trying to win people over.

Hilary is, plain and simple, the best person for this job. [_**If you believe in effective leadership, we hope you will consider contributing today. The path to victory is long, but it is possible with the support of grassroots donors like you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66460470/416418455/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230713-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY0M2ZkYjktZDMyMS1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=voBNQYs5qVTr6UcHkDdcDNUACVYdoIaGiFPPcJ91QHk=)

From wildfires to massive droughts, scorching temperatures, and chaotic weather patterns, our planet and our communities cannot wait any longer for elected leaders to finally come around.

Scientists have been warning us for decades about the dire consequences of a rapidly heating planet, but greed and lobbying by the fossil fuel industry and complacent elected officials have stalled the bold, urgent action we need.

In Congress, I will fight for a swift transition to a clean economy, invest in renewable energy, block dangerous fossil projects and pipelines, and mitigate the impact that’s already devastating our communities — policies supported by the vast majority of Americans.

[**But I can’t do it alone. The fossil fuel industry spends billions lobbying elected officials with dark-money PACs to buy their inaction, but they can’t buy me. The NRSC is already launching attack ads against me, and recruiting candidates to take back this seat in 2024. = Families, union workers, and middle-class Americans across our state see something else in this map: massive investments in next-generation infrastructure and family-sustaining jobs.
